title: Kiko: Programming Agents to Enact Interaction Protocols
summary:
Realizing a multiagent system involves implementing member agents who interact based on a protocol while making decisions in a decentralized manner. Current programming models for agents offer poor abstractions for decision making and fail to adequately bridge an agent's internal decision logic with its public decisions.
  We present Kiko, a protocol-based programming model for agents. To implement an agent, a programmer writes one or more decision makers, each of which chooses from among a set of valid decisions and makes mutually compatible decisions on what messages to send. By completely abstracting away the underlying communication service and by supporting practical decision-making patterns, Kiko enables agent developers to focus on business logic. We provide an operational semantics for Kiko and establish that Kiko agents are protocol compliant and able to realize any protocol enactment.

AI.tldr: Kiko是一种新的基于协议的多智能体系统编程模型，通过决策器抽象来实现智能体的内部决策逻辑与公共决策的桥梁，并确保协议合规性。
AI.motivation: 当前的多智能体编程模型对决策的抽象能力不足，无法很好地将智能体的内部决策逻辑与其公共决策（发送消息）结合起来，开发者需要处理底层通信服务的细节。
AI.method: 提出Kiko编程模型，开发者编写决策器（decision makers）从有效决策集合中选择并做出相互兼容的消息发送决策。提供Kiko的操作语义并证明其协议合规性。
AI.result: Kiko能够完全抽象掉底层通信服务，支持实际的决策模式，使智能体开发者专注于业务逻辑，并能够实现任意协议 enactment。
AI.conclusion: Kiko为多智能体系统开发提供了一个良好的抽象层次，既保证了协议合规性，又提供了足够的灵活性来支持各种决策模式。

relevance_reason: This paper is about multi-agent programming systems and protocol enactment (software engineering), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It addresses none of the pain points (3D motion extraction, visual-to-3D domain gap, motion quality assessment) and uses completely different methods (decision abstraction vs video/motion generation models). The application domain is entirely different.

title: Agentic Analysis for Agentic Infrastructure: An LLM-Powered Pipeline for Comparative Governance of DAO and Corporate AI Protocols
summary: As AI agent protocols proliferate, the governance structures shaping their interoperability standards remain empirically underexamined. We introduce an LLM-powered comparative pipeline for large-scale governance discourse analysis, integrating automated annotation, neural topic modeling, and multi-layer network analysis to study socio-technical power structures at scale. We validate it on two contrasting standards for agent interoperability: ERC-8004 (permissionless, on-chain) and Google A2A (corporate-led). Analyzing 4,323 governance participation records, we combine LLM-assisted coding, topic modeling, and multi-layer network analysis to examine how institutional design shapes thematic priorities and community structure. We find that while governance form influences substantive focus, both regimes exhibit comparable levels of participation inequality and community fragmentation. Discourse alignment is denser in the permissionless setting, suggesting that open governance may foster greater thematic convergence despite decentralized participation. These findings illustrate how LLM-assisted methods can advance the empirical study of technology governance, with implications for designing more equitable agentic AI standards. All data and code are openly available.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究AI代理协议治理结构，比较ERC-8004（无权限链上）和Google A2A（企业主导）两种互操作性标准，分析治理模式如何影响主题优先权和社区结构。
AI.motivation: AI代理协议治理结构的互操作性标准缺乏实证研究，需要理解制度设计如何塑造技术治理。
AI.method: 构建LLM驱动的比较管道，整合自动注释、神经主题建模和多层网络分析，分析4,323条治理参与记录。
AI.result: 治理形式影响实质性重点；两种制度都呈现相当的参与不平等和社区分裂；无权限设置的话语对齐更密集，表明开放治理可能促进更大的主题趋同。
AI.conclusion: LLM辅助方法可推进技术治理的实证研究，对设计更公平的代理AI标准具有启示意义。

relevance_reason: This paper is about DAO and corporate AI protocol governance analysis using LLMs - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: blockchain governance vs. motion generation. It does not address any pain points (3D motion extraction, visual-to-3D domain gap, motion quality assessment) and uses completely different methods (LLM for text analysis vs. video generation models and visual-guided motion generation).

title: Instruction Bleed: Cross-Module Interference in Prompt-Composed Agentic Systems
comment: 8 pages, 2 tables. Accepted to the ICML 2026 Workshop on Failure Modes in Agentic AI (FAGEN), Seoul, South Korea
summary: Practitioners of prompt-composed agentic systems report a recurring failure mode: editing one prompt module silently shifts the behavior of others despite no shared variable or executable dependency. We formalize this as compositional behavioral leakage (CBL): interference between modules sharing a context window. CBL is enabled by architectural non-isolation: transformer self-attention provides no formal boundary between concatenated modules. We probe CBL on a deployed job-evaluation agent (Claude Sonnet 4.6, 144 trials) through a reusable three-channel protocol that perturbs non-focal modules along volume, content, and form. Only the content channel produces a detectable paired effect (Cohen's d = 0.63, bootstrap 95% CI excluding zero); no recommendation flipped -- a sub-threshold regime invisible to standard QA but compounding across the thousands of decisions a deployed agent makes. CBL is orthogonal to known agent-failure axes (adversarial injection, cognitive degradation, multi-agent fault propagation, privacy leakage). We contribute an operational definition, a reusable protocol, a falsifiable prediction set, and a system-class characterization, establishing cross-module interference measurement as a requirement for prompt-composed agent evaluation.

AI.tldr: 研究定义了组合行为泄露（CBL）这一新失败模式：当编辑一个提示词模块时，会 silently 影响其他模块的行为，即使它们之间没有共享变量或可执行依赖。这种干扰源于架构非隔离性——Transformer自注意力机制在连接的模块之间没有提供形式边界。
AI.motivation: 提示词组合代理系统的实践者报告了一个反复出现的失败模式：编辑一个提示词模块会 silently 改变其他模块的行为，尽管它们之间没有共享变量或可执行依赖。这篇论文将此正式定义为组合行为泄露（CBL）。
AI.method: 通过一个可重用的三通道协议来探测CBL：在部署的求职评估代理（Claude Sonnet 4.6）上进行144次试验，沿体积、内容和形式三个维度对非焦点模块进行扰动。
AI.result: 只有内容通道产生了可检测的配对效应（Cohen's d = 0.63，bootstrap 95% CI排除零）；没有建议被翻转——这是一个标准QA无法检测到的亚阈值制度，但会在部署代理所做的数千个决策中累积。
AI.conclusion: CBL与已知的代理失败轴正交（对抗性注入、认知退化、多代理故障传播、隐私泄露）。作者贡献了操作定义、可重用协议、可证伪预测集和系统类特征，将跨模块干扰测量确立为提示词组合代理评估的要求。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI agent systems and prompt engineering (specifically "Instruction Bleed" and cross-module interference in LLM-based agents like Claude Sonnet 4.6). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - this is about LLM prompt design, not about video generation, 3D motion synthesis, visual-guided motion generation, or any computer graphics task. The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned in the research profile.

title: Scientific discovery as meta-optimization: a combinatorial optimization case study
summary: Scientific discovery is fundamentally an optimization problem, defined by a vast "state space" of theories and experiments, and an evaluation criterion based on quality, novelty, and validity. Large language models (LLMs) have enabled automated exploration of this space, but we argue that simultaneous modification of the evaluation criteria is equally important. Here, we propose formalizing research as meta-optimization, where the optimization objective itself is also being optimized. Our key contribution is "consensus objective aggregation," where LLM-generated objective functions are combined via correlation-weighted voting, yielding a stable, self-correcting evaluation criterion that evolves as understanding deepens. We apply this framework to algorithm discovery for 3-SAT problems based on digital MemComputing machines, reducing the baseline scaling with problem size $N$ from $\sim N^{2.51}$ to $\sim N^{1.33}$ and delivering a $\sim 67\times$ speedup on the largest instances tested. As a problem-agnostic framework, we hope this approach will considerably aid scientific discovery.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出将科学发现形式化为元优化问题，即同时优化研究目标和评价标准。通过"共识目标聚合"方法将LLM生成的目标函数进行相关性加权投票，形成自洽的演化评价标准。在3-SAT问题算法发现中实现了显著的性能提升。
AI.motivation: 科学发现本质上是在庞大的理论和实验状态空间中进行优化，但现有方法仅关注搜索策略而忽视了评价标准本身的优化。作者认为同时修改评价标准同样重要。
AI.method: 提出"共识目标聚合"框架：1)利用LLM生成多个候选目标函数；2)通过相关性加权投票机制组合这些目标函数；3)形成稳定、自纠正的演化评价标准，使其随理解深入而动态调整。
AI.result: 在数字MemComputing机器上解决3-SAT问题，问题规模N的基准扩展从~N^2.51降低到~N^1.33，在最大测试实例上实现约67倍加速。
AI.conclusion: 该框架作为问题无关的一般方法，可显著促进科学发现自动化，为AI驱动的科学研究提供了新的范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about scientific discovery and combinatorial optimization (3-SAT problem solving) using LLM-based meta-optimization. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, video generation, or 3D motion extraction. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with theoretical computer science/combinatorial optimization rather than visual/motion synthesis. The methods (LLM for objective function optimization) are unrelated to the research profile's needs (video generation models, vision-language models for motion quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction).

title: DocArena: Turning Raw Documents into Controllable Training Environments for Document Search Agents
summary: Recent methods train search agents via reinforcement learning from (question, answer, evidence) tuples without requiring expert trajectories. The tuples serve as the training environment, and whose properties directly shape what search strategies and generalization abilities the agent can develop. While prior works have made encouraging progress in improving training data quality, existing environments remain predominantly text-based and existing approaches can struggle to construct training environments that are controllable, scalable, and account for multimodal data. Given this, we propose DocArena, a fully automated data curation pipeline building on the practical need for multimodal document search and question-answering. It transforms raw document collections into training environments for search agents without any human annotation. The pipeline first structures and indexes documents through MLLM-based visual perception, then profiles and leverage the cross-page information distribution to construct reasoning-intensive QA pairs, as well as performs cascaded quality assurance operations via MLLM. We introduce DocArena-79K with QA pairs from 8,336 documents spanning 16 domains and 49 languages. We further design a Doc-Search agent infrastructure that decouples visual perception from the policy model, allowing text-based LLMs to serve as the reasoning backbone for multimodal document retrieval and QA. Under a unified evaluation framework where only the policy model differs, experiments on six multimodal document scenarios and seven text-based QA benchmarks show that agents trained on DocArena data achieve the best performance on both retrieval accuracy and QA quality. Further analysis on agent search behaviors confirms the effectiveness and controllability of the constructed training environment.

AI.tldr: DocArena是一个全自动的多模态文档搜索和问答训练数据构建管道，通过MLLM将原始文档集合转换为搜索智能体的训练环境，无需人工标注。构建了包含8,336份文档、79,000个QA对的DocArena-79K数据集，涵盖16个领域和49种语言。
AI.motivation: 现有搜索智能体训练方法主要依赖基于文本的环境，且难以构建可控、可扩展的多模态训练数据。现有环境无法满足多模态文档检索和问答的实际需求。
AI.method: 1) 通过MLLM的视觉感知对文档进行结构化和索引；2) 利用跨页面信息分布构建推理密集型QA对；3) 通过MLLM执行级联质量保证操作；4) 设计Doc-Search智能体基础设施，将视觉感知与策略模型解耦，使基于文本的LLM可作为多模态文档检索和问答的推理骨干。
AI.result: 在六个多模态文档场景和七个基于文本的QA基准测试中，基于DocArena数据训练的智能体在检索准确性和QA质量上均达到最佳性能。对智能体搜索行为的分析证实了构建训练环境的有效性和可控性。
AI.conclusion: DocArena能够自动化构建高质量、可控的多模态文档搜索训练环境，为多模态文档检索和问答智能体的训练提供了新的数据基础和评估框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about document search agents and QA systems using multimodal LLMs for document processing - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is Information Retrieval/NLP, not motion generation or computer graphics. While it uses multimodal techniques, these are applied to document understanding, not to extracting 3D motion from video or generating human motion. The pain points, methods, and goals are entirely different fields.

title: Detecting and Controlling Sycophancy with Cascading Linear Features
summary: Interpreting and controlling model behaviors through activation steering methods requires many pairs of contrastive samples that clearly exhibit desired or undesired behavior. These data pairs determine the degree to which interpretability frameworks can reliably detect model features responsible for a behavior, and therefore the ability to steer models toward or away from such behavior. In this work, we present an iterative data generation pipeline that isolates cascading linear features responsible for a behavior. Specifically, we show how moving beyond simple binary pairs of samples, and instead isolating samples that show degrees of features that scale linearly with behavior, allows for better disentanglement of features. We focus on detecting and steering away from sycophancy -- the tendency of language models to prioritize user validation. We demonstrate that sycophancy features discovered through cascading samples form linearly separable subspaces, and allow for selection of model activations that more clearly correspond to the desired behavior than baseline approaches. We also evaluate their ability to enable detection, deterministic scoring, and robust steering, and see that they either match or outperform LLM-as-a-judge and system prompting baselines while providing lower computational demand and more interpretability guarantees. Code & Data: https://cascading-feats.github.io/

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种迭代数据生成管道，通过级联线性特征来检测和引导语言模型远离"谄媚"行为，优于现有基线方法。
AI.motivation: 当前激活转向方法需要大量对比样本来识别模型特征，但简单二元样本对难以有效分离特征与行为的关系，需要更精细的数据生成方法来提高可解释性和可控性。
AI.method: 提出迭代数据生成管道，生成展示线性缩放特征的级联样本，而非简单二元对比；利用这些样本检测谄媚特征的线性可分离子空间，实现激活转向。
AI.result: 级联样本发现的谄媚特征形成线性可分离子空间，选择的激活与期望行为更清晰；在检测、确定性评分和稳健转向方面与LLM-as-a-judge和系统提示基线相当或更优，同时计算需求更低且可解释性更强。
AI.conclusion: 级联线性特征方法能有效分离谄媚特征子空间，为检测和引导语言模型行为提供了更高效、可解释的方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses LLM alignment/sycophancy detection in NLP, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with language model behavior control, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or any computer graphics tasks. No overlap in pain points or methods.

title: A unified cell-merge algorithm for generating diverse Voronoi diagrams and new tessellations based on spatial chromatic model
summary: As a type of spatial tessellation model and an important spatial structure of computational geometry, Voronoi diagrams (VDs) are widely used in many fields. Due to differences in generation spaces, types of spatial entities, distance metrics, and relationships between entities and Voronoi regions, Voronoi diagrams vary into many types, such as the ordinary VD, VD on spheres, VD for linear entities, weighted VD, and ordered higher-order VD. These VDs also have their own generation algorithms. In this study, we propose a new cell-merge (CM) Voronoi generation algorithm based on the spatial chromatic model. The advantage of the CM algorithm is that it can quickly generate diverse VDs by retrieving and merging cells from a unified database, without requiring the development of specific algorithms for each VD. The CM Voronoi algorithm can be particularly applied in cases where a variety of Voronoi diagrams are frequently required for computation and analysis, such as in location-based spatial analysis. Furthermore, the proposed CM method can also generate some new types of spatial tessellations, such as competition intensity and couple-cell diagrams which are different from classical VDs.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于空间染色模型的新型元胞合并(CM)Voronoi图生成算法,可以快速生成多种不同类型的Voronoi图,无需为每种类型开发特定算法。
AI.motivation: Voronoi图有多种类型(普通VD、球面VD、线实体VD、加权VD、高阶VD等),传统方法需要为每种类型开发专门的生成算法,过程繁琐且效率低下。
AI.method: 基于空间染色模型,提出元胞合并(CM)算法。该算法通过从统一数据库中检索和合并元胞来快速生成各种类型的Voronoi图。
AI.result: CM算法可快速生成多样化的Voronoi图,特别适用于需要频繁计算和分析多种Voronoi图的场景(如位置-based空间分析),还能生成新型空间 tessellation如竞争强度图和 couples-cell图。
AI.conclusion: CM方法为Voronoi图的生成提供了一种通用、高效的解决方案,降低了为不同类型VD开发专门算法的需求,并能生成传统Voronoi图之外的新型空间 tessellation。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Voronoi diagram generation using spatial chromatic models - a computational geometry topic entirely unrelated to Text-to-Motion Generation. The research profile focuses on video-to-motion extraction, visual-guided 3D motion generation, and quality assessment for motion synthesis. While both fields fall under "Computer Graphics" broadly, this paper addresses geometric tessellation/spatial analysis problems, not motion generation or video understanding. The application domain is completely different.

title: Semantic Early-Stopping for Iterative LLM Agent Loops
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 4 tables. Open implementation, machine-checked theory, and reproducible harness: github.com/SahilShrivastava-Dev/semantic-halting-problem
summary: Multi-agent large language model (LLM) loops, for example a Writer that drafts and a Critic that revises, are almost always terminated by a fixed iteration cap (max_iterations). This is a syntactic kill-switch: it is blind to whether the answer is still improving, so it over-spends tokens on easy inputs and truncates hard ones. We study semantic early-stopping: the loop halts when consecutive draft embeddings stop changing in meaning (cosine distance with a patience window) and the answer's measured quality stops improving. Our work makes three contributions. First, an honest theoretical footing: we prove deterministic termination and well-definedness and machine-check these claims, while treating the convergence of the distance sequence as an empirically tested conjecture rather than a (previously over-claimed) Banach contraction. Second, a judge-efficient evaluation protocol: we generate each question's full trajectory once, replay every stopping policy over the identical drafts, and cache every LLM-judge call, yielding a strictly paired efficiency-versus-quality comparison at low cost; we further separate operational tokens (charged to a policy) from evaluation tokens (a measurement instrument). Third, an empirical study on multi-hop retrieval-augmented question answering (HotpotQA). On the 60-question test split, a judge-free semantic stopper reduces operational tokens by 38% relative to max_iterations at parity quality (Delta-IS = -0.004, p = 0.81), whereas the full quality-gated variant is counter-productive because its per-round judging dominates cost. An oracle that selects the best round attains +0.115 Information Score over every practical policy (p ~ 4e-11), reframing the problem from "when to stop" (easy) to "which round is best" (open).

AI.tldr: 研究多智能体大语言模型循环中的语义早停机制，解决传统固定迭代上限的盲目性问题，通过监控连续草案嵌入的语义变化来判断是否应终止循环。
AI.motivation: 当前多智能体LLM循环（如Writer-Critic模式）几乎都使用固定迭代上限作为终止条件，这是一种语法层面的" kill-switch"，无法判断答案是否仍在改进，导致简单输入浪费token、困难输入被截断。
AI.method: 1) 理论层面：证明确定性终止和良好定义性，将距离序列收敛作为经验验证的猜想而非Banach压缩定理；2) 评估协议：生成每个问题的完整轨迹，重放每个停止策略并缓存LLM-judge调用，实现严格配对的效率-质量比较；3) 实验：在HotpotQA的60题测试集上评估两种语义停止器（judge-free和quality-gated）。
AI.result: 无judge的语义停止器相比max_iterations减少38%操作token，同时保持等价质量（Delta-IS=-0.004, p=0.81）；完整的质量门控变体因每轮判断成本过高而适得其反；Oracle选择最佳轮次可达+0.015信息分数（p~4e-11），将问题重新定义为"选择最佳轮次"而非"何时停止"。
AI.conclusion: 语义早停机制可显著降低token消耗且保持质量，为多智能体LLM循环提供更优的终止策略。未来研究应聚焦于如何选择最佳轮次而非判断停止时机。

relevance_reason: This paper is about early-stopping mechanisms in LLM multi-agent loops (optimizing token usage in language model iteration), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - LLM optimization vs 3D human motion generation from video. The pain points (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-to-3D domain gap) and methods (video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion models) have no connection to this work. This is a pure NLP/AI systems paper about LLM agent iteration efficiency.

title: Predicting Fruit Quality with a Hybrid Machine Learning and Image Processing Approach
summary: Fruit spoilage is a significant issue in agriculture, leading to substantial economic losses. Addressing this, our study introduces a hybrid approach combining image processing and deep learning to assess fruit freshness. We developed an image processing algorithm that quantifies spoilage on a scale from 0 (fully fresh) to 100 (fully rotten). Alongside, we trained a convolutional neural network (CNN) to perform binary classification (fresh or rotten) using a large dataset of fruit images. The outcomes of both methods were synthesized using logistic regression to enhance the accuracy of freshness predictions. Subsequently, this logistic regression model was utilized to enable the image processing algorithm to provide binary classification based on its percentage output, thus eliminating the need for the CNN in real-time applications. Our approach, which does not require high computational resources, achieved real-time performance and was validated with over 90% accuracy on a dataset comprising apples and oranges. The primary limitation lies in the requirement for fruits to be isolated on a background that must be either white or transparent, suggesting future improvements could include advanced segmentation models to automate background removal. This study's results highlight the potential of integrating simple image processing techniques with machine learning to provide practical solutions in the agricultural sector.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种结合图像处理和深度学习的水果新鲜度检测混合方法，通过图像处理算法量化腐坏程度（0-100分），结合CNN进行二分类，并利用逻辑回归融合两种方法的结果，实现实时检测，准确率超过90%。
AI.motivation: 水果腐败是农业领域的重要问题，导致重大经济损失。该研究旨在开发一种实用、低计算资源需求的水果新鲜度检测方案，为农业部门提供可行的解决方案。
AI.method: 研究开发了图像处理算法量化腐坏程度（0-100分），训练CNN进行二分类（新鲜/腐败），使用逻辑回归综合两种方法的结果，并利用CNN的结果使图像处理算法能够进行二分类。
AI.result: 该方法在苹果和橙子数据集上验证准确率超过90%，实现实时性能，且不需要高计算资源。局限性在于需要水果在白色或透明背景上隔离。
AI.conclusion: 简单图像处理技术与机器学习的集成可为农业部门提供实用解决方案。未来可引入先进分割模型实现自动背景去除以提升适用性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (extracting 3D human motion from video), while this paper is about fruit quality detection in agriculture. Although both use CNN and image processing, the application domains are entirely different - this paper addresses agricultural fruit freshness detection, not motion generation or computer graphics. The pain points and methods are unrelated to the motion generation domain.

title: Life After Benchmark Saturation: A Case Study of CORE-Bench
summary: When a benchmark's accuracy saturates, it is often retired and replaced with a more challenging version. We show that this approach privileges accuracy and misses the opportunity to study six other key dimensions of agent performance: construct validity issues such as shortcuts, out-of-distribution generalizability, efficiency, reliability, the relative importance of the model versus the scaffold, and uplift from human-agent collaboration. We use CORE-Bench Hard, a benchmark for computational reproducibility of scientific code, as a case study to demonstrate that measuring agents along these dimensions yields meaningful insights into agent performance even after accuracy saturates. First, we surface threats to construct validity in CORE-Bench Hard that are difficult to anticipate with less capable agents. We introduce an improved benchmark, CORE-Bench v1.1, and an out-of-distribution task suite, CORE-Bench OOD. Second, we find that despite accuracy saturation, CORE-Bench v1.1 remains useful for measuring efficiency, reliability, model performance, and scaffold performance. Finally, we conduct a small-scale randomized experiment to measure uplift from human-agent collaboration on real-world computational reproducibility tasks. We find a statistically significant speedup by about a factor of two -- likely underestimated due to one-fifth of human-only reproductions reaching the time limit before completing -- and describe various other findings. Together, our contributions present a more rigorous alternative to the dominant accuracy-centric evaluation paradigm.

AI.tldr: 当基准测试准确率饱和后，传统做法是退役该基准并替换为更难版本。本文提出这种做法过于单一，忽视了评估智能体性能的其它六个关键维度：构建效度问题、分布外泛化、效率、可靠性、模型与脚手架的相对重要性、以及人机协作的提升效果。作者以计算可复现性基准CORE-Bench Hard为案例，展示如何通过多维度评估获得有意义见解。
AI.motivation: 传统基准测试评估过度依赖准确率指标，当准确率饱和时基准被退役，导致大量有价值的评估信息丢失。作者认为应该从更多维度评估智能体性能，而不仅仅是准确率。
AI.method: 作者使用CORE-Bench Hard作为案例研究：（1）识别构建效度威胁并改进基准版本；（2）在准确率饱和后继续测量效率、可靠性、模型与脚手架性能；（3）开展小规模随机实验测量人机协作的提升效果。
AI.result: （1）发现了难以预见的构建效度问题，发布CORE-Bench v1.1和CORE-Bench OOD；（2）即使准确率饱和，基准仍可用于测量效率、可靠性、模型和脚手架性能；（3）人机协作带来约两倍的显著加速，但可能因五分之一的人类单独任务超时而低估了实际提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出了一种比单纯准确率评估更严格的替代方案，建议从多个维度全面评估智能体性能，以充分利用饱和基准的信息价值。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI agent evaluation methodology and benchmark saturation (CORE-Bench for computational reproducibility), which is entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It does not address any of the specified pain points (3D motion extraction from 2D, visual-to-motion domain gap, motion quality assessment) and uses completely different methods (no video generation, no motion models, no visual-guided feature extraction). The application domain is AI research/evaluation, not computer graphics or motion generation.

title: Geometry-Aware MCTS for Extremal Problems in Combinatorial Geometry
summary: We study certain extremal problems in combinatorial geometry that ask about configurations of points in an $n \times n$ grid that satisfy strict, global geometric constraints. Classical exact solvers suffer from combinatorial explosion for these types of problems, and standard reinforcement learning and transformer-based models struggle with the sparse reward "validity cliff" and quadratic token-consumption limits. To overcome these bottlenecks, we propose a Geometry-Aware Monte Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) framework. Our approach strictly enforces geometric constraints through incremental updates to the feasible action space. For constraints about collections of collinear points, like those that occur in the classic No-Three-in-Line problem (Max-N3IL), this mechanism reduces the constraint checking complexity from $O(n^3)$ to $O(n^2)$. To improve search efficiency, we exploit geometric symmetries in two ways: canonical pruning during node expansion to reduce the branching factor, and symmetric batch transitions to accelerate the discovery of promising configurations. We perform extensive experiments and establish new best-known computational results on five out of six of the problems that we considered. Notably, for Max-N3IL we find configurations of size roughly $1.8 n$ for grids of size $82 \le n \le 119$. For the Smallest Complete Set problem, we find configurations of size roughly $0.95 n$, providing new upper bounds within the tested grids. This work establishes Geometry-Aware MCTS as a highly adaptable framework for discovering novel configurations in combinatorial geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种几何感知的蒙特卡洛树搜索框架(GMCTS)来解决组合几何中的极值问题,如No-Three-in-Line和最小完备集问题。该方法通过增量更新可行动作空间来强制执行几何约束,并利用几何对称性进行规范剪枝和对称批处理转换。实验在6个问题中取得5个新的最佳结果。
AI.motivation: 传统精确求解器面临组合爆炸,强化学习和基于Transformer的模型存在稀疏奖励"有效性悬崖"和二次Token消耗限制。这些瓶颈严重阻碍了大规模n×n网格上组合几何问题的求解。
AI.method: 提出几何感知MCTS框架:1)通过增量更新可行动作空间强制执行几何约束,将共线点约束检查复杂度从O(n³)降至O(n²);2)利用几何对称性进行规范剪枝以降低分支因子;3)使用对称批处理转换加速发现优质配置。
AI.result: 在6个测试问题中5个取得新最佳结果。Max-N3IL问题:在82≤n≤119的网格上找到大小约1.8n的配置。最小完备集问题:找到大小约0.95n的配置,提供新的上界。
AI.conclusion: 几何感知MCTS是一个高度适应性的组合几何新配置发现框架,成功解决了传统方法面临的组合爆炸和稀疏奖励问题,为组合几何领域提供了新的计算工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about combinatorial geometry puzzle solving (e.g., No-Three-in-Line, minimum covering sets on grids) using Monte Carlo Tree Search. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, video-to-3D motion extraction, or any of the visual/motion generation methods mentioned in the research profile. The application domain is completely different - this is discrete mathematics/optimization, not graphics or motion synthesis.

title: LCG: Long-Context Consistent Image Generation with Sparse Relational Attention
summary: Recent image generation models achieve impressive quality in single-image synthesis, but often fail to maintain consistency across sequential outputs, as required in comics, storyboards, and visual narratives. We propose Long-Context Generation (LCG), a framework for long-context multi-image text-to-image generation, to improve consistency and scalability in long-context multi-image generation. LCG employs the Sparse Relational Attention (SRA) mechanism to selectively attend to core features across extended visual contexts, ensuring that the propagation of semantic and layout information remains computationally tractable. To enforce semantic alignment, we introduce the Routing Consistency Constraint (RCC), which leverages identity-aware masks to align structural patterns across generation branches, effectively mitigating drift in appearance even in complex multi-character scenes. To support training and evaluation in this setting, we construct the Long-Context Consistency Dataset (LCCD), a large-scale synthetic dataset comprising character-centric multi-image sequences spanning varied situational contexts. LCCD contains 600K training sequences and a separate 1K test set, with each sequence containing 6 to 20 images. The experiments demonstrate that LCG outperforms the compared baselines in prompt alignment and character consistency for long-context image generation, including multi-character scenes.

AI.tldr: Long-Context Generation (LCG)是一个用于长上下文多图像文本到图像生成的框架，旨在解决现有图像生成模型在顺序输出时无法保持一致性的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有图像生成模型在单图像合成方面取得了令人印象深刻的质量，但往往无法在顺序输出（如漫画、故事板和视觉叙事）中保持一致性。
AI.method: LCG采用稀疏关系注意力(SRA)机制选择性地关注跨扩展视觉上下文的核特征，确保语义和布局信息的传播在计算上可控。为加强语义对齐，引入路由一致性约束(RCC)，利用身份感知掩码对齐跨生成分支的结构模式，有效缓解复杂多角色场景中的外观漂移。
AI.result: 实验表明，LCG在长上下文图像生成的提示对齐和角色一致性方面优于对比基线，包括多角色场景。
AI.conclusion: LCG框架通过SRA和RCC机制有效提升了长上下文多图像生成的一致性和可扩展性，为漫画、故事板等应用提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The paper is about TEXT-TO-IMAGE generation (2D image generation for comics/storyboards) while the research profile is about TEXT-TO-MOTION generation (3D human motion generation). Although both may use diffusion models, they target completely different domains: 2D image synthesis vs 3D motion synthesis. The "consistency" problem addressed in the paper is about character appearance consistency across images, not motion quality or consistency. This is a fundamental field mismatch - image generation ≠ motion generation in computer graphics.

title: Refusal Lives Downstream of Persona in Chat Models
comment: Accepted to the ICML 2026 Mechanistic Interpretability workshop
summary: Linear directions in activation space have been identified for both refusal and persona traits in instruction-tuned chat models, but the two have been studied as separate mechanisms. We show they interact: a compliant persona gates refusal. In Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct and Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct, we extract a compliant model-persona direction and a refusal direction and intervene on both. Compliant persona steering suppresses refusal -- in Llama, the refusal rate falls from 97% to 2%. Reintroducing the refusal direction partially restores refusal at late layers but not at early ones. Projecting out the persona direction in a late-layer window restores it to baseline; projecting out a random direction does not. Refusal is therefore gated at the late-layer expression stage, downstream of where it is computed. Treating refusal as a single isolated direction misses its dependence on persona.

AI.tldr: 该论文发现指令微调聊天模型中拒绝方向和角色方向存在相互作用，顺从的角色会"门控"拒绝行为。通过在Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct和Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct上的干预实验，证明消除角色方向可恢复拒绝能力，表明拒绝是一个依赖于角色的门控机制，而非独立的单一方向。
AI.motivation: 之前研究将拒绝和角色traits作为独立机制分别研究，未探索它们之间的相互作用。该论文旨在揭示这两个方向是否存在依赖关系。
AI.method: 提取顺从模型-角色方向和拒绝方向，在两个模型上进行双向干预实验：使用角色方向抑制拒绝，以及在晚层重新引入拒绝方向或消除角色方向来观察效果。
AI.result: 顺从角色方向 steering 显著抑制拒绝——Llama模型中拒绝率从97%降至2%。在晚层重新引入拒绝方向部分恢复拒绝能力，但仅在晚层有效。投影消除角色方向可恢复拒绝至基线水平，而随机方向投影无效。
AI.conclusion: 拒绝行为在晚层表达阶段被门控，位于计算下游。将拒绝视为单一孤立方向忽略了对角色的依赖性，需要将拒绝理解为受角色控制的门控机制。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM alignment and refusal behavior in chat models (NLP/AI safety), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (3D human motion synthesis). The application domains are entirely different - this has nothing to do with video generation, motion generation, visual guidance, or any computer graphics task.

title: Self-Supervised Tree-level Biomass Estimation in Urban Environments From Airborne LiDAR and Optical Observations
summary: Urban tree biomass remains less spatially explicitly quantified than biomass in managed forests because many estimates rely on inventories or coarse products that cannot resolve individual crowns or fine-scale heterogeneity. We present a crown-level above-ground biomass (AGB) framework for an 810~km$^2$ landscape in Ontario, Canada, using leaf-off airborne LiDAR (8--10~pulses~m$^{-2}$) and near-infrared RGB orthophotography (0.16--0.20~m) from 2018 and 2023. A dual-stream cross-attention network trained on rule-based pseudo-labels produced semantic marks for buildings, needleleaf trees, and deciduous trees, supporting crown delineation and functional-type assignment. On independently annotated withheld tiles, global/mean precision, recall, and Dice scores were 0.86, 0.83, and 0.84. Crowns were delineated with multiscale watershed segmentation in mapped tree areas, and AGB was estimated from a crown area--height power-law proxy calibrated to species-specific allometry (Lambert et al., 2005) for 21,921 inventory trees. For 18,713 inventory--segment matched pairs from a 90,726-tree held-out test set, AGB prediction achieved $R^2=0.609$ using inventory crown geometry and $R^2=0.570$ under operational segmentation, identifying crown delineation as the remaining uncertainty source. Aggregated to 30~m, estimates yielded total AGB stocks of 1.73~Tg in 2018 and 1.81~Tg in 2023 (811--850~Gg~C), local densities up to ${\sim}140$~Mg~ha$^{-1}$ along the Niagara Escarpment, and a net carbon gain of 39~Gg~C over five years. Deep-ensemble uncertainty maps highlighted high-epistemic-uncertainty areas linked to underrepresented land covers and guided assignment of uncertain crowns to a pooled allometric equation. The framework uses standard provincial data, requires no manual annotation, and produces a public bitemporal crown-level AGB database for trees outside forests at management-relevant resolution.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一个基于机载激光雷达和近红外RGB正射影像的城市树木地上生物量(AGB)冠层级估算框架，应用于加拿大安大略省810 km²景观区。通过双流交叉注意力网络进行语义分割，结合多尺度分水岭分割进行冠层描绘，并利用与物种特异性异速生长方程校准的功率律模型估算AGB。
AI.motivation: 城市树木生物量在空间上缺乏精细量化，传统方法依赖森林清单或粗分辨率产品，无法解析单个树冠或精细尺度异质性。需要一种无需人工标注、可在管理相关分辨率下量化非森林城市树木AGB的方法。
AI.method: 使用2018和2023年的叶季机载LiDAR(8-10脉冲/m²)和近红外RGB正射影像(0.16-0.20 m)。采用基于规则伪标签训练的双流交叉注意力网络进行建筑、针叶树和落叶树的语义分割；使用多尺度分水岭分割进行冠层描绘；利用与Lambert等(2005)物种特异性异速生长方程校准的冠幅-高度幂律模型估算AGB。
AI.result: 在独立验证集上，全球/平均精确率、召回率和Dice分数分别为0.86、0.83和0.84。18,713个匹配对的AGB预测R²=0.609(使用清单树冠几何)和R²=0.570(使用作业分割)。聚合至30 m后，2018年总AGB为1.73 Tg，2023年为1.81 Tg(811-850 Gg C)，局部密度可达~140 Mg/ha，5年净碳增益为39 Gg C。深度集成不确定性图识别出高认知不确定性区域。
AI.conclusion: 该框架使用标准省级数据，无需人工标注，可生成公开的双时相冠层级AGB数据库，分辨率与管理相关。为城市树木碳储量估算提供了可复制的方法论，但冠层描绘仍是主要不确定性来源。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about remote sensing/forestry - using airborne LiDAR and optical imagery to estimate tree biomass in urban environments. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating human motion from video/text). While both may use semantic segmentation, the application domains are entirely unrelated - this is forestry/environmental science vs computer graphics/motion synthesis.

title: AlgoEvolve: LLM-driven Meta-evolution of Algorithmic Trading Programs
summary: Recent work shows that Large Language Models (LLMs) can act as semantic mutation operators for the evolutionary discovery of programs and proofs. Most current applications focus on static coding benchmarks. We extend this paradigm to algorithmic trading. This domain is uniquely challenging because it is noisy, non-stationary, and highly discontinuous. We present AlgoEvolve, an LLM-driven evolutionary framework that generates, evaluates, and iteratively improves executable trading strategies. These strategies are expressed as Python code and evaluated through a rigorous testing protocol. Across multiple experiments, the system exhibits emergent regime-adaptive strategy logic, including autonomous shifts in trading rules. We further introduce a meta-evolutionary outer loop that evolves the prompts guiding program synthesis in the inner loop. This outer loop discovers improved search heuristics. These heuristics balance exploration and exploitation while reducing zero-trade failures. They consistently outperform initial human-designed instructions. The results demonstrate that LLM-based semantic evolution provides a viable approach for continual program synthesis in complex environments.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AlgoEvolve框架，利用LLM作为语义变异算子，通过进化算法自动生成和优化Python代码形式的算法交易策略。
AI.motivation: 算法交易领域具有噪声大、非平稳性、高度不连续性的特点，传统方法难以应对，需要一种能够自适应演化的新范式。
AI.method: 提出双层进化框架：内层循环使用LLM生成交易策略代码并通过严格测试协议评估；外层循环进化指导提示词以发现更好的搜索启发式方法。
AI.result: 系统展现出自适应策略逻辑，包括交易规则的自适应转变；外层循环发现的启发式方法在平衡探索与开发、减少零交易失败方面 consistently优于人工设计的初始指令。
AI.conclusion: LLM驱动的语义进化为复杂环境中的持续程序合成提供了一种可行的新方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about algorithmic trading using LLM-driven evolutionary algorithms to generate Python trading strategies. The application domain is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It has no connection to video generation, 3D motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, or any computer graphics domain. This is a financial technology paper about stock trading, which is an entirely different field.

title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
summary: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，用于激光穿透焊接中熔透状态、熔深和焊缝形貌的预测与重建。模型结合卷积神经网络和状态空间模型，从焊缝池图像中提取时空特征。
AI.motivation: 激光穿透焊接中，准确评估熔透状态和焊缝形貌对保证焊接质量至关重要。传统方法难以实现实时、高精度的检测，因此需要一种新的智能检测方法。
AI.method: 提出基于CNN和状态空间模型的多任务深度学习框架，融合焊缝池图像的时空特征与焊接参数。采用CMOS相机采集焊接过程中的焊缝池图像，并构建了增强模型鲁棒性和泛化能力的数据集。
AI.result: 测试集验证结果：熔透状态预测准确率达99.35%，熔深预测误差为1.79毫米，焊缝横截面重建准确率为95.65%。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为激光穿透焊接系统的原位质量控制提供了新的方法论和技术路径，具有重要的工程应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about laser welding quality control (industrial manufacturing), not Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. While it uses CNN and spatiotemporal deep learning, the application domain is completely different - welding inspection vs. motion generation. The pain points are unrelated: this addresses weld pool morphology prediction, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video or bridging visual-to-motion domain gaps. The paper has no relevance to the research profile's goals of generating human motion from visual inputs.

title: Beyond Single-Source Cognitive Taskonomy:Multi-Source Task Relations through fMRI Transfer Learning
summary: Cognitive tasks are organized by shared and specialized neural processes. Masked fMRI reconstruction provides a common self-supervised objective for quantifying transfer relations among task states, but existing reconstruction-based taskonomies mainly study one-to-one transfer from a single source task to a target. Here, we extend an fMRI cognitive taskonomy from single-source to multi-source transfer across 23 Human Connectome Project task states and use Boolean Integer Programming (BIP) to analyze budget-constrained task allocation. We train 1,127 task-specific and transfer models. Single-source transfer is directional and paradigm structured: motor states transfer well within the motor paradigm but provide limited support to most non-motor targets, consistent with a shared sensorimotor execution system and effector-specific representations. Multi-source transfer depends on the composition of the source set, suggesting that many-to-one task relations are not fully captured by pairwise taskonomy alone. Across supervision budgets, BIP repeatedly allocates direct supervision to several 0-back and 2-back working-memory states, although these states are not consistently the strongest individual sources. This pattern may reflect the integration of perceptual, attentional, and executive processes in working-memory tasks. Together, these findings reveal a cross-paradigm-limited motor cluster and working-memory states with high priority under the specified global allocation objective. Our study extends reconstruction-based fMRI taskonomy from one-to-one transfer to many-to-one task relations and budget-constrained task dependencies.

AI.tldr: 研究将fMRI认知任务onomy从单源迁移扩展到多源迁移，使用布尔整数规划(BIP)分析23个HCP任务状态在预算约束下的任务分配。发现运动状态在运动范式内迁移良好但对非运动目标支持有限，而工作记忆状态(0-back和2-back)在不同预算下获得优先分配。
AI.motivation: 现有重建-based任务onomy主要研究一对一迁移，但认知任务由共享和专门的神经过程组织，需要分析多源迁移和预算约束下的任务依赖关系。
AI.method: 使用掩码fMRI重建作为自监督目标，训练1127个任务特异性和迁移模型，采用布尔整数规划(BIP)分析预算约束下的任务分配，研究23个HCP任务状态。
AI.result: 单源迁移是方向性和范式结构的：运动状态在运动范式内迁移良好但对非运动目标支持有限。多源迁移取决于源集组成。预算约束下BIP反复分配直接监督到0-back和2-back工作记忆状态。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了跨范式限制的运动簇和工作记忆状态在高优先级的全局分配目标下的重要性。将重建-based fMRI任务onomy从一对一迁移扩展到多对一关系和预算约束依赖。

relevance_reason: This paper is entirely in the neuroscience/neuroimaging domain (fMRI analysis using Boolean Integer Programming for cognitive taskonomy), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The "motion" mentioned refers to motor paradigms in brain imaging (e.g., finger tapping), NOT 3D human body motion generation for graphics. There is no application domain match - this is biomedical computing research, completely unrelated to video-guided 3D motion synthesis, visual feature extraction, or motion generation pipelines needed for computer graphics.

title: Knowledge-augmented Agentic AI for Mental Health Medication Information Seeking
summary: Patients increasingly seek medication information online, yet safety knowledge for psychiatric drugs is split between regulatory adverse-event records, which are authoritative but abstract, and patient narratives, which are experience-near but unvalidated. Integrating them without conflating evidence and anecdote is especially consequential in psychiatry, where poorly contextualised information can amplify fear, nocebo responses, and non-adherence. Here we develop a provenance-aware, knowledge-graph-based multi-agent framework unifying 466,525 Reddit posts, 60,782 WebMD reviews, and twenty years of U.S. FDA Adverse Event Reporting System records for nine antidepressants. A large-language-model entity-recognition pipeline benchmarked against physician annotations reached highest F1 scores of 0.969 for medications and 0.973 for conditions. The two community platforms were far more concordant with each other (overlap up to a Jaccard similarity of 0.905) than with regulatory reports, indicating that patient-generated data form a partly independent safety signal. For sertraline, many adverse events appeared in community sources hundreds of days before the corresponding FDA date. A Neo4j knowledge graph grounded in ATC-N, ICD-10, and MedDRA vocabularies preserves provenance, keeping every claim traceable and regulatory facts distinct from patient experience. These results establish source-aware integration as a route to more auditable psychiatric medication information, with usefulness and patient benefit to be tested prospectively.

AI.tldr: 研究开发了一种基于知识图谱的多智能体框架，整合Reddit帖子（466,525条）、WebMD评论（60,782条）和20年FDA不良事件报告，用于九种抗抑郁药。框架可识别药物和症状，F1分数分别达0.969和0.973，发现社区平台间的一致性高于与监管报告的一致性，且部分不良事件在社区中出现早于FDA报告数百天。
AI.motivation: 精神类药物信息分散在权威但抽象的监管不良事件记录与贴近体验但未验证的患者叙事中，整合这些来源而不混淆证据与轶事至关重要，因为信息缺乏上下文会加剧恐惧、安慰剂效应和非依从性。
AI.method: 开发了基于知识图谱的多智能体框架，整合466,525条Reddit帖子、60,782条WebMD评论及20年FDA不良事件报告，针对九种抗抑郁药。采用大语言模型实体识别管道，以医生标注为基准评估。使用Neo4j知识图谱，以ATC-N、ICD-10和MedDRA词汇表为基础，保留溯源性。
AI.result: 药物识别F1分数最高0.969，症状识别0.973。社区平台间一致性更高（Jaccard相似度达0.905），与监管报告差异较大。对于舍曲林，许多不良事件在社区中出现的时间比FDA报告早数百天。
AI.conclusion: 建立来源感知的整合是实现更可审计的精神类药物信息的途径，有用性和患者获益有待前瞻性验证。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely unrelated to the research profile. It focuses on healthcare/medical informatics - specifically using knowledge graphs and multi-agent AI to extract medication and symptom information from Reddit, WebMD, and FDA reports for mental health drugs. The application domain is medical information seeking, not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. The methods (knowledge graphs, LLMs for entity recognition) have no connection to video generation models, 3D motion generation, or visual-guided feature extraction. This is a 0-20 score - completely irrelevant as it's an entirely different field.

title: GeMoE: Gating Entropy is All You Need for Uncertainty-aware Adaptive Routing in MoE-based Large Vision-Language Models
summary: With the increase in model parameters and training data, the instruction following and generalization capabilities of Large VisionLanguage Models (LVLMs) have been significantly improved. Based on the Mixture of Experts (MoE) architecture, LVLMs expand their parameter capacity while maintaining the inference cost. However, traditional MoE methods employ a Top-k static routing strategy, which fails to account for variations in the input and adaptively select the number of experts, resulting in suboptimal resource utilization. In this paper, we propose viewing token routing as an information encoding task, framing dynamic routing as a Minimum Description Length (MDL) problem in encoding By validating the connection between MDL and gating entropy in the MoE scenario, we introduce Gating Entropy-based Uncertainty-aware Adaptive Routing (GeMoE) for MoE. Unlike traditional static or heuristic-based dynamic routing methods, GeMoE explicitly models the trade-off between model complexity and performance. By using gating entropy to assess the complexity of tokens, GeMoE adaptively determines the number of experts each token should engage. On a wide range of backbones and benchmarks, our method achieves 99.5% average performance retention compared to the original static routing, while improving average expert activation sparsity by 36.5%.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GeMoE（基于门控熵的不确定性自适应路由）方法，将token路由视为信息编码任务，通过MDL框架动态确定每个token应该激活的专家数量，在保持99.5%性能的同时提升了36.5%的专家激活稀疏性。
AI.motivation: 传统MoE使用Top-k静态路由策略，无法根据输入变化自适应选择专家数量，导致资源利用不足。作者认为可以将token路由问题重新建模为最小描述长度（MDL）问题，从而在模型复杂度和性能之间取得更好的平衡。
AI.method:
1. 将token路由重新定义为信息编码任务
2. 建立MDL与门控熵之间的联系
3. 使用门控熵评估token的复杂度
4. 基于复杂度自适应确定每个token激活的专家数量
5. 在多种backbone和benchmark上验证
AI.result:
在多种backbone和基准测试集上，GeMoE方法实现了：
- 99.5%的平均性能保留（相比原始静态路由）
- 36.5%的平均专家激活稀疏性提升
AI.conclusion: GeMoE通过将动态路由问题形式化为MDL问题，能够自适应地为不同复杂度的token分配合适的专家资源，在显著提高稀疏性的同时几乎保持了原有的模型性能，为MoE架构的效率优化提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: The paper is about MoE routing efficiency in Vision-Language Models, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both fields involve "vision," the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on model architecture optimization (efficient token routing in VLMs), whereas the research profile is about generating 3D human motion from video/text inputs, visual-to-3D motion domain bridging, and motion quality assessment. The methods are also different - this paper deals with MoE gating mechanisms, not video generation or motion generation models. This is a foundational ML/VLM paper with no direct relevance to the motion generation domain.

title: Accelerating Skill Assessment in Chess: A Drift-Diffusion-Enhanced Elo Rating System
comment: Accepted at the IEEE Conference on Games (IEEE CoG) 2026
summary: Rating systems such as Elo serve as the gold standard for matchmaking in competitive chess. However, they inherently suffer from response lag due to their exclusive reliance on match outcomes, neglecting the granular quality of gameplay. Nevertheless, incorporating move-by-move information into rating adjustments presents a significant challenge given the substantial noise and the vastness of the game-state space. To address this, we propose the Drift-Diffusion-Enhanced Elo Rating System (DD-Elo), a novel skill assessment framework inspired by the drift diffusion model (DDM) from cognitive neuroscience. By modeling skill expression as a decision-making process, our model integrates move-level data to capture rapid skill fluctuations. We provide a rigorous mathematical derivation proving that DD-Elo maintains a bounded deviation from the traditional Elo system, ensuring theoretical alignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DD-Elo adapts to skill changes faster than Elo. Our findings suggest that DD-Elo offers an explainable, highly responsive, and backward-compatible solution for chess rating ecosystems. The implementation code is publicly available at https://github.com/Aquila-zhou1/DD-Elo .

AI.tldr: 论文提出DD-Elo系统，将认知神经科学中的漂移扩散模型(DDM)应用于国际象棋评级，融合move级别数据来捕捉快速技能波动。
AI.motivation: 传统Elo系统仅依赖比赛结果，忽视游戏质量细微差别，且对技能变化响应滞后。
AI.method: 将技能表达建模为决策过程，整合move级别数据，建立DD-Elo数学框架并证明与Elo系统的有界偏差。
AI.result: DD-Elo比传统Elo更快适应技能变化，实验验证了系统的高响应性和理论对齐。
AI.conclusion: DD-Elo提供可解释、高响应、向后兼容的象棋评级解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about chess rating systems using cognitive science drift-diffusion models, not computer graphics or motion generation. Despite containing the word "diffusion," it refers to decision-making dynamics in cognitive psychology, not generative diffusion models used in computer graphics. The application domain (chess skill assessment) has no relation to text-to-motion generation, video-to-3D motion extraction, or any of the research profile's pain points.

title: Beyond Aesthetics: Quantifying Information Loss in Turbid Scenes
summary: Visibility in underwater environments degrades rapidly under turbid conditions, yet the effects on computer-vision models remain unclear. This issue is compounded by reliance on synthetic turbidity datasets, which may misrepresent real-world information loss. To address this gap, we introduce the Turbid Underwater Baseline (TUB) dataset, comprising 1,320 images captured under extreme turbidity and over 16,000 high-confidence ground-truth segmentation masks. We additionally propose PCD, a metric derived from phase congruency maps that is invariant to contrast and aims to capture the loss of structural information in real turbidity. We show that PCD correlates strongly with the performance of instance segmentation models on both real and synthetic turbid images, whereas common metrics in the field show weak to no correlation at all. The dataset and relevant code can be found on the project page: https://vap.aau.dk/pcd

AI.tldr: 解决水下浑浊环境下计算机视觉模型性能评估的数据集和指标缺失问题，构建了TUB数据集并提出基于相位一致性的PCD指标。
AI.motivation: 水下浑浊环境会快速降低能见度，但现有研究依赖合成数据集，可能无法真实反映信息损失对视觉模型的影响。
AI.method: 构建包含1320张极端浑浊图像和16000多个高置信度分割掩膜的TUB数据集；提出基于相位 congruency maps的PCD指标，该指标对对比度不变，旨在捕捉结构信息损失。
AI.result: PCD与实例分割模型在真实和合成浑浊图像上的性能高度相关，而该领域的常用指标则呈现弱相关或无相关。
AI.conclusion: PCD指标能有效衡量水下浑浊对视觉模型性能的影响，为相关研究提供了实用的评估工具。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (human motion synthesis from visual/text inputs), while this paper is about underwater computer vision and image quality assessment in turbid scenes. The pain points, methods, and goals are entirely unrelated - this paper deals with information loss in murky water for segmentation tasks, not motion generation or visual-to-3D motion synthesis.

title: Governing Actions, Not Agents: Institutional Attestation as a Governance Model for Autonomous AI Systems
summary: Autonomous AI agents may begin to perform consequential, irreversible actions such as clinical prescribing and production software deployment. This paper observes that human institutions have governed powerful autonomous actors not by monitoring their reasoning but by requiring independently attested evidence at the point of consequential action. We formalise this institutional pattern as a computational governance model for AI agent systems. Under the proposed model, an agent retains full autonomy over planning and reasoning but holds no execution authority over designated high-risk actions. Execution is conditional on preconditions that are each independently attested by a separate authoritative source, cryptographically bound to a declared intent, and evaluated by a deterministic policy. Decisions are recorded in a tamper-evident log amenable to independent re-verification. We present a proof-of-concept implementation and illustrate the model with examples from software deployment and clinical prescribing.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种计算治理模型，用于规范AI智能体执行临床处方和软件部署等高风险、不可逆行为。该模型的核心思想是：智能体保留规划和推理的自主权，但将高风险行为的执行权交给独立的权威来源进行验证。
AI.motivation: 当前AI智能体可能执行不可逆的高风险行为，人类社会通过要求在关键行动点提供独立验证证据来治理强大的自主行为者，而非监控其推理过程。这一制度模式启发了本文的计算治理模型设计。
AI.method: 形式化建模：智能体保留规划和推理的完全自主权，但对指定的高风险行为没有执行权。执行需要满足的前提条件由独立的权威来源逐一独立证明，与声明的意图加密绑定，由确定性策略评估，决策记录在防篡改日志中供独立重新验证。
AI.result: 提出了概念验证实现，并用软件部署和临床处方两个场景进行了说明。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为AI智能体的治理提供了新的技术方案，通过引入独立的验证机制和防篡改日志，既保证了智能体的自主性，又确保了高风险行为的可控性和可审计性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI governance and institutional attestation for regulating autonomous AI agents in high-risk scenarios (clinical prescriptions, software deployment). It has NO connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different: AI safety/governance vs. motion/video generation. The methods discussed (formal verification, attestation mechanisms) are unrelated to video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, or 3D motion generation. This is a fundamental field mismatch - the paper doesn't address any of the pain points related to extracting 3D motion from 2D video, ensuring motion quality, or bridging visual-to-3D domain gaps.

title: Layer-Specific Prompt Fusion Discovery via Differentiable Search in Vision Foundation Models
summary: Visual prompt tuning has emerged as a parameter-efficient fine-tuning approach for adapting large-scale Vision Transformers (ViTs) to downstream tasks. As its learnable prompts are applied in input and feature spaces, prior to jointly going through attention in transformer layers, the most commonly used scheme for fusing image and prompt tokens is concatenation or addition. In this paper, we aim to study a fundamental yet essential problem in visual prompt tuning: whether a single fusion scheme tends to yield better results, and whether that would be beneficial to develop a hybrid fusion scheme. To this end, we formulate the task as a bi-level optimization problem, and solve it leveraging differentiable architecture search. In this context, the learnable prompts and their fusion schemes are jointly optimized. To enrich the search space in the architecture search, we propose two additional fusion schemes, namely, affine transformation and cross-attention, in addition to concatenation and addition. Extensive experiments on 34 datasets spanning VTAB-1k, FGVC, and HTA show consistent gains over prompt-tuning baselines. With a frozen ViT backbone, our method delivers a favorable accuracy--latency--parameter trade-off compared with VPT-Deep and recent variants. Our findings reveal that how prompts fuse with image tokens plays a significant role in visual prompt tuning, and a hybrid fusion fashion can more effectively leverage layer semantics of ViTs, contributing a novel perspective for visual prompt-tuning research.

AI.tldr: 本文研究视觉提示调优中图像令牌与提示令牌的融合方式，提出结合仿射变换和交叉注意力的混合融合方案，通过可微分架构搜索联合优化提示和融合策略，在34个数据集上取得优于基线的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉提示调优方法通常简单使用拼接或加法融合图像和提示令牌，缺乏对融合方案的深入研究和比较，因此需要探索更优的融合方案。
AI.method: 将任务建模为双层优化问题，利用可微分架构搜索联合学习提示和融合方案，搜索空间中除拼接和加法外，新增仿射变换和交叉注意力两种融合方案。
AI.result: 在VTAB-1k、FGVC和HTA的34个数据集上，方法一致优于提示调优基线，且在冻结骨干网络条件下，实现了更好的准确率-延迟-参数权衡。
AI.conclusion: 提示与图像令牌的融合方式对视觉提示调优有重要影响，混合融合方案能更有效利用ViT的层语义，为视觉提示调优研究提供新视角。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual prompt tuning for IMAGE CLASSIFICATION (VTAB-1k, FGVC, HTA datasets), which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both involve vision models, the paper focuses on fusion mechanisms between image and prompt tokens for adapting vision foundation models to image classification tasks - not to motion generation or video-to-3D motion extraction. The pain points, methods, and application domain are entirely different from the research profile which deals with extracting 3D motion from 2D video and generating human motion.

title: COrigami: An AI Pipeline for Co-Designing Flat-Foldable Visually Recognisable Origami
summary: While generative AI has achieved remarkable success in solving problems with verifiable solutions, generating physical art that satisfies both strict geometric constraints and subjective visual aesthetics remains a challenge. This paper presents an approach to tackle these difficulties in the domain of computational origami, a mathematically rigid environment that grounds artistic design within the equations of flat foldability. We present COrigami, an end-to-end AI-driven pipeline that assists the design cycle by generating crease patterns from natural language. Our pipeline involves generating a semantic stick figure, computing a base packing, solving for a flat-foldable crease pattern, shaping the flat-folded crease pattern, and refining the generated model using reinforcement learning driven by an autonomous aesthetic evaluation loop. Our system acts as a highly effective collaborative assistant, generating structural starting points that human artists can further expand and shape. By integrating algorithmic optimisation with autonomous aesthetic critique, this work demonstrates how AI systems can satisfy multi-objective physical constraints to enable reliable, mathematically grounded co-creativity.

AI.tldr: COrigami是一个端到端的AI驱动管道，利用自然语言生成折纸 crease patterns。它将生成式AI应用于计算折纸领域，在数学严格的环境中生成满足几何约束和视觉美学的物理艺术作品。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI在解决可验证解决方案问题上取得成功，但生成同时满足严格几何约束和主观视觉美学的物理艺术仍面临挑战。计算折纸提供了一个数学rigid环境，将艺术设计建立在平面可折叠性方程中。
AI.method: 管道包括5个阶段：1)从自然语言生成语义棒图；2)计算基础折叠；3)求解平面可折叠的折痕图案；4)塑造平面折叠的折痕图案；5)使用基于自主美学评估循环的强化学习细化模型。
AI.result: 系统作为高效的协作助手，生成人类艺术家可进一步扩展和塑造的结构起点。通过集成算法优化与自主美学批评，展示了AI系统如何满足多目标物理约束，实现数学基础的协作创作。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了AI可以与人类艺术家协作，在满足多目标物理约束的同时实现可靠的、数学基础的共同创作，为AI辅助物理艺术设计开辟了新途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational origami design generation (static geometric crease patterns), not text-to-motion generation. While both are in Computer Graphics, they address completely different application domains: origami pattern generation creates static physical structures, whereas the research profile needs 3D motion generation from video/visual inputs. The pain points are unrelated - this paper addresses geometric constraints and visual aesthetics for origami, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors or ensuring motion quality/consistency. The method pipeline is conceptually similar (two-stage) but operates on fundamentally different inputs/outputs (text-to-diagram vs video-to-motion).

title: What Do Deepfake Benchmarks Measure? An Audit Using Frozen Self-Supervised Representations
summary: As deepfake generators approach perceptual indistinguishability, reliable detection becomes critical. Yet, detectors that score well on benchmarks routinely fail in the wild. A concerning feedback loop has emerged: benchmarks drive increasingly complex, engineered detectors, yet if those benchmarks do not reflect real-world deepfakes, this complexity may be solving the wrong problem entirely. This raises a prior question: what are these benchmarks actually measuring? We conduct an audit of video, image, and audio deepfake benchmarks using a deliberately simple diagnostic. If a linear probe on frozen, general-purpose self-supervised representations can approximate the performance of a bespoke detector, the benchmark is largely rewarding general modality understanding rather than forensic understanding. This has two implications: the benchmark may not reflect realistic threat models, and it raises the question of whether the bespoke detectors the probe approaches are truly learning forensic understanding. We observe, across three modalities, linear probes on general-purpose self-supervised representations closely approach the performance of bespoke detectors. We further show that generator-level difficulty is partly explained by Frechet geometry in the same representation space. Together, these results support a benchmark-audit view of deepfake detection: before high scores are read as evidence of forensic understanding, it is worth asking how much of the benchmark is already solved by general-purpose representations.

AI.tldr: 本研究对视频、图像和音频深伪检测基准进行审计，发现使用简单线性探针在通用自监督表示上的性能即可接近复杂定制检测器，表明现有基准可能主要奖励的是通用模态理解而非真正的取证理解。
AI.motivation: 深伪生成器日益接近感知不可区分性，但基准上表现良好的检测器在实际应用中却频繁失败。这种反馈循环令人担忧：基准推动越来越复杂的工程检测器，但这些基准可能并未反映真实世界的深伪，因此复杂性可能在解决错误的问题。研究旨在探讨这些基准实际测量的是什么。
AI.method: 采用一种简单的诊断方法：对冻结的通用自监督表示使用线性探针。如果这种线性探针能近似定制检测器的性能，则表明基准主要奖励的是通用模态理解而非取证理解。同时使用Fréchet几何来解释生成器级别的难度。
AI.result: 在视频、图像和音频三种模态中，通用自监督表示上的线性探针性能与定制检测器高度接近。生成器级别的难度部分可由同一表示空间中的Fréchet几何解释。
AI.conclusion: 在将高分数视为取证理解的证据之前，值得先问基准在多大程度上已被通用表示所解决。基准可能未反映现实威胁模型，定制检测器可能并未真正学习取证理解。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about deepfake detection (multimedia forensics), not text-to-motion generation or computer graphics. The application domains are entirely different, despite both involving video analysis.

title: The Verification Horizon: No Silver Bullet for Coding Agent Rewards
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their first names
summary: A classical intuition holds that verifying a solution is easier than producing one. For today's coding agents, this intuition is being inverted: as foundation models develop stronger reasoning capabilities and engineering harnesses grow more sophisticated, generating complex candidate solutions is no longer difficult -- reliably verifying them has become the harder problem. Every verifier we can build is only a proxy for human intent, never the intent itself. This makes verification subject to a twofold difficulty: first, intent is underspecified by nature, making it inherently hard to faithfully check whether it has been fulfilled; second, during model training, optimization widens the gap between proxy and intent -- manifesting as reward hacking or signal saturation. To address this, we characterize the quality of verification signals along three dimensions -- scalability, faithfulness, and robustness -- and argue that achieving all three simultaneously is the central challenge. We further study four reward constructions: a test verifier for general coding tasks, a rubric verifier for frontend tasks, the user as verifier for real-world agent tasks, and an automated agent verifier for long-horizon tasks. Across different task types and policy capability levels, we conduct in-depth analysis and experiments on the core challenges of reward design and how to more effectively leverage reward signals. Experiments show that targeted verification design can effectively suppress reward hacking, improve task completion quality, and achieve significant gains across multiple internal and public benchmarks. These experiences collectively point to a core observation: no fixed reward function can remain effective as policy capability continues to grow; and verification must co-evolve with the generator.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了AI编码代理中验证(verification)面临的根本挑战。随着基础模型生成能力增强,验证反而变得比生成更难,因为:1)用户意图本质上难以精确表达;2)训练过程中的优化会拉大代理与真实意图之间的差距(表现为奖励黑客或信号饱和)。作者从可扩展性、忠诚性、鲁棒性三个维度分析验证信号质量,研究四种奖励构建方案,并指出验证器必须与生成器协同演化。
AI.motivation: 传统观念认为"验证比生成容易",但在大模型时代这一观念被反转。当前编码代理面临的核心问题是:所有验证器都是用户意图的代理而非意图本身,且训练优化会扩大代理与意图的差距。这导致奖励黑客、信号饱和等问题,亟需系统性解决。
AI.method: 1)从可扩展性、忠诚性、鲁棒性三维度定义验证信号质量;2)研究四种奖励构建:通用编程任务测试验证器、前端任务规则验证器、真实世界代理任务中用户作为验证器、长周期任务自动化代理验证器;3)在不同任务类型和策略能力级别下进行深入实验分析。
AI.result: 实验表明:针对性验证设计可有效抑制奖励黑客、提高任务完成质量,在多个内部和公开基准上取得显著收益。核心发现是:随着策略能力增长,没有固定奖励函数能保持有效,验证必须与生成器协同演化。
AI.conclusion: 验证是AI代理系统的核心挑战,需要从三维度权衡验证信号质量。四种奖励构建各有优劣,需根据任务类型选择。关键结论:固定奖励函数在能力增长面前会失效,验证设计需要持续演进以匹配生成器的能力发展。

title: Staying VIGILant: Mitigating Visual Laziness via Counterfactual Visual Alignment in MLLMs
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) extend large language models (LLMs) with visual perception, enabling joint reasoning over images and text. Despite inheriting strong reasoning capabilities from LLMs, they remain prone to hallucinations that contradict their visual inputs. Mechanistic studies indicate that this weakness stems from visual laziness: MLLMs encode the correct visual evidence internally, but overly rely on strong language priors during response. Existing alignment methods, such as direct preference optimization, primarily optimize outcome-level rewards based on text. This introduces an optimization bias toward linguistic shortcuts, leading to responses that often contradict the visual evidence. To address this, we propose Visual Information Gain In aLignment (VIGIL), a reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training framework that shifts the focus from numerical reward fitting to causal visual grounding. VIGIL introduces a geometric constraint that explicitly maximizes the mutual information between the visual input and the generated response. We achieve this by penalizing "blind confidence" instances where the model remains improperly certain even when textual-visual attention is masked to create a counterfactual blind state. Extensive experiments show that VIGIL consistently outperforms recent alignment methods across hallucination and reasoning benchmarks without compromising text-only capabilities. Our approach matches the full-data performance of state-of-the-art methods using only 25% of the preference data and even demonstrates emergent spatial grounding capabilities without explicit bounding box supervision.

AI.tldr: VIGIL是一种针对多模态大语言模型的强化学习后训练框架，通过引入几何约束显式最大化视觉输入与生成响应之间的互信息，解决MLLMs因视觉懒惰导致的幻觉问题。
AI.motivation: MLLMs继承了大语言模型的强大推理能力，但仍存在幻觉问题，表现为与视觉输入相矛盾。现有对齐方法主要基于文本的结果级奖励优化，导致优化偏差偏向语言捷径，使响应经常与视觉证据相矛盾。
AI.method: VIGIL引入几何约束，明确最大化视觉输入与生成响应之间的互信息。通过惩罚"盲目自信"实例——即在文本-视觉注意力被掩盖创建反事实盲状态时，模型仍然不当确定的情况。
AI.result: VIGIL在幻觉和推理基准测试中始终优于最新的对齐方法，且不损害纯文本能力。使用仅25%的偏好数据即达到最先进方法的完整数据性能，并展示了紧急的空间 grounding 能力，无需显式的边界框监督。
AI.conclusion: VIGIL通过因果视觉 grounding 而非数值奖励拟合来解决视觉懒惰问题，为多模态对齐提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about mitigating hallucinations in Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) via visual alignment - focused on text-image grounding in language models. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text). These are entirely different application domains: one deals with LLM alignment and hallucination reduction, the other deals with motion synthesis. While the research profile mentions VLM for quality assessment, this paper doesn't address motion generation, visual-to-3D motion extraction, or any graphics-related tasks. The core problem (hallucination in LLM responses) is fundamentally different from extracting 3D motion from 2D video or ensuring motion quality.

title: How Do Tool-Augmented LLM Agents Perform on Real-World Energy Analytics Tasks?
summary:
Agentic benchmarks have emerged across general-purpose and domain-specific settings, including finance, coding, law, and drug discovery, yet energy-domain evaluations remain largely limited to static knowledge recall. This is a critical gap for a sector that requires live data retrieval, specialized regulatory and market knowledge, and multi-step quantitative reasoning under real-world constraints.
  We present an empirical study of tool-augmented LLM agents on real-world energy market analytics tasks. Our evaluation environment includes 243 expert-curated problems across three categories: (1) Market Data Retrieval and Analysis, (2) Knowledge Retrieval and Interpretation, and (3) Advanced Quantitative Modeling and Decision Analytics. Tasks include price and demand analysis, tariff impact modeling, asset revenue and returns estimation, hedging strategy analysis, and optimization modeling, with problems spanning multiple difficulty levels.
  Agents are equipped with a configurable suite of domain tools, including live electricity market APIs for major U.S. ISOs, regulatory docket search, utility tariff databases, asset optimization models, and retrieval-augmented generation over energy market documents. We assess agent responses using a multi-dimensional evaluation protocol that scores approach correctness, answer accuracy, attribute alignment, and source validity, with category-aware routing to match scoring criteria to question type. We evaluate both closed-source and open-source LLMs, providing a comparative analysis of how model capability and domain tooling interact in a high-stakes professional domain. Key artifacts are publicly released to support reproducibility and future research.

AI.tldr: 该研究填补了能源领域AI代理评估的空白，构建了包含243个专业问题的基准测试集，评估工具增强的LLM代理在能源市场分析任务上的表现，涵盖市场数据检索、知识解读和定量建模三大类别。
AI.motivation: 能源行业需要实时数据检索、专业监管知识和多步定量推理能力，但现有基准测试仅局限于静态知识召回，存在关键研究空白。
AI.method: 构建包含243个专家策划问题的评估环境，分为市场数据检索分析、知识检索解读、高级定量建模决策三类；配备电力市场API、监管数据库、资产优化模型等域工具；采用多维度评估协议评分方法正确性、答案准确性、属性对齐和来源有效性。
AI.result: 评估了闭源和开源LLM在能源市场分析任务上的表现，揭示了模型能力与领域工具配置在专业领域中的交互作用。
AI.conclusion: 为能源领域的AI代理评估提供了可复现的基准测试框架和数据支持，推动了高风险专业领域中AI系统的应用研究。

title: DinoLink: A Token-Centric Representation Compression Framework for Bandwidth-Constrained Collaborative V2X Perception
summary: High-precision remote perception is often hindered by the severe bandwidth constraints of Vehicle-to-Everything (V2X) networks. We propose \textit{DinoLink}, a token-centric compression framework that replaces raw pixel streaming with discrete semantic communication for vehicle-cloud collaborative inference. DinoLink employs a dual-sparsity architecture: a saliency-aware selector prunes redundant background tokens, while a Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) module collapses features into compact codebook indices. By transmitting only lightweight indices and positional priors, DinoLink achieves a $139\times$ bitrate reduction compared to uncompressed transmission while maintaining a competitive 32.8\% mAP on the nuScenes dataset. Deployment simulations further demonstrate a $34.5\times$ acceleration in narrow-band environments, such as LoRa. Our results substantiate DinoLink as a robust, bandwidth-efficient frontend for high-fidelity remote perception in constrained V2X scenarios. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/UGA-MOBILITY-LAB/dino_link.

title: What We are Missing in Multimodal LLM Evaluation?
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) can process diverse inputs, e.g., text, images, audio, and video, and generate textual responses. While their capabilities have advanced rapidly, evaluation of such models has not kept pace. Most existing evaluation benchmarks are limited to isolated tasks and reveal little about whether a model integrates information across modalities. We examine current means for evaluating MLLMs and review the existing benchmark taxonomy to identify gaps, including temporal-spatial coherence, physical world understanding, multimodal consistency, and selective attention. Addressing these gaps is essential for measuring real progress in multimodal intelligence and exposing capability boundaries.

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的评估问题，指出现有评估基准的局限性，并识别了评估框架中的关键空白。
AI.motivation: 随着MLLMs能力快速发展，其评估方法却未能同步跟进。现有基准多局限于单一任务，难以评估模型是否真正整合了跨模态信息，亟需建立更全面的评估体系。
AI.method: 通过系统审查现有评估基准和分类法，识别当前评估体系中的关键差距，包括时空一致性、物理世界理解、多模态一致性和选择性注意等维度。
AI.result: 识别出四大评估空白：1)时空一致性；2)物理世界理解；3)多模态一致性；4)选择性注意力。这些缺失严重阻碍了对多模态智能真实进展的衡量。
AI.conclusion: 填补这些评估空白对于衡量多模态智能的真实进展、揭示模型能力边界至关重要，是该领域未来发展的关键方向。

The research profile focuses on video-to-motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, and 3D motion models, whereas this paper addresses evaluation frameworks for multimodal AI systems. There is no overlap in application domain, methods, or research goals.

title: Neural Voxel Dynamics: Learning Implicit 3D Physics via Volumetric Feature Advection
summary: We present a self-supervised framework for learning implicit 3D physical dynamics directly from video-derived supervisory signals. While current generative video models achieve high visual fidelity, they lack a 3D geometric foundation, often resulting in physical inconsistencies and a failure to maintain object permanence. We address this by shifting the predictive bottleneck from 2D image space to a `lifted' 3D Volumetric Latent Space. Our method unprojects semantic features from a Video Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture (V-JEPA) into a voxelized grid, grounded by monocular depth priors. This lifting enables a Volumetric Feature Advection to learn an action-conditioned transition operator that treats physics as a spatio-temporal state advection problem, i.e., learn implicit 3D physics. Unlike state-of-the-art hybrid models that rely on explicit classical simulators for training and/or inference, our architecture tracks material states implicitly within high-dimensional V-JEPA features. This allows for the emergent simulation of heterogeneous phenomena (e.g., rigid body motion in fluid flow) within a single, unified pipeline. Supervised solely via end-to-end video-derived signal plus action conditions, without access to physics engine internal states, labels, or surrogate models, our model demonstrates good long-term structural stability and physical plausibility on multiple benchmarks (CLEVERER, PhysInOne, PhysGaia). We believe that this work opens a scalable pathway toward general-purpose dynamic world models that internalize the 3D invariants of the physical world solely through passive observation of monocular videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自监督框架，用于从视频衍生的监督信号中直接学习隐式3D物理动力学。该方法将预测瓶颈从2D图像空间转移到"提升的"3D体素化潜在空间，通过体素特征平流学习动作条件下的转换算子，将物理视为时空状态平流问题来处理。
AI.motivation: 当前生成式视频模型虽然实现了高视觉保真度，但缺乏3D几何基础，常常导致物理不一致性和无法维持物体恒常性。现有混合模型依赖显式经典模拟器进行训练和/或推理，不够灵活。
AI.method: 提出将V-JEPA的语义特征提升到体素化网格中，以单目深度先验为锚点。通过体素特征平流学习动作条件下的转换算子，将物理视为时空状态平流问题。完全通过端到端视频衍生信号和动作条件进行监督，无需访问物理引擎内部状态、标签或代理模型。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试（CLEVERER、PhysInOne、PhysGaia）上展示了良好的长期结构稳定性和物理合理性，能够在单一统一管道中隐式模拟异质现象（如流体中的刚体运动）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开辟了一条可扩展的路径，通过被动观察单目视频来内化物理世界的3D不变量，从而实现通用动态世界模型。

While both involve video-to-3D concepts, this paper focuses on simulating physical phenomena (fluids, rigid bodies) for visual effects, not generating character/human motion from text/video guidance. The application domain mismatch is significant - the paper is about physics simulation rather than intentional motion synthesis for characters. Some tangential relevance exists in visual-to-3D feature extraction, but the core goal and methods serve different purposes in computer graphics.

title: OpenFinGym: A Verifiable Multi-Task Gym Environment for Evaluating Quant Agents
summary: Although large language model agents are increasingly applied to quantitative-finance workflows, their evaluation remains fragmented across isolated tasks, while the financial relevance of benchmark tasks is often overlooked. Yet financial workflows are inherently multi-stage, spanning interdependent tasks such as forecasting, strategy construction, risk management, and trading. Existing platforms typically focus on a single task, and can therefore overstate agent competence and fail to reveal weaknesses in generalization, real-market interaction, and financially meaningful decision-making. We introduce OpenFinGym, a unified gym environment for quantitative-finance agent development that covers forecasting, market generation, real-time trading, and fraud detection under a single execution and verification interface. OpenFinGym additionally provides an automated task-construction pipeline that turns quantitative finance publications into executable task packages; a containerised runtime with a host-side verifier service that supports scalable agent rollouts and prevents runtime train-test leakage; a paper trading engine with a low-latency data-stream design; deferred-resolution support for long-horizon and event-market forecasts; and integration for SFT and RL post-training

AI.tldr: OpenFinGym是一个统一的量化金融智能体开发环境，涵盖预测、市场生成、实时交易和欺诈检测，通过单一执行和验证接口支持多阶段金融工作流，并提供自动化任务构建管道、容器化运行时和回测交易引擎。
AI.motivation: 现有评估平台分散且孤立，过度关注单一任务，导致高估智能体能力、无法揭示泛化、真实市场交互和金融决策方面的弱点，而金融工作流本质上是多阶段的、相互依存的。
AI.method: 构建统一gym环境集成多任务，设计自动化pipeline将论文转为可执行任务包，开发容器化运行时防止数据泄露，实现低延迟数据流回测引擎，支持延期 resolution预测。
AI.result: 提供覆盖预测、市场生成、实时交易、欺诈检测的统一接口，支持SFT和RL后训练集成，实现可扩展智能体部署并防止训练测试泄露。
AI.conclusion: OpenFinGym为量化金融智能体开发提供标准化基准平台，有望推动该领域评估体系的统一和发展。

title: Methane-Plume Segmentation From Hyperspectral Satellite Imagery Via Multimodal Deep Learning
comment: Accepted at IEEE International Geoscience and Remote Sensing Symposium (IGARSS) 2026
summary: Efficient detection of methane plumes is crucial for understanding and mitigating global warming, as accurately identifying and segmenting them in earth observation imagery remain essential for large-scale monitoring. In this work, we propose a multimodal deep learning model that integrates a feature-guided methane enhancement (FGME) mechanism which injects physically meaningful methane cues into transformer-based RGB representations at multiple semantic scales. Our method is evaluated on the MPDataset, where it outperforms the state-of-the-art with improvements of +0.92 in MIoU, +0.87 in MPrecision and +1.01 in Recall. Notably, these gains are obtained with a substantially lower computational cost than other high-performing architectures, resulting in a favorable accuracy-efficiency trade-off for large-scale methane monitoring. These results highlight the potential of efficient multimodal fusion strategies for accurate and scalable methane plume segmentation in real-world remote sensing applications.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出了一种高效的多模态深度学习模型，用于遥感图像中的甲烷烟羽检测与分割。该模型通过特征引导甲烷增强（FGME）机制将物理意义上的甲烷线索注入到基于Transformer的RGB表征中，在多语义尺度上实现融合。在MPDataset数据集上的实验表明，该方法在MIoU、MPrecision和Recall三个指标上分别提升了+0.92、+0.87和+1.01，且计算成本显著低于其他高性能架构。
AI.motivation: 甲烷是全球变暖的重要温室气体之一，高效检测甲烷烟羽对于理解和缓解全球变暖至关重要。准确识别和分割遥感图像中的甲烷烟羽对于大规模监测具有重要意义。然而，现有的甲烷检测方法在精度和效率之间难以取得良好平衡。
AI.method: 提出了一种多模态深度学习模型，集成了特征引导甲烷增强（FGME）机制。该机制将物理意义上的甲烷线索注入到基于Transformer的RGB表征中，在多个语义尺度上进行融合。通过多模态融合策略，实现甲烷烟羽的准确分割。
AI.result: 在MPDataset数据集上的评估表明，该方法优于现有最先进的方法：MIoU提升+0.92，MPrecision提升+0.87，Recall提升+1.01。更重要的是，该方法在计算成本上显著低于其他高性能架构，实现了良好的精度-效率权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了高效的多模态融合策略对于实现准确且可扩展的甲烷烟羽分割具有巨大潜力。这种方法为大规模甲烷监测提供了有价值的解决方案，在实际遥感应用中具有重要的应用前景。

title: Active Adversarial Perturbation-driven Associative Memory Retrieval for RGB-Event Visual Object Tracking
