summary: RGB-Event tracking improves localization robustness by fusing RGB appearance textures and dense temporal motion cues from event sensors. While this multi-modal scheme broadens tracking applicability, real-world scenes suffer diverse structured signal degradations that hinder traditional multi-modal fusion. In harsh environments, either modality can lose reliability drastically, and targets frequently appear incomplete due to occlusion, edge truncation and foreground clutter.To tackle the above challenges, we present a hierarchical perturbation and retrieval framework tailored for RGB-Event tracking with robustness against partial target missing and modal degradation, termed APRTrack. To mimic real-world signal corruption, APRTrack constructs structured degradation via two adversarial perturbation branches at the modality and spatial levels, which separately simulate full-modal failure and localized target region absence. A hierarchical routing mechanism is designed to disentangle the training pipelines of the two perturbation types, effectively eliminating feature collapse induced by superimposed degradation constraints. Furthermore, we devise Footprint-guided Channel-calibrated Hopfield Retrieval (FCHR) for reliable historical information compensation. This module evaluates retrieval confidence based on association footprints between queries and memory banks, and calibrates the retrieval metric space prior to Hopfield matching, realizing controllable historical feature compensation bounded to target regions. Extensive experiments on FE108, COESOT, VisEvent, and FELT datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed strategies for the RGB-Event visual object tracking. The source code and pre-trained models will be released on https://github.com/Event-AHU/OpenEvTracking

AI.tldr: APRTrack是一种用于RGB-Event视觉目标跟踪的分层扰动检索框架，旨在增强对部分目标缺失和模态退化的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现实场景中存在多种结构化信号退化问题，导致传统多模态融合方法失效。在恶劣环境中，任一模态可能严重失去可靠性，且目标常因遮挡、边缘截断和前景杂波而出现不完整。
AI.method: 提出两种对抗性扰动分支分别在模态和空间层面模拟信号损坏：全模态失败和局部目标区域缺失。设计分层路由机制消除特征坍塌。提出足迹引导的通道校准Hopfield检索(FCHR)模块进行历史信息补偿。
AI.result: 在FE108、COESOT、VisEvent和FELT数据集上进行了广泛实验，验证了所提策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: APRTrack通过分层扰动和检索机制有效提升了RGB-Event跟踪在部分目标缺失和模态退化条件下的鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RGB-Event Visual Object Tracking (adversarial perturbation, Hopfield retrieval for object tracking), which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. Object tracking involves locating and following objects in video frames, while the research profile requires generating new 3D human motion sequences. The methods (adversarial perturbation, hierarchical routing) are also unrelated to video generation models, VLM-based quality assessment, or 3D motion generation pipelines. Even though both deal with video, the goals are fundamentally different - tracking existing content vs creating new motion content.

title: Accelerating Returns and the Qualitative Engine for Science
summary: Ray Kurzweil described a thesis of accelerating returns, which is the most influential narratives in discussions of technological progress. Its central claim is that advances in multiple technological fields, especially compute, artificial intelligence, brain science, and biotechnology, interact in such a way that progress becomes self-amplifying and approximately exponential. This paper gives a simple mathematical interpretation of that claim and then argues that, even if such acceleration is real, it does not by itself resolve the central problem of scientific discovery. The reason is that accelerating returns apply most naturally to executional and infrastructural capability, whereas genuine discovery often depends on a different capacity: qualitative reasoning about when a current framework is structurally inadequate and what conceptual move is needed next. Recent ARC-AGI-3 results sharpen this distinction: humans solve the benchmark at ceiling, whereas frontier AI systems remain below 1%, indicating that the gap between current AI and human flexible reasoning is still very large. At the same time, Demis Hassabis has emphasized that humans must retain their sense of meaning and what they choose to focus their lives on, a reminder that the future of AI is not only a technical forecast but also a question of what forms of human understanding are worth preserving and transmitting. This paper positions the Qualitative Engine for Science (QES) [3] as a response to that missing capacity. In this view, the Kurzweil theory helps explain why quantitative capability may accelerate, while QES addresses the central problem in scientific discovery that acceleration alone does not solve. Its value does not depend on when AGI arrives, but on the fact that the processes of scientific discovery themselves constitute a form of human wisdom worth preserving, organizing, and making accessible.

AI.tldr: 本文对库兹韦尔"加速回报"理论进行了数学解读，并论证了加速回报本身无法解决科学发现的核心问题。作者区分了执行性/基础设施能力与定性推理能力的本质差异，指出真正的科学发现依赖于对现有框架结构性不足的质性判断。QES（定性科学引擎）被定位为弥补这一缺失能力的响应，其价值不取决于AGI何时实现，而在于科学发现过程本身作为值得保存和传承的人类智慧形式。
AI.motivation: 库兹韦尔理论预测技术进步将呈指数级自我强化，但作者认为这一理论忽视了科学发现的核心问题——即何时现有框架结构上不足以及需要何种概念性突破。ARC-AGI-3测试结果显示人类达到天花板而前沿AI系统准确率低于1%，凸显了当前AI与人类灵活推理之间的巨大差距。同时，Demis Hassabis强调人类必须保留对意义和人生聚焦的感知，这提醒我们AI的未来不仅是技术预测，更是关于何种人类理解形式值得保留和传承的问题。
AI.method: 首先对库兹韦尔的加速回报理论进行简单数学解读，然后区分两种能力：执行性/基础设施能力（最自然地适用于加速回报）和质性推理能力（对当前框架结构性不足的判断及下一步概念性移动的理解）。结合ARC-AGI-3基准测试结果说明当前AI系统的局限性，最后提出QES作为应对缺失能力的方案。
AI.result: 加速回报确实存在于计算、人工智能、脑科学和生物技术等领域的执行性能力中，但这种加速并不能自动解决科学发现的核心问题。真正的科学发现需要定性推理能力——即识别现有理论框架何时失效以及需要何种新概念突破的能力。ARC-AGI-3测试表明人类在基准测试中表现完美，而前沿AI系统准确率不足1%，证实了当前AI系统在质性推理方面的严重不足。QES被定位为专门解决这一缺失能力的技术方案。
AI.conclusion: 库兹韦尔理论有助于解释定量能力的加速，但QES解决了加速回报本身无法解决的科学发现核心问题。QES的价值不取决于AGI何时实现，而在于科学发现过程本身构成了一种值得保存、组织和accessibility的人类智慧形式。人类在科学探索中的质性判断和概念创新能力是当前AI系统无法替代的，这些过程应当作为人类文明的重要遗产得到保护和发展。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about philosophy of science and AI theory (Kurzweil's accelerating returns, ARC-AGI-3 benchmark, qualitative reasoning) - not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. It has no connection to video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion generation, or any computer graphics applications. The application domain is entirely different: theoretical AI/philosophy vs motion generation from video.

title: Forget, Anticipate and Adapt: Test Time Training for Long Videos
comment: ECCV 2026. GLOM/APM's temporal binding now works for long videos
summary:
Test Time Training (TTT) is a mechanism in which a model adapts to an incoming test-sample by performing some self-supervised (SSL) task and updating its weights even during inference. This procedure does not require labels at test-time. This paper focuses on TTT for long-videos. A major concern with existing approaches is: 1) they perform TTT updates using a sliding window containing frames in the past, whose compute increases linearly with the size of window. This becomes computationally intractable when the videos are hours long. 2) TTT is performed even when temporally close frames look similar, thereby consuming a lot of compute.
  We present the Frame Forgetting Network (FFN) that: 1) operates on only three frames within the sliding window, namely the frame that exits, the current frame and the frame after that. The model still manages to retain temporal context and work for hours long-videos; 2) mathematically define a surprise metric: how much new information the incoming frame contains with respect to the past seen frame. This facilitates determining how to modify the effective window size during TTT and constitutes the core mechanism of an adaptive windowing algorithm. Additionally, we curate a dataset EpicTours containing up to 3 hour long videos of walking city-tours, whereas earlier datasets on this problem were only 5 min long. We demonstrate FFNs empirical effectiveness on dense-segmentation, video classification tasks, generalization to depth-estimation, and multi-hour long videos.

AI.tldr: 本文提出Frame Forgetting Network (FFN)解决长时间视频的Test Time Training (TTT)计算问题，通过仅处理滑动窗口中的3帧和引入surprise度量实现自适应窗口调整。
AI.motivation: 现有TTT方法存在两大问题：1)滑动窗口计算量随窗口大小线性增长，对数小时长视频不可行；2)即使帧间相似仍执行TTT，导致计算浪费。
AI.method: FFN方法：1)仅处理退出帧、当前帧、后继帧三帧来保留时间上下文；2)定义surprise度量衡量新帧相对于历史帧的信息量；3)基于surprise实现自适应窗口调整算法。
AI.result: 在密集分割、视频分类任务上验证有效性，并泛化到深度估计和多小时长视频场景。
AI.conclusion: FFN能有效处理小时级长视频的自适应推理，surprise度量为自适应窗口选择提供了理论依据。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses Test Time Training for long video processing (video classification, segmentation, depth estimation) - a general computer vision task. It is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation which focuses on generating 3D human motion from visual/text inputs. The application domain is entirely different: this is about video understanding/analysis, not motion generation. The methods (TTT, surprise metrics, adaptive windows) are also unrelated to the profile's methods (video generation models, VLM for quality assessment, 3D motion generation). None of the pain points from the profile (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-to-3D motion domain gap) are addressed.

title: Narration-of-Thought: Inference-Time Scaffolding for Defeasible Ethical Reasoning in Large Language Models
comment: 24 pages, 8 figures, 16 tables. To appear at ACL 2026 (submitted via ARR)
summary: Standard chain-of-thought on moral dilemmas exhibits two failure modes: stakeholder collapse (the trace names at most one party with a stake in the outcome) and uncertainty suppression (no explicit unknowns or hedges before committing to an action). We introduce narration-of-thought (NoT), a system prompt that structures chain-of-thought into five sections: protagonist, stakeholders, two-step consequences, uncertainty, then commitment. NoT adds no training, parameters, or fine-tuning. On 100 DailyDilemmas scenarios across four generators from three vendors, NoT cuts stakeholder collapse from up to 31% to under 1% and uncertainty suppression from up to 72% to 1-24% on every model. A matched-budget verbose-CoT control rules out token spend as the active ingredient; NoT retains Cliff's delta advantages of +0.79 to +0.90 on stakeholder count and +0.65 to +0.93 on uncertainty score for three of four generators, and a section ablation attributes each shift to its specific sub-instruction. Textual-gradient descent initialised at NoT improves the scaffold further; a cross-family training judge (different vendor from the generator) dominates an in-family one on every measured axis. Extended to a five-round multi-stakeholder debate protocol, the scaffold converts a 6% standoff into 95% full consensus on a calibration set and 100% combined convergence on a DailyDilemmas replication. The resulting traces externalise the stakeholders, consequences, and uncertainty grounding each commitment, providing an auditable substrate for dependable agentic deployment.

AI.tldr: 研究引入"叙述性思维"(NoT)方法，通过五部分结构化提示(主角、利益相关者、双步后果、不确定性、承诺)修复道德推理中的两种失败模式：利益相关者崩溃(仅命名一个利益方)和不确定性抑制(不表达未知)。该方法无需训练或微调，在100个场景中显著降低两种失败率，并实现多轮辩论中的高共识度。
AI.motivation: 标准思维链在道德困境推理中存在两个关键失败模式：1)利益相关者崩溃，即推理过程仅命名最多一个有利害关系的当事人；2)不确定性抑制，即在承诺行动前缺乏明确的未知或对冲表达。这两个问题影响了AI在道德决策中的可靠性和可解释性。
AI.method: 引入叙述性思维(NoT)系统提示，将思维链结构化为五部分：主角、利益相关者、双步后果、不确定性、承诺。在100个DailyDilemmas场景上测试四种生成器，并进行了匹配预算的verbose-CoT对照、部分消融、文本梯度下降初始化、跨家族训练法官评估以及五轮多利益相关者辩论协议。
AI.result: NoT将利益相关者崩溃从最高31%降至1%以下，不确定性抑制从最高72%降至1-24%。保留Cliff's delta优势：利益相关者计数+0.79至+0.90，不确定性得分+0.65至+0.93(四种生成器中三种)。多利益相关者辩论将6%僵局转为校准集上95%完全共识和DailyDilemmas复制上100%联合收敛。
AI.conclusion: NoT提供可审计的推理框架，外化了支撑每个承诺的利益相关者、后果和不确定性，为依赖性智能体部署奠定了可靠基础。该方法无需额外训练或参数即可显著改善道德推理质量。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about improving ethical reasoning and moral decision-making in Large Language Models (NLP/AI ethics domain), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text). The application domains are entirely different - one deals with reasoning about moral dilemmas, the other deals with generating human motion. No overlap in methods or application areas.

title: From Hallucination to Grounding: Diagnosing Visual Spatial Intelligence via CRISP
summary: Current VLM evaluations often conflate language priors with genuine spatial reasoning. To address this, we introduce CRISP, a novel structural-diagnostic evaluation paradigm that assesses visual spatial intelligence through consistency, the alignment between implicit perception and explicit reasoning. Unlike traditional black-box QA, CRISP utilizes metric 3D Scene Graphs and an oracle intervention protocol to decouple latent reasoning capabilities from perceptual bottlenecks. This granular diagnosis uncovers a systematic perception-reasoning disconnect. Crucially, we reveal that while proprietary models possess robust latent reasoning engines, they suffer from inaccurate metric estimation and a critical failure to leverage their implicit structural representations. Conversely, open-source models remain fundamentally bottlenecked by their lack of multi-hop compositional reasoning. By shifting the focus from merely ``guessing correctly'' via language priors to genuinely ``perceiving, verifying, and reasoning,'' CRISP offers a rigorous roadmap for multimodal alignment beyond end-to-end post-training. The code and dataset are available at https://github.com/iiyamayuki/CRISP-Bench.

AI.tldr: CRISP是一种新型结构诊断评估范式，用于评估视觉空间智能，通过一致性（隐式感知与显式推理的对齐）来区分语言先验和真正的空间推理。
AI.motivation: 当前VLM评估经常混淆语言先验与真正的空间推理，需要一种方法来解耦潜在推理能力与感知瓶颈。
AI.method: 使用度量3D场景图和oracle干预协议进行细粒度诊断，区分隐式感知和显式推理。
AI.result: 发现了一种系统的感知-推理脱节。专有模型具有强大的潜在推理引擎，但存在不准确的度量估计和关键的结构表示利用失败；开源模型受限于缺乏多跳组合推理能力。
AI.conclusion: CRISP将评估重点从仅通过语言先验"猜对"转向真正"感知、验证和推理"，为多模态对齐提供了严格的路线图。

relevance_reason: This paper is about evaluating Vision-Language Models' spatial reasoning capabilities (VLMs for visual question answering/3D scene understanding), NOT about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While it mentions VLMs, the application domain is completely different - it's about diagnosing AI cognition/hallucination in spatial reasoning tasks, not about extracting 3D motion from video or generating human motion. The methods and goals have no overlap with the research profile's pain points of motion extraction, quality consistency, or visual-to-3D motion bridging.

title: PhyEditBench: A Real-World Multi-Stage Benchmark for Physics-Aware Image Editing
comment: 19 pages, 6 figures, 2 tables. Accepted to ECCV 2026
summary: While instruction-based image editing, enabled by multi-modal generative models, has advanced significantly, existing benchmarks lack a comprehensive evaluation of physics-based reasoning, a critical capability for handling real-world scenarios. To address this, we introduce PhyEditBench, a benchmark designed to assess the physical understanding of editing models. Guided by a hierarchical taxonomy, we establish 4 primary classes and 12 subclasses. It comprises 238 high-quality, high-resolution, real-world instances meticulously extracted from videos to capture authentic physical dynamics, alongside 35 synthetic Anti-Physics instances. Our empirical analysis of current SOTA editing methods exposes substantial limitations in their physics-based reasoning. We further propose a training-free baseline named PhyWorld that uses test-time scaling and a latent reduction strategy. PhyWorld outperforms comparable models and suggests that the video generation process can effectively serve as a reasoning mechanism for image editing. The project page is available at https://github.com/Previsior/PhyEditBench.

AI.tldr: PhyEditBench是一个用于评估图像编辑模型物理推理能力的新基准测试。针对现有基准缺乏物理推理评估的问题，该基准包含238个真实世界高分辨率实例和35个反物理合成实例，基于4类12子类的层次化 taxonomy构建。同时提出无训练基线PhyWorld，利用测试时扩展和潜在约简策略，在物理推理任务上超越现有SOTA方法。
AI.motivation: 现有图像编辑基准缺乏对物理推理的综合评估，而物理推理是处理真实世界场景的关键能力。当前的SOTA编辑方法在物理推理方面存在显著不足，亟需专门的基准来推动这一领域的研究。
AI.method: 1) 建立层次化taxonomy：4个主类、12个子类；2) 从视频中提取238个高质量高分辨率真实世界实例以捕捉真实物理动态；3) 创建35个合成Anti-Physics反例；4) 提出PhyWorld训练-free基线：结合测试时扩展(test-time scaling)和潜在约简(latent reduction)策略
AI.result: 对当前SOTA编辑方法的实证分析暴露了它们在物理推理方面的重大局限性。PhyWorld在物理推理任务上优于可比模型，证明了视频生成过程可有效作为图像编辑的推理机制。
AI.conclusion: PhyEditBench填补了物理推理评估的空白，为图像编辑模型的物理理解能力提供了标准化的测试平台。PhyWorld的成功表明无需额外训练即可通过视频生成机制增强物理推理能力，为未来研究提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMAGE EDITING (2D), completely outside the research field of TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION (3D). While both may use diffusion models, the application domain is entirely different - image editing focuses on modifying 2D images with physical reasoning, not generating 3D human motion sequences. The pain points are unrelated (physical plausibility in editing vs extracting 3D motion from 2D video). No mention of motion generation, video-to-motion conversion, or any relevant methods for the research profile.

title: When Agents Meet Electric Bus Fleet Operations: Pricing Behavior, Trade-offs, and Policy Implications in an Aggregator Framework
summary: Agentic systems are changing how complex operational tasks are coordinated, introducing a new paradigm for connecting heterogeneous data sources and automating processes. Electric bus fleets provide a relevant test case. Their operation requires continuous coordination between service reliability, battery state-of-charge, charger availability, electricity prices, route-energy uncertainty, and vehicle-to-grid (V2G) opportunities. This paper proposes an agentic aggregator framework that streamlines this decision environment by coupling an optimization-based electric bus scheduling model with supervisory agents for disturbance detection, tariff adaptation, and schedule evaluation. The optimization core enforces physical feasibility across routes, chargers, batteries, and V2G exchanges, while the agentic layer interprets changing operating conditions, triggers real-time re-optimization when needed, and defines how flexibility value is allocated between the aggregator and the public transport operator (PTO). A realistic depot case study evaluates day-ahead and real-time operations under profit-based and operation-based coordination modes, considering service delays, route-energy deviations, electricity price shocks, and combined disturbances. The results show that agentic aggregation can support adaptive fleet-grid coordination by maintaining feasible schedules, activating re-optimization selectively, and improving the use of charging and V2G flexibility. However, they also reveal a critical trade-off: the same agentic capability that reduces operational complexity can extract value from the PTO when configured around profit-oriented pricing. These findings suggest that agentic aggregators can become useful for managing electric bus V2G operations, but their deployment in public-fleet contexts requires transparent coordination modes, auditable tariff-setting, and explicit value-sharing rules.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种智能体聚合器框架，将优化模型与监督智能体相结合，用于协调电动公交车队的充电调度、V2G灵活性和电网互动。框架包含物理可行性约束的优化核心，以及用于扰动检测、电价适应和调度评估的智能体层。
AI.motivation: 电动公交车队运营需要协调服务可靠性、电池SOC、充电器可用性、电价、路线能耗不确定性和车网(V2G)机会等多重因素，现有决策环境复杂，需要引入新的协调范式。
AI.method: 提出耦合优化核心与智能体层的框架架构：优化核心强制执行路线、充电器、电池和V2G交换的物理可行性约束；智能体层解释变化的运营条件，触发实时再优化，并定义灵活价值在聚合器与公交运营商之间的分配方式。采用真实 depot 案例研究，评估利润导向和运营导向两种协调模式下的日前和实时运营。
AI.result: 智能体聚合可支持自适应的车队-电网协调，维持可行调度，选择性激活再优化，改善充电和V2G灵活性的利用。但存在关键权衡：同样的智能体能力在配置为利润导向定价时可从公交运营商处提取价值。
AI.conclusion: 智能体聚合器可用于管理电动公交车V2G运营，但在公共车队场景中的部署需要透明的协调模式、可审计的定价设定和明确的价值分享规则。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about electric bus fleet operations, V2G coordination, and energy management optimization - entirely different field from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are completely unrelated despite both mentioning "agents" - here agents are supervisory agents for energy scheduling, not generative models or vision-language models for motion generation.

title: Perception, Verdict, and Evolution: Hindsight-Driven Self-Refining Forensics Agent for AI-Generated Image Detection
summary: The rapid advancement of generative models presents a significant challenge to existing deepfake detection methods, particularly given the widespread dissemination of highly realistic AI-generated images. Although Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) show strong potential for this task, existing approaches suffer from two key limitations: insufficient sensitivity to fine-grained forensic artifacts and reliance on static synthetic supervision from frontier models, leading to limited flexibility and high-cost. To address these issues, we propose ForeAgent, an agentic forensics framework for AI-generated image detection with iterative self-evolution. First, ForeAgent adopts a Perception-Verdict architecture that aggregates multi-view cues spanning semantic, spatial, and frequency-domain features, and leverages an MLLM as a verdict module to fuse these signals for a logical-grounded verdict. Second, to enable continual self-improvement, we introduce a Hindsight-Driven Self-Refining strategy following a Sampling-Reflection-Evolution paradigm. The agent performs inference rollouts on training instances. Guided by ground-truth labels as hindsight, it reflects on failure cases and low-quality reasoning trajectories to regenerate higher-quality reasoning traces. These synthesized samples are then strictly filtered through a dual-expert quality gating module. ForeAgent continuously evolves via fine-tuning on self-curated high-quality samples. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ForeAgent achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Chameleon benchmark, reaching 82.18% accuracy (+16.41% over AIDE), and achieves 93.3% mean accuracy on AIGCDetect-Benchmark across 16 generators. In addition, external evaluation shows that ForeAgent produces more consistent and causally grounded reasoning compared to GPT-5 and GPT-5-mini.

AI.tldr: ForeAgent是一个用于AI生成图像检测的主动式取证框架，采用感知-裁决架构聚合多视角线索（语义、空间、频域特征），并利用多模态大语言模型作为裁决模块进行逻辑推理判断。通过 hindsight驱动的自我改进策略（采样-反思-演进范式），实现持续自我进化。
AI.motivation: 生成模型的快速发展对现有深度伪造检测方法构成重大挑战。现有方法存在两大局限：对细粒度取证伪影敏感性不足，以及依赖静态合成监督导致灵活性差和成本高。
AI.method: 1) 采用感知-裁决架构，聚合语义、空间和频域特征的多视角线索；2) 使用MLLM作为裁决模块融合信号进行逻辑推理判断；3) 引入hindsight驱动的自我改进策略，按照采样-反思-演进范式，对训练样本进行推理 rollout，参考真实标签反思失败案例，生成高质量推理轨迹；4) 通过双专家质量门控模块严格筛选，自微调持续进化。
AI.result: 在Chameleon基准上达到82.18%准确率（比AIDE高16.41%）；在AIGCDetect-Benchmark上16个生成器平均准确率达93.3%；外部评估显示比GPT-5和GPT-5-mini产生更一致且因果可解释的推理。
AI.conclusion: ForeAgent通过主动式取证框架实现迭代自进化，在AI生成图像检测任务上达到最先进水平，证明了多模态大语言模型结合自我改进策略在深度伪造检测中的有效性。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about AI-generated image detection (forensics), not text-to-motion generation. While both may use Vision-Language Models, the core task (detecting fake images vs generating 3D human motion) and target domain (image forensics vs computer graphics motion synthesis) are entirely unrelated. The pain points addressed are orthogonal - this paper focuses on identifying AI-generated images, not extracting 3D motion from video or ensuring motion quality.

title: Unbiased Canonical Set-Valued Oracles Via Lattice Theory
summary: A non-agentic "oracle" AI that estimates probabilities of future events faces a self-reference problem: once its answer is learned and acted upon, it can change the very probability it was asked to report. One response, advocated for the Scientist AI programme, is to ask only counterfactual questions, evaluated as if the answer had no influence. We observe that such answers tend to become irrelevant the moment they are learned, precisely because their premise is then false. We therefore explore a self-referential alternative in which the oracle reports not a single probability but a credal set that is simultaneously unbiased and self-consistent with the consequences of being learned. The naive self-consistency requirement is satisfied by too many sets (including the useless answer $[0,1]$), so the problem is to single out a canonical, nontrivial member. We do so with the Knaster--Tarski fixed-point theorem on the complete lattice of closed credal sets, taking the least fixed point of a suitably defined isotone operator; a variant instead reports the least fixed point that contains every self-consistent point estimate. We prove existence, self-consistency, and nonemptiness, show that the construction collapses to the classical point answer for non-performative questions, and that for a binary event the canonical answer is, under a natural hull-factoring assumption, an interval. The development is purely lattice-theoretic and extends unchanged from a binary event $B$ to an arbitrary random variable $X$, with $P(B\mid A,C)$ replaced by the conditional law $\mathcal{L}(X\mid A,C)$. We close with open questions, including whether the interval characterization itself survives that generalization.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决Oracle AI自指问题的新方法：报告一个自洽的信用集（credal set）而非单一概率值，并利用Knaster-Tarski不动点定理在完备格上构造最小不动点作为规范答案。
AI.motivation: 解决Oracle AI的自指困境：当AI的概率估计被学习和行动后，会改变被估计的概率，导致传统回答失效。现有counterfactual方法虽可行但会因前提被否定而立即失效。
AI.method: 使用Knaster-Tarski不动点定理在闭信用集的完备格上定义等距算子，求其最小不动点；变体方法求包含所有自洽点估计的最小不动点。纯格论发展，从二元事件B推广到任意随机变量X。
AI.result: 证明了存在性、自洽性和非空性；对非performative问题退化为经典点估计；对二元事件在自然hull-factoring假设下得到区间答案。
AI.conclusion: 提供了解决Oracle AI自指问题的规范框架，但区间特征是否在一般随机变量情形下保持有待开放问题。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses theoretical computer science problems (self-referential AI/Oracle AI using lattice theory and fixed-point theorems), while the research profile is in Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - this paper is about AI epistemology and counterfactual reasoning, not about generating 3D human motion from video or text. The methods (lattice theory, Knaster-Tarski fixed point theorem) have no connection to diffusion models, video generation, or vision-language models used in motion generation.

title: Coarse-to-Fine: A Hybrid Self-Supervised Method for Non-rigid 3D Shape Matching
summary: Non-rigid 3D shape matching is a fundamental task in computer vision and graphics. In this paper, we propose a hybrid self-supervised method based on a coarse-to-fine strategy, which ensures consistency between the coarse mapping and the refined correspondence produced by our refinement module. The architecture features a dual-branch design, consisting of two symmetric functional map learning streams: one based on the Laplacian basis and the other utilizing the elastic basis. Extensive experiments show that our approach not only maintains computational efficiency, but also achieves state-of-the-art performance across a variety of challenging scenarios, including non-isometric deformations and topological noise. Finally, we rigorously demonstrate that contrastive energies promote feature discrimination. Furthermore, integrating these energies with existing methods yields consistent improvements, validating the overall efficacy of our approach. Our code is available at https://github.com/LuoFeifan77/Coarse-to-Fine-Hybrid-Self-Supervised-Matching.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于粗到精策略的混合自监督方法，用于非刚性3D形状匹配。该方法采用双分支架构，包含基于拉普拉斯基和弹性基的两个对称功能 map 学习流，并通过细化模块确保粗映射和精化对应之间的一致性。
AI.motivation: 非刚性3D形状匹配是计算机视觉和图形学中的基础性任务，需要在非等距变形和拓扑噪声等挑战性场景下实现高精度匹配。现有的方法在保持计算效率和匹配精度之间难以平衡。
AI.method: 提出混合自监督方法，采用粗到精策略。架构包含双分支设计：两个对称的功能 map 学习流，分别基于拉普拉斯基和弹性基。细化模块确保粗映射与精化对应之间的一致性，并引入对比能量促进特征区分。
AI.result: 在多种挑战性场景下（包括非等距变形和拓扑噪声）达到最先进的性能，同时保持计算效率。对比能量能够有效促进特征区分，与现有方法集成可获得一致的改进。
AI.conclusion: 验证了粗到精混合自监督方法的有效性，为非刚性3D形状匹配提供了新的解决方案。

relevance_reason: While this paper is in Computer Graphics, it addresses a completely different application domain: 3D Shape Matching (finding correspondences between 3D shapes) vs the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text). The methods are also different: self-supervised shape matching with Laplacian/elastic basis vs video generation models and motion generation pipelines. Even though both deal with 3D data, shape matching is about establishing correspondences between static shapes, not generating motion sequences. The core task and methodology are unrelated to the motion generation research focus.

title: Estimating Uncertainty in Classifier Performance with Applications to Large Language Models and Nested Data
summary: Researchers increasingly use text classification--supervised models or large language models--to measure constructs from natural language, providing metrics such as recall and precision as evidence of their validity. Yet, though these metrics are point estimates subject to sampling variation, measures of uncertainty are inconsistently reported alongside them. Further, when they are reported, they are often estimated with methods that are not appropriate when relevant labelled datasets are small or performance is high. To increase and improve confidence interval reporting in the field, this paper evaluates confidence interval methods for performance metrics under conditions typical of social science text classification: small to moderate sample sizes, infrequent constructs, and texts nested within individuals. Across simulations, default methods such as the Wald interval and the basic percentile bootstrap are the least accurate, with coverage sometimes far below the nominal 95% level. Accuracy is improved with the use of Agresti-Coull, Wilson, Clopper-Pearson, and a novel pseudo-count regularized bootstrap (which is particularly relevant to the calculation of F1). When texts are nested within individuals, we demonstrate that adjustment for both effective N and the appropriate degrees of freedom is necessary for producing accurate analytic intervals. Among bootstrap intervals, the hierarchical bootstrap is more accurate than the cluster bootstrap when individuals produce a moderate number of texts but overly conservative when individuals produce only a few. By providing guidance to the field on appropriate interval estimation, we aim to improve the transparency of machine learning applications, and to encourage greater attention to the validation sample size at the design stage.

AI.tldr: 该论文评估了社会科学文本分类场景下（小样本、不频繁构念、嵌套文本）性能指标置信区间的估计方法，发现默认方法（如Wald区间和基本百分位Bootstrap）覆盖不足，而Agresti-Coull、Wilson、Clopper-Pearson和新型伪计数正则化Bootstrap方法更准确。
AI.motivation: 研究者使用文本分类模型测量自然语言构念时，通常报告精确率和召回率等指标，但这些指标是点估计，受抽样变异影响，不确定性测量（置信区间）却未被一致报告，且现有方法在小样本或高性能条件下并不适用。
AI.method: 通过模拟研究评估多种置信区间方法：Wald区间、Agresti-Coull、Wilson、Clopper-Pearson、基本百分位Bootstrap、层次Bootstrap、聚类Bootstrap及新型伪计数正则化Bootstrap，在小到中等样本量、稀有构念、文本嵌套于个体的典型社会科学文本分类条件下进行测试。
AI.result: 默认方法（Wald区间和基本百分位Bootstrap）准确性最低，覆盖率有时远低于标称95%水平；Agresti-Coull、Wilson、Clopper-Pearson和新型伪计数正则化Bootstrap（在F1计算中特别相关）提升了准确性；当文本嵌套于个体时，需调整有效N和适当自由度以产生准确的分析区间；层次Bootstrap在个体产生中等数量文本时比聚类Bootstrap更准确，但在个体只产生少量文本时过于保守。
AI.conclusion: 研究为该领域提供了选择适当区间估计方法的指导，以提高机器学习应用的透明度，并鼓励在设计阶段更加重视验证样本量的确定。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about statistical methods for confidence interval estimation in text classification (NLP/social science applications), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it deals with classifier performance evaluation in social science text analysis, not video-to-motion generation, visual-guided motion synthesis, or any computer graphics-related task. The methods (Wald intervals, Bootstrap) are statistical estimation techniques unrelated to video generation models, vision-language models for quality assessment, or 3D motion generation. There is no overlap with the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: SpaceRipple: Lightweight Semantic Delivery for Mission-Oriented LEO Earth Observation Satellite Networks
summary: Earth observation satellite networks generate massive volumes of high-resolution imagery, whereas inter-satellite and downlink resources remain limited. In many time-sensitive missions, ground users require mission-relevant semantic information rather than a full raw-image downlink. This paper proposes SpaceRipple, a lightweight framework for mission-oriented semantic delivery and on-board processing in Earth observation satellite networks. A sensing satellite performs adaptive compression and metadata generation to reduce inter-satellite traffic, while an edge computing satellite restores the received representation and extracts task-relevant semantic information. Unlike fidelity-driven image transmission, SpaceRipple coordinates compression, forwarding, restoration, and semantic inference within a collaborative pipeline, enabling semantic-oriented delivery instead of pixel-level image delivery. A compression-aware MoE enhancement module is further introduced to improve robustness under degraded visual inputs. Experimental results show that SpaceRipple achieves favorable reconstruction quality, improved semantic detection performance, and substantial bandwidth savings, demonstrating its potential for efficient and reliable Earth observation under constrained satellite-network resources.

AI.tldr: SpaceRipple是一个面向任务感知的轻量级框架,用于地球观测卫星网络中的语义信息传输与机载处理。该框架协调压缩、转发、恢复和语义推理的协作流程,实现语义导向传输而非像素级图像传输。
AI.motivation: 地球观测卫星网络生成海量高分辨率影像,但星间和下行资源有限。在时间敏感任务中,地面用户需要任务相关的语义信息而非完整的原始图像下传。
AI.method: 提出了SpaceRipple框架,包括:1)感知卫星执行自适应压缩和元数据生成以减少星间流量;2)边缘计算卫星恢复接收的表示并提取任务相关语义信息;3)引入压缩感知的MoE增强模块以提高退化视觉输入下的鲁棒性。协调压缩、转发、恢复和语义推理形成协作管道。
AI.result: 实验结果表明SpaceRipple实现了良好的重建质量、提升的语义检测性能和显著的带宽节省。
AI.conclusion: SpaceRipple在受限卫星网络资源下展现出高效可靠地球观测的潜力,为天基语义信息传递提供了新范式。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about satellite communication networks (LEO Earth observation), specifically semantic information transmission, compression, and edge computing for satellite imagery - not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: satellite networking vs. human motion generation. Despite both dealing with images in some form, the goals are completely unrelated (data transmission vs. motion synthesis).

title: Data-driven Machine Learning Cannot Reach Symbolic-level Logical Reasoning -- The Limit of the Scaling Law
summary: Sphere neural networks have achieved symbolic level syllogistic reasoning without training data, raising the question of where the limit of the scaling law for logical reasoning lies, i.e., whether data-driven machine learning systems can achieve the same level by increasing training data and training time. We show two methodological limitations that prevent supervised deep learning from reaching the symbolic-level syllogistic reasoning: (1) training data can not distinguish all 24 types of valid syllogistic reasoning; (2) end-to-end mapping from premises to conclusion introduces contradictory training targets between neural components for pattern recognition and logical reasoning. Beside theoretical analysis, we experimentally illustrate that Euler Net cannot achieve rigorous syllogistic reasoning. We further challenge the most recent ChatGPTs (GPT-5-nano and GPT-5) to determine the satisfiability of syllogistic statements in four surface forms (patterns): words, double words, simple symbols, and long random symbols, showing that surface forms affect the reasoning performance and that ChatGPT GPT-5 may reach 100% accuracy but still provide incorrect explanations. As empirical training processes are stopped after achieving 100% accuracy, we conclude that supervised machine learning systems will not attain the rigour of symbolic logical reasoning.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究监督深度学习系统能否达到符号级三段论演绎推理的能力，通过理论分析和实验证明了其局限性。
AI.motivation: 探讨数据驱动的机器学习系统是否可以通过增加训练数据和训练时间来达到符号级演绎推理的水平，类似于球形神经网络在无训练数据情况下实现的符号级三段论推理。
AI.method: 理论分析：(1)证明训练数据无法区分所有24种有效的三段论推理类型；(2)分析端到端映射从前提到结论引入的模式识别与逻辑推理之间的矛盾训练目标。实验测试：Euler Net和ChatGPT（GPT-5-nano和GPT-5）在四种表面形式（单词、双词、简单符号、长随机符号）下的三段论语句可满足性。
AI.result: 理论证明存在两个方法论限制使监督深度学习无法达到符号级三段论推理；实验表明Euler Net无法实现严格的三段论推理；ChatGPT的表面形式影响推理性能，GPT-5可能达到100%准确率但仍提供错误解释。
AI.conclusion: 由于经验训练过程在达到100%准确率后停止，监督机器学习系统将无法达到符号逻辑推理的严谨性。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - The paper is about theoretical limitations of deep learning for symbolic/syllogistic reasoning (AI/ML theory), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: one studies logical reasoning in neural networks, the other deals with video-to-3D motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to visual-to-3D motion domain gap, motion quality assessment, or video-based motion extraction. No methodological overlap exists.

title: DiCoBench: Benchmarking Multi-Image Fine-Grained Perception via Differential and Commonality Visual Cues
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026. Project page with code: https://github.com/PKU-ICST-MIPL/DICO_Bench_ECCV2026
summary: Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated impressive fine-grained perception capabilities. However, existing benchmarks predominantly rely on explicit textual cues or low-resolution inputs, failing to evaluate a model's ability to autonomously perceive implicit visual cues in high-resolution. To bridge this gap, we introduce DiCoBench, a comprehensive, multi-image high-resolution benchmark designed for cross-image fine-grained perception. DiCoBench consists of 765 meticulously curated samples categorized into two progressive tracks: Differential Visual Cues and Commonality Visual Cues, covering 8 distinct perception tasks. By formulating the benchmark as a multiple-choice question task and utilizing high-resolution imagery (approaching 2K), we eliminate evaluation metric bias and pose a substantial challenge to current state-of-the-art MLLMs. Our extensive evaluation of 18 diverse MLLMs reveals a striking performance gap compared to human accuracy (98.3\%), with top-performing models struggling significantly with micro-scale detail capture. We believe DiCoBench will serve as a challenging testbed to drive future research in autonomous, high-resolution multi-image perception.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了DiCoBench，一个针对多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)的高分辨率多图像细粒度感知基准测试，旨在填补现有基准测试无法评估模型自主感知隐式视觉线索能力的空白。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试主要依赖显式文本线索或低分辨率输入，无法评估模型在高分辨率图像中自主感知隐式视觉线索的能力，导致当前最优MLLMs在微尺度细节捕获方面存在显著性能差距。
AI.method: 构建了包含765个样本的DiCoBench基准，分为两个递进 track：差异视觉线索和共性视觉线索，覆盖8个感知任务，采用接近2K的高分辨率图像，以多项选择题形式消除评估指标偏差。
AI.result: 对18个不同的MLLMs进行广泛评估，发现与人类准确率(98.3%)相比存在显著性能差距，最优模型在微尺度细节捕获方面表现困难。
AI.conclusion: DiCoBench将成为推动未来自主高分辨率多图像感知研究的重要挑战性测试平台。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from visual/text inputs), while this paper is about benchmarking multi-image perception capabilities of Multi-modal Large Language Models (MLLMs) for visual reasoning tasks. The paper focuses on evaluating perception/understanding tasks (detecting visual differences between images), whereas the research deals with generation tasks (video-to-motion generation). Despite both involving visual elements, they are in entirely different fields with no direct relevance.

title: MKG-RAG-Bench: Benchmarking Retrieval in Multimodal Knowledge Graph-Augmented Generation
summary: Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) over knowledge graphs has emerged as a promising approach for grounding large language models, yet existing benchmarks largely overlook the challenges of retrieval in multimodal knowledge graph RAG (MKG-RAG). In practice, retrieval is a critical bottleneck: multimodal knowledge is heterogeneous, difficult to align across modalities, and often poorly served by retrievers designed for unstructured corpora. To address this gap, we introduce MKG-RAG-Bench, a cross-domain benchmark explicitly designed to evaluate retrieval in MKG-RAG. MKG-RAG-Bench is constructed from two multimodal knowledge graphs spanning general and medical domains, and includes carefully aligned question-answering datasets that support controlled evaluation of both retrieval and downstream generation. The benchmark is built using an LLM-based curation pipeline that filters low-utility knowledge, generates structurally grounded queries with exact supervision, and systematically covers diverse modality configurations. Through extensive experiments across representative retriever families and modality settings, we show that effective multimodal retrieval remains challenging yet crucial for end-to-end MKG-RAG performance, and that retrieval quality strongly determines generation outcomes. By isolating retrieval as a first-class evaluation target, MKG-RAG-Bench provides a principled foundation for diagnosing current limitations and advancing multimodal knowledge graph RAG systems.

AI.tldr: MKG-RAG-Bench是一个专门针对多模态知识图谱RAG系统中检索任务设计的跨领域基准测试，旨在评估多模态知识图谱检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基准测试大多忽略了多模态知识图谱RAG中检索环节的挑战。实际应用中，多模态知识具有异构性，难以跨模态对齐，且针对非结构化语料库设计的检索器效果不佳，检索成为关键瓶颈。
AI.method: 构建了一个LLM驱动的策展管道，从两个多模态知识图谱（通用领域和医学领域）提取数据，过滤低效用知识，生成结构化接地查询并提供精确监督，系统性覆盖多种模态配置。
AI.result: 实验表明，有效的多模态检索仍然具有挑战性，但对端到端MKG-RAG性能至关重要，检索质量直接决定生成结果。
AI.conclusion: 通过将检索作为首要评估目标，MKG-RAG-Bench为诊断当前多模态知识图谱RAG系统的局限性提供了原则性基础，有助于推动该领域的研究进展。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about multimodal knowledge graph retrieval systems for LLMs (in general/medical domains), not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. The application domain, methods, and pain points are entirely different - there is no connection to video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, or 3D motion generation.

title: LogicIR: Logic Gate Networks for Image Restoration
summary: Image restoration aims to reconstruct high-quality images from degraded low-quality inputs. As the computational demands of image restoration models continue to rise, there is growing interest in lightweight architectures optimized for fast and efficient inference. Logic gate networks (LGNs), which operate using fundamental logic operations such as NAND and XOR, have recently emerged as a promising direction for achieving highly efficient computation. However, their potential remains largely untapped in the domain of image restoration. In this work, we introduce LogicIR, the first LGN specifically designed for image restoration tasks. LogicIR incorporates a UNet-inspired architecture composed entirely of logic gates. In addition, we propose a differentiable bit decoding layer and an index shuffling mechanism that improves information propagation across logic gates. Experimental results across multiple image restoration benchmarks demonstrate that LogicIR achieves strong performance with significantly reduced computational cost, establishing LogicIR as a viable and efficient alternative for image restoration. The source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/LogicIR

AI.tldr: 本文提出了LogicIR，这是首个专门用于图像恢复任务的逻辑门网络（Logic Gate Network, LGN）。该网络采用UNet架构，完全由逻辑门（如NAND、XOR）组成，并引入了可微分比特解码层和索引 shuffling 机制。在多个图像恢复基准数据集上的实验表明，LogicIR能在显著降低计算成本的同时实现较强的性能。
AI.motivation: 随着图像恢复模型的计算需求不断增长，学界对轻量级架构的需求日益增加。逻辑门网络（LGN）具有极高的计算效率，但其在图像恢复领域的潜力尚未得到充分探索。
AI.method: 本文设计了LogicIR，采用完全由逻辑门构成的UNet架构，并提出可微分比特解码层（differentiable bit decoding layer）和索引 shuffling 机制来增强信息传播。
AI.result: 在多个图像恢复基准数据集上的实验表明，LogicIR能够在显著降低计算成本的同时实现较强的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: LogicIR作为首个专门用于图像恢复任务的LGN，提供了一种可行且高效替代方案，有望推动轻量级图像恢复模型的发展。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about Image Restoration using Logic Gate Networks - a 2D image processing task. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation in Computer Graphics - generating 3D human motion from video/text. Even though both might use UNet-like architectures, the application domains are entirely different: image restoration vs. motion generation. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation, video-to-3D motion extraction, or visual-guided motion synthesis.

title: auto-psych: Automating the science of mind using agent-driven theory discovery and experimentation
summary: AI-based scientific automation is increasingly possible by using agents to generate hypotheses, design experiments, and analyze data. Data collection is a major bottleneck in this pipeline, however. Psychology, and computational cognitive science in particular, is well-positioned to benefit from AI experimentation because theories are often represented as code and crowdsourcing platforms enable programmatic human data collection at scale. Here, we apply automated discovery techniques to the project of generating theories in computational cognitive science, with an agent-based system collecting human data independently through crowdsourced survey experiments. As a testbed, we use a classic case study from cognitive psychology: judging which sequences of coin flips seem subjectively more random. Our system, auto-psych, uses nested agent-based discovery loops to generate explanatory theories of human behavior. The inner loop conjectures, fits, and critiques probabilistic cognitive models; the outer loop designs experiments to test these models, launches them online, and analyzes the data. This system can quickly and reliably recover ground-truth theories from synthetic data via systematic experimentation, but the nested structure is critical to model performance. Further, in three independent sequences of human experiments, the system finds theories that fit the data better than theories generated from the scientific literature. This work thus demonstrates the feasibility of automated data collection and theory discovery in computational cognitive science.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了auto-psych系统，一个基于AI的自动化发现工具，用于计算认知科学中的理论生成。该系统通过嵌套的代理发现循环生成解释人类行为的理论，内环进行猜想、拟合和批评概率认知模型，外环设计实验、在线发布并分析数据。以经典的硬币抛掷序列随机性判断为测试场景，系统在合成数据上能快速恢复真实理论，并在三组独立的人类实验中找到比文献更好的理论。
AI.motivation: 数据收集是AI科学自动化的主要瓶颈。心理学和计算认知科学尤其适合AI实验，因为理论可以用代码表示，众包平台可实现程序化的人类数据收集。作者希望将自动化发现技术应用于计算认知科学中的理论生成。
AI.method: 作者开发了auto-psych系统，采用嵌套代理发现循环架构。内环进行猜想、拟合和批评概率认知模型；外环设计实验、在线发布众包调查并分析数据。以认知心理学中经典的硬币抛掷序列随机性判断为测试场景，进行三组独立的人类实验。
AI.result: 系统能通过系统化实验从合成数据中快速可靠地恢复真实理论，嵌套结构对模型性能至关重要。三组独立人类实验表明，系统发现的理论与数据拟合优于从科学文献中生成的理論。
AI.conclusion: 本研究证明了在计算认知科学中实现自动化数据收集和理论发现的可行性，为AI辅助科学研究提供了新的方法论框架。

relevance_reason: This paper is about computational cognitive science and AI-driven theory discovery for psychology, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It addresses automating scientific hypothesis generation in cognitive psychology (coin toss randomness judgment), not visual-to-3D motion synthesis, video generation, or motion quality assessment. The application domain is entirely different - this is AI for science rather than graphics/motion generation.

title: TaskTok: Delving into Task Tokens for Task-driven Image Restoration
summary: While traditional image restoration focuses on perceptual quality, Task-Driven Image Restoration (TDIR) aims to maximize the performance of downstream high-level vision tasks. Recent approaches leveraging generative priors have shown promise for TDIR; however, they typically suffer from computational inefficiency and potential semantic alteration by indiscriminately updating all latent tokens. In this paper, we posit that not all visual information is equally important for machine perception. Through an analysis of the latent token space, we observe that task-relevant cues are unevenly distributed across the token sequence, exhibiting index-wise specialization. This suggests that selectively refining a subset of tokens can be sufficient for task-driven objectives. Leveraging this insight, we propose TaskTok, a novel framework that selectively restores only task-relevant tokens via a learnable token switch and a lightweight token refinement module. Extensive experiments across image classification, semantic segmentation, and object detection demonstrate that TaskTok significantly enhances task performance with high computational efficiency. The source code is available at https://github.com/jimmy9704/TaskTok

AI.tldr: TaskTok是一种任务驱动的图像恢复框架，通过选择性恢复任务相关tokens来提升下游高级视觉任务的性能，解决传统生成先验方法计算效率低和语义改变的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统图像恢复关注感知质量，而任务驱动图像恢复(TDIR)旨在最大化下游高级视觉任务的性能。现有的生成先验方法存在计算效率低和潜在语义改变的问题。
AI.method: 通过分析latent token空间，发现任务相关线索在token序列中分布不均匀，呈现索引级专业化。由此提出TaskTok框架，包含可学习的token switch和轻量级token refinement module，选择性地只恢复任务相关tokens。
AI.result: 在图像分类、语义分割和目标检测等任务上的广泛实验表明，TaskTok显著提升了任务性能，同时具有较高的计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 选择性恢复任务相关tokens的方法是有效的，能够在保证任务性能的同时提高计算效率，为TDIR领域提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about image restoration for downstream computer vision tasks (classification, segmentation, detection), which is completely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both may use similar token-based approaches, the application domain is entirely different - this paper deals with enhancing static images, not generating 3D human motion from video/text. The pain points, methods, and goals are unrelated to motion generation, visual-to-3D motion bridging, or video-to-motion extraction.

title: Clinical Harness for Governable Medical AI Skill Ecosystems
summary: Medical AI remains organized around isolated models, whereas clinical care requires accountable capabilities that persist across time. We propose clinical AI skills and the Clinical Harness: a runtime governance architecture for registering, orchestrating, guarding and monitoring AI-enabled clinical capabilities. Using osteoporosis as an exemplar, we show how knowledge-driven, data-driven and physics-enhanced skills can support lifecycle care under runtime governance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出"临床AI技能"概念和"Clinical Harness"运行时治理架构，解决医学AI模型孤立缺乏持久性问题，以骨质疏松症为例展示知识驱动、数据驱动和物理增强技能的整合。
AI.motivation: 当前医学AI研究围绕孤立模型开展，缺乏跨时间持久和可追溯的临床能力，而实际临床护理需要能够在整个诊疗过程中持续发挥作用并被监管的能力体系。
AI.method: 提出Clinical Harness运行时治理架构，实现AI临床能力的注册、编排、监护和监控功能；以骨质疏松症为示例，整合知识驱动、数据驱动和物理增强三种AI技能支持全生命周期护理。
AI.result: 成功构建了可运行治理的AI临床能力框架，展示了 osteoporosis 示例中三种技能如何在运行时治理下协同工作，实现从诊断到随访的持续性AI辅助。
AI.conclusion: Clinical Harness为医学AI从孤立模型向持续性临床能力提供了可行架构路径，有望推动AI在临床实践中的规模化部署和监管合规。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical AI for clinical applications (osteoporosis diagnosis/treatment), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - medical healthcare vs computer graphics/motion generation. It does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion extraction, visual-to-3D domain gap, or motion quality assessment. The methods discussed (Clinical Harness governance architecture) are unrelated to video generation models or motion generation pipelines.

title: Position Rebinding Cache Reuse: Replay-Free Visual Revisiting for Interleaved Multimodal Reasoning
summary: Interleaved multimodal reasoning improves visual grounding by revisiting visual evidence during multi-step generation, yet existing methods typically rely on token replay, repeatedly forwarding selected visual tokens. A natural shortcut is to reuse the historical visual key-value (KV) cache directly. However, we identify a critical failure mode of this strategy: cached visual keys are already bound to their original positional context. Such stale positional binding distorts attention under later decoding contexts and can trigger severe autoregressive decoding collapse. This failure suggests that effective cache reuse requires reconstructing visual evidence under positions compatible with the current decoding state, rather than directly copying position-bound historical cache entries. To this end, we propose Position Rebinding Cache Reuse (PRCR), a cache-level framework for replay-free visual revisiting. PRCR stores raw visual KV cache together with their original spatial coordinates, then reassigns position-compatible coordinates to select entries and rebinds their keys before injecting the reconstructed cache into the active decoder cache. This design reuses historical visual evidence while preserving textual positional continuity and relative visual structure. Experiments across multiple multimodal reasoning benchmarks show that PRCR achieves replay-level or better performance, improving average accuracy by 5 percent and reducing visual-revisiting computation by up to tens of thousands of times.

AI.tldr: 本文提出位置重绑定缓存重用(PRCR)框架，用于多模态推理中的视觉基础化任务。该方法通过重新绑定视觉特征的坐标位置来实现无重放的视觉回顾，避免了传统方法中重复转发视觉token的高计算成本。
AI.motivation: 现有 interleaved multimodal reasoning 方法通过 token replay（重复转发选定的视觉 token）实现视觉回顾，但计算开销巨大。虽然可直接重用历史视觉 KV 缓存，但发现关键问题：缓存的视觉 key 已绑定到原始位置上下文，这种 stale positional binding 在后续解码上下文下会导致注意力扭曲，严重时引发自回归解码崩溃。
AI.method: PRCR 将原始视觉 KV 缓存与其空间坐标一起存储，然后为选定条目重新分配与当前位置兼容的坐标，并在注入活动解码器缓存之前重新绑定其 key。该设计在保持文本位置连续性和视觉结构相对关系的同时重用历史视觉证据。
AI.result: 在多个多模态推理基准数据集上的实验表明，PRCR 达到或超过 replay 级别的性能，平均准确率提升 5%，视觉回顾计算量减少高达数万倍。
AI.conclusion: 有效的缓存重用需要在与当前解码状态兼容的位置下重建视觉证据，而不是直接复制绑定到位置的历史缓存条目。PRCR 为无重放的视觉回顾提供了一个缓存级框架。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses multimodal reasoning in LLMs/VLMs (visual grounding, KV cache reuse, positional binding for efficient LLM inference), which is completely different from the research profile's Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation domain. While both involve visual features, this paper focuses on improving inference efficiency for vision-language models, not on generating 3D human motion from video/text. The application domains are entirely distinct - motion generation vs. LLM reasoning.

title: Humans Disengage, Reasoning Models Persist: Separating Difficulty Registration from Deliberation Allocation
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) take longer on harder problems, just as humans do. This surface similarity hides an opposite pattern within items. When an LRM gets a problem wrong, it spends more tokens than when it gets the same problem right; humans do the reverse, spending less time on the trials they get wrong. We separate two levels of deliberation: how response time tracks difficulty across items (registration), and, with item identity held fixed, whether an agent spends more on its own failures or successes (allocation). On a public matched human-LRM corpus, humans and all five thinking LRMs reproduce the known cross-item alignment (registration) but diverge within items (allocation): every LRM shows a large wrong-vs-right effect (Cohen's d = 1.47-3.13 on H-ARC) while humans show the opposite sign. The comparison stays inside each agent's own scale; we never put seconds and tokens on one axis. The dissociation holds under item fixed effects, replicates across datasets, and is absent in a non-thinking baseline. We read the human pattern as engagement versus abandonment: people stay on items they expect to solve and give up on the rest. We read the LRM pattern as length driven by uncertainty: chains grow when the model is unsure, which is exactly when it tends to fail. Both policies produce the same cross-item correlation with difficulty, so they look aligned on the measure prior work has used; the divergence shows up only once item identity is fixed. Under resource-rational metareasoning, the split is between two stopping policies that share a difficulty signal but implement opposite control; trace length captures the signal and misses the control.

AI.tldr: 研究大型推理模型(LRM)与人类在思考过程中的差异：两者在跨项目难度感知上相似(registration)，但在单个项目内部对错误vs正确答案的投入上相反(allocation)。人类在答错时放弃(花更少时间)，LRM在不确定时延长推理链(花更多tokens)。
AI.motivation: 之前研究只关注跨项目相关性，忽略项目内部差异。作者想探究LRM和人类是否真的有相似的思维机制，还是只是表面相似。
AI.method: 在匹配的LRM-人类语料库上，对比5个thinking LRMs和人类在答题正确vs错误时的tokens/时间消耗，控制项目固定效应，跨数据集验证，并对比非thinking基线模型。
AI.result: 所有模型在跨项目难度上与人类一致(Cohen's d=1.47-3.13)；但在项目内部，人类答错时花更少时间，LRM答错时花更多tokens，效应相反。分离出两种停止策略：人类是engagement vs abandonment，LRM是uncertainty-driven length。
AI.conclusion: 表面相似性掩盖了根本性的控制差异。资源理性元推理框架下，两种策略共享难度信号但实现相反的控制。需要区分信号捕获与控制机制。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) and their token allocation strategies in reasoning tasks - entirely in the AI/LLM research domain. It has no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, or any 3D motion generation methods. The application domain is fundamentally different.

title: Temporally Consistent Label Interpolation for Robust Surgical Multi-Task Learning under Challenging Conditions
summary: Effective multi-task learning for surgical scene understanding is fundamentally hindered by annotation granularity mismatch; temporal workflow tasks such as phase recognition, step recognition and anticipation benefit from dense frame-level supervision, whereas pixel-level spatial tasks including instrument segmentation and action recognition are only sparsely annotated on selected keyframes due to prohibitive labeling costs. This supervision imbalance undermines shared representation learning and limits joint optimization across heterogeneous surgical tasks. To address this, we propose Flow-guided Annotation for Robust Operating Scenes (FAROS), a flow-guided label interpolation framework, that combines zero-shot segmentation-based mask propagation with optical flow estimation to overcome the limitations of appearance-based propagation under challenging surgical conditions such as occlusion, smoke, and motion blur, generating temporally consistent dense pseudo labels from sparse keyframe annotations. The densified instrument masks and action labels are integrated into a unified Transformer-based multi-task framework that jointly learns surgical phase recognition, step recognition, anticipation, instrument segmentation, and action recognition, enabling balanced optimization between dense temporal supervision and sparse spatial supervision. The label interpolation quality of FAROS is first validated on the DAVIS 2017 benchmark under a sparse ground-truth protocol, confirming robust propagation beyond the surgical domain. Extensive experiments on GraSP, MISAW, and AutoLaparo benchmarks further demonstrate that FAROS significantly improves cross-task representation learning and enhances holistic surgical scene understanding performance across spatio-temporal tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FAROS框架，通过光流引导的标签插值和零样本分割掩码传播，解决手术场景多任务学习中注释粒度不匹配的问题，从稀疏关键帧注释生成密集伪标签，实现时空任务的联合优化。
AI.motivation: 手术场景理解中的多任务学习受到注释粒度不匹配的 fundamental 阻碍：时间workflow任务（如相位识别、步骤识别和预测）受益于密集的帧级监督，而像素级空间任务（如器械分割和动作识别）仅在选定关键帧上稀疏注释。这种监督不平衡破坏了共享表示学习，限制了异构手术任务的联合优化。
AI.method: 提出Flow-guided Annotation for Robust Operating Scenes (FAROS)框架，结合零样本分割的掩码传播与光流估计，在遮挡、烟雾和运动模糊等挑战性手术条件下克服基于外观传播的局限性，从稀疏关键帧注释生成时序一致的密集伪标签。将增强的器械掩码和动作标签集成到统一的Transformer多任务框架中，联合学习手术相位识别、步骤识别、预测、器械分割和动作识别，实现密集时间监督与稀疏空间监督之间的平衡优化。
AI.result: 在DAVIS 2017基准上验证FAROS的标签插值质量，在稀疏真值协议下确认了跨手术域的鲁棒传播。GraSP、MISAW和AutoLaparo基准的广泛实验表明，FAROS显著改善了跨任务表示学习，提高了时空任务的整体手术场景理解性能。
AI.conclusion: FAROS通过光流引导的标签插值有效解决了手术场景多任务学习中的注释粒度不匹配问题，为异构手术任务的联合优化提供了新思路，显著提升了跨任务表示学习和整体手术场景理解性能。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about surgical/medical image analysis (multi-task learning for surgical phase recognition, instrument segmentation) while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (human motion generation from visual/text inputs). Although both use optical flow and visual guidance techniques, this paper addresses medical annotation propagation challenges, not 3D motion generation from 2D video priors. The pain points are fundamentally different - this deals with sparse vs dense annotations in medical imaging, not extracting 3D motion or ensuring quality/consistency of generated human motions.

title: NeuraDock Visual Cognitive Load Agent Tutorial: A Quality-Gated Open-Source EEG Workflow for Alpha Dynamics and Real-Time Applications
summary: This tutorial paper provides a step-by-step, reproducible walkthrough of NeuraDock Agent, an open-source EEG agent focused on Alpha dynamics and visual cognitive-load analysis. The goal is practical: a reader should be able to install the agent, run EEG preprocessing and quality control, generate Alpha dynamics figures, perform within-subject Rest/Task visual cognitive-load comparison, run the public mini-dataset analyses and compare them with the reference validation summary, start an online dashboard, call the real-time API from an external application, and use the LLM interpretation layer to explain quality risks. Existing EEG toolkits provide excellent offline analysis, but assembling a real-time, quality-gated cognitive-load pipeline often requires manually bridging acquisition, custom QC, Alpha feature extraction, and a web API; this tutorial closes that offline-to-online gap. The tutorial uses a quality-gated workflow: downstream Alpha and workload metrics are computed only after preprocessing and QC gating rather than directly from raw EEG. In the included mini-dataset validation, the agent processed 18 recordings, generated 10 within-subject comparisons, observed task-related posterior Alpha suppression in 7 of 10 contrasts, estimated initial evidence of within-subject repeatability, and benchmarked local online API latency. The tutorial is intended for researchers, developers, and applied teams who want a transparent path from EEG files to real-time visual cognitive-load prototypes.

AI.tldr: NeuraDock Agent是一个开源的EEG代理工具，专注于Alpha波动态分析和视觉认知负荷分析，提供从安装、预处理、质量控制、可视化、统计分析到实时API和LLM解释的完整端到端工作流程。
AI.motivation: 现有EEG工具包提供优秀的离线分析，但构建实时、质量可控的认知负荷Pipeline需要手动整合采集、定制QC、Alpha特征提取和Web API，缺乏从离线到在线的直接解决方案。
AI.method: 采用质量门控工作流程：下游Alpha和负荷指标仅在预处理和QC门控后计算，而非直接从原始EEG计算。包含18个 recordings的mini-dataset验证。
AI.result: 处理了18个 recordings，生成了10个受试者内比较，观察到10个对比中7个存在任务相关的后部Alpha抑制，获取了受试者内重复性的初步证据，并基准测试了本地在线API延迟。
AI.conclusion: 为研究人员、开发人员和应用团队提供了从EEG文件到实时视觉认知负荷原型的透明路径。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about EEG (brain wave) analysis for cognitive load measurement - an entirely different field from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is Neuroscience/BCI, not computer graphics or motion generation. Even though both fields use signal processing, they address completely different problems: extracting brain activity patterns vs generating 3D human motion from visual inputs. None of the pain points (visual-to-3D motion extraction, motion quality) or methods (video generation, 3D motion models) align with this EEG-focused work.

title: FracEvent: Event-Camera Simulation via Fractional-Relaxation Pixel Dynamics
summary: Event cameras asynchronously report brightness changes with microsecond-level temporal resolution, but real event data remain difficult to collect at scale because specialized sensors, careful synchronization, and task-specific annotations are required. Event-camera simulation is therefore important to event-based vision tasks. Most practical simulators build on contrast-threshold event generation, some with additional filtering, stochastic noise, or hand-tuned sensor parameters. While effective, such formulations often simplify the temporal structure produced by the lifecycle of each pixel, which can distort event timing and weaken downstream transfer. We introduce FracEvent, an event simulator that models this pixel-level lifecycle with fractional-relaxation voltage dynamics. Given a log-intensity trajectory, FracEvent drives a compact stack of relaxation modes, combines their responses into a voltage state, emits ON/OFF events by localizing threshold crossings on the continuous voltage trajectory, and updates the reference while retaining the underlying memory modes. This retained state links residual voltage response to later event timing. We evaluate FracEvent through event-stream comparison and downstream transfer on image reconstruction and optical flow estimation. Across multiple datasets, FracEvent improves the temporal structure of generated events and achieves stronger downstream-transfer results than competing simulator baselines, showing its practical value for event-camera simulation.

AI.tldr: FracEvent是一种新型事件相机模拟器，通过分数阶弛豫电压动力学模型来模拟像素级生命周期，从而生成更精确的事件流。现有模拟器简化了像素的时间结构，导致事件时序失真。FracEvent采用堆栈弛豫模式结合响应，生成电压状态，通过在连续电压轨迹上定位阈值交叉来发射ON/OFF事件，并保留内存模式以建立残差电压与后续事件时序的关联。
AI.motivation: 事件相机虽具有微秒级时间分辨率，但真实事件数据收集困难，需要专用传感器、同步和标注。现有模拟器大多基于对比度阈值事件生成，简化了像素生命周期的时间结构，导致事件时序失真并削弱下游任务迁移效果。因此需要更精确地模拟像素级时间动态。
AI.method: 给定对数强度轨迹，FracEvent驱动紧凑的弛豫模式堆栈，将响应合并为电压状态，通过在连续电压轨迹上定位阈值交叉来发射ON/OFF事件，更新参考值同时保留底层记忆模式，从而建立残差电压与后续事件时序的关联。
AI.result: FracEvent在多个数据集上改善了生成事件的时间结构，在图像重建和光流估计的下游迁移任务中取得了比现有模拟器更强的结果。
AI.conclusion: FracEvent通过分数阶弛豫电压动力学模型更准确地模拟了事件相机的像素级时间动态，显著提升了事件时序精度和下游任务迁移效果，证明了事件相机模拟的实用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text), while this paper is about Event Camera Simulation (simulating a specific type of vision sensor using fractional relaxation pixel dynamics). Even though both relate to computer vision, they are in entirely different sub-fields - this paper has no connection to motion generation, video generation models, or visual-to-3D motion bridging. Event camera simulation is about sensor modeling, not motion synthesis.

title: Boundary-Aware Context Grounding for A Low-Channel EEG Agent
summary:
Large language models (LLMs) can make scientific software easier to use. However, a general model does not automatically know which measurements a particular sensor can support, which algorithms are implemented in the current software, or which conclusions are justified by a computed result. These distinctions are especially important for low-channel electroencephalography (EEG), where sparse spatial coverage and variable signal quality make plausible but unsupported interpretations easy to produce. We present NeuraDock Agent, an open-source architecture that separates a deterministic local EEG engine from a hardware-aware language layer. The numerical engine parses recordings, performs quality control, executes reviewed spectral workflows, and writes machine-readable artifacts. The LLM receives only a compact, allowlisted summary and a versioned context pack. The context describes the seven-channel hardware, reviewed workflows, result fields, implementation boundaries, scientific limits, and reference cases. Raw EEG and dense per-sample arrays remain local
  We evaluate the system at three levels. First, 12 recordings produced identical structured results over ten numerical repetitions, and a complete Rest/Task run produced identical result, report, and figure hashes over three repetitions. Second, request-capture and failure-injection experiments confirmed the tested data boundary and preservation of local artifacts under HTTP, malformed-output, and connection failures. Third, a boundary-awareness benchmark tested 36 ordinary and adversarial questions under four context ablations and two LLMs, yielding 288 outputs.These results support hardware- and implementation-aware grounding as a practical mechanism for calibrating what an EEG agent accepts, qualifies, or refuses; they do not establish clinical validity or a validated absolute cognitive-load index.

AI.tldr: NeuraDock Agent是一个开源架构,将确定性本地EEG引擎与硬件感知语言层分离,通过受限制的上下文摘要确保LLM仅能做出EEG硬件和软件实际支持的声明,避免低通道EEG产生看似合理但实际不支持的解读。
AI.motivation: 通用大语言模型无法自动了解特定传感器的测量能力、当前软件实现的算法,或计算结果合理支持哪些结论。这些问题在低通道EEG中尤其重要,因为稀疏的空间覆盖和可变的信号质量容易产生看似合理但实际不支持的解读。
AI.method: 系统架构包含两部分:1)数值引擎解析原始记录、执行质量控制、执行已审查的光谱工作流并写入机器可读产物;2)LLM仅接收紧凑的允许列表摘要和版本化上下文包,描述七通道硬件、已审查工作流、结果字段、实现边界、科学限制和参考案例。原始EEG和密集每样本数组保留在本地。
AI.result: 三级评估结果:1)12个记录在十次数值重复中产生相同结构化结果,完整Rest/Task运行在三次重复中产生相同结果、报告和图形哈希;2)请求捕获和故障注入实验确认了数据边界和本地产物在HTTP、畸形输出和连接故障下的保存;3)边界感知基准测试在四种上下文消融和两个LLM下测试36个普通和对抗性问题,产生288个输出。
AI.conclusion: 硬件和实现感知的接地是校准EEG代理接受、限定或拒绝内容的实用机制,但不建立临床有效性或经验证的绝对认知负荷指标。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about EEG (brain signal) processing and medical signal analysis with LLMs, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (3D human motion from video). The application domains are entirely different - biomedical signal processing vs. computer graphics/motion generation. Despite both mentioning LLMs and context, the use cases are fundamentally different. EEG signal analysis has no relevance to video-to-motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, or 3D motion synthesis.

title: LayersReg: A Layer-by-Layer Progressive Regressor for Reliable Intraoperative 3D/2D Registration
summary: 3D/2D registration serves as a cornerstone technique in surgical navigation. Traditional iterative optimization algorithms suffer from low efficiency and high failure rates in intraoperative settings. Deep learning-based methods reformulate registration from iterative optimization to a regression problem that maps image appearance features to spatial pose, typically achieving improved real-time performance and accuracy. However, such learnable methods are confined to memory-driven retrieval of specific pose features rather than understanding the task of image alignment itself, which limits their generalization in complex scenarios. We propose LayersReg, a pioneering regression paradigm that endows the model with 3D anatomical awareness and searches for the correct pose in a progressive, layer-by-layer manner. Inspired by the iterative pose-searching optimization criterion of classical registration, LayersReg searches for correlations between the moving and fixed images in feature space, capturing the trend of pixel flow and thereby converging iteratively toward the correct spatial pose transformation. We further design a coupling of node-wise regression with the progressive registration framework to enhance the model's perception of spatial pose changes. Experimental results demonstrate that under large offsets and multimodality conditions, LayersReg achieves high accuracy on both X-ray/CT registration (0.68°, 1.41 mm) and slice localization (0.73°, 1.55 mm) tasks, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods while meeting the intraoperative demands for precision and real-time capability.

AI.tldr: LayersReg是一种新型的3D/2D配准方法，通过逐层递进的回归范式解决外科导航中的实时配准问题。该方法赋予模型3D解剖感知能力，以迭代方式搜索正确姿态，在大偏移和多模态条件下达到高精度。
AI.motivation: 传统迭代优化算法在术中环境下效率低、失败率高。现有深度学习方法将配准问题重新表述为回归问题，实现了实时性能和精度的提升，但这些方法局限于特定姿态特征的记忆检索而非真正理解图像对齐任务本身，导致在复杂场景下泛化能力受限。
AI.method: 提出LayersReg，一种开创性的回归范式：1）赋予模型3D解剖感知能力；2）以逐层递进方式搜索正确姿态；3）在特征空间中搜索移动图像与固定图像之间的相关性，捕捉像素流趋势从而迭代收敛到正确空间姿态变换；4）设计节点级回归与渐进配准框架的耦合以增强模型对空间姿态变化的感知。
AI.result: 在大偏移和多模态条件下，X射线/CT配准达到0.68°、1.41mm，切片定位达到0.73°、1.55mm，优于现有最先进方法，同时满足术中精度和实时性要求。
AI.conclusion: LayersReg通过渐进式层搜索策略有效解决了3D/2D配准的精度和速度问题，为外科导航提供了一种有前景的实时高精度配准方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses medical/surgical image registration (X-ray/CT 3D/2D registration for surgical navigation), which is entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both deal with 3D/2D relationships, the application domains are completely unrelated - this is medical imaging for surgery, not motion generation for graphics/animation. The pain points, methods, and target outputs have no overlap with the research profile's interest in video-to-motion generation.

title: Radical AI Interpretability
comment: Draft of manuscript to appear as Cambridge Element in the Philosophy of Artificial Intelligence
summary: We develop a framework for interpreting AI systems as agents, drawing on the philosophical tradition of radical interpretation and the tools of mechanistic interpretability. The core question is: given the computational facts about a system, how do we solve for its beliefs, desires, and meanings? This matters increasingly for safety. We want to be able to trust the systems we deploy, whether by understanding their goals or, more modestly, by reliably detecting deception. Interpretability researchers are building tools to read beliefs and desires off a model's internals, but there is no settled account of when such a tool has succeeded. This book supplies one. We propose criteria on both representationalist and interpretationist approaches, and tie each to tests current interpretability methods can carry out. A central lesson is that these attributions cannot be made piecemeal. Beliefs, desires, and the propositional structure they presuppose are jointly constrained, and a method that fixes one while measuring the others inherits whatever distortions that introduces. This holism becomes pressing for AI systems, which may not share the interpreter's concepts. However, it also provides leverage: a system's attitudes constrain its propositional structure, that structure constrains which attitudes can be attributed, and mechanistic interpretability can help us measure both.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了一个将AI系统解释为智能体的框架，融合了激进展观传统的哲学方法和机械论可解释性的工具。核心是解决给定系统计算事实后如何推断其信念、欲望和意义。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统部署增加，安全问题日益突出。需要建立对系统的信任，包括理解其目标或更务实地检测欺骗行为。这直接关系到AI安全。
AI.method: 本文提出表征主义和解释主义两种方法的标准，并将每种方法与当前可解释性方法能进行的测试联系起来。核心方法是强调信念、欲望和命题结构的联合约束，不能零散地做出归因。
AI.result: 关键发现是这些归因不能零敲碎打地完成。信念、欲望及其预设的命题结构是jointly constrained（联合约束）的，一种方法在测量其他维度时会产生扭曲。这种整体论对AI系统尤其紧迫，因为AI可能不共享解释者的概念。
AI.conclusion: 系统的态度约束其命题结构，该结构又约束哪些态度可以归因于此。机械论可解释性可帮助测量两者。需要采用整体论方法来可靠地解释AI系统的内部状态。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI interpretability and explainability for AI safety - a completely different field from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely distinct: this paper focuses on understanding AI systems' beliefs, desires, and internal states for safety purposes, while the research profile concerns generating 3D human motion from video/text using video generation models and vision-language models. There is no overlap in methods or application domains.

title: Disco-LoRA: Disentangled Composition of Content, Style, and Motion for Multi-concept Video Customization
summary: Video customization based on Text-to-Video (T2V) models aims to learn specific features from reference data to generate controllable videos. While significant strides have been made in image stylization and video motion customization, simultaneously controlling multiple concepts, such as content, style, and motion, remains a major challenge. In this work, we systematically define the task of multi-concept video customization, which requires the joint control of content, style, and motion. To facilitate research in this area, we construct a comprehensive benchmark and propose Disco-LoRA, a unified framework designed to tackle this problem by disentangling and flexibly recombining different concepts in two stages: (1) We decompose the objective into two sub-tasks: Content-Style and Content-Motion. Each sub-task is addressed using our Iterative Dual-LoRA Disentanglement Framework, which effectively disentangles distinct concepts within the data. (2) We identify layer-wise weight trends as crucial for LoRA identity, while weight magnitudes dictate composability. To harmonize these scales, we propose a Z-score-based statistical regularization that aligns weight distributions, preserving layer-wise trends while minimizing interference between different LoRAs. Extensive experiments show that Disco-LoRA excels in multi-concept video customization, effectively preserving appearance, style, and motion for controllable text-to-video generation.

AI.tldr: Disco-LoRA是一个统一的多概念视频定制框架，通过两阶段迭代解耦方法实现内容、风格和运动的可控生成，并提出Z-score统计正则化来协调不同LoRA权重分布。
AI.motivation: 现有T2V模型难以同时控制多个概念（内容、风格、运动），多概念视频定制是一个重要但尚未系统解决的研究问题。
AI.method: 提出迭代双LoRA解耦框架，将任务分解为内容-风格和内容-运动两个子任务分别处理；引入Z-score统计正则化对齐权重分布，保持层间趋势同时减少LoRA间干扰。
AI.result: Disco-LoRA在多概念视频定制任务上表现优异，能有效保留外观、风格和运动特征，实现可控的文本到视频生成。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为多概念视频定制提供了有效的统一框架和基准数据集，推动了T2V模型在多维度控制方面的发展。

relevance_reason: While Disco-LoRA uses a two-stage pipeline and addresses motion control in generation (similar to the research profile's methods), this paper is about TEXT-TO-VIDEO GENERATION (2D video frames), not TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION (3D human skeletal motion). Video generation and motion generation are fundamentally different application domains - one creates visual content, the other creates motion data for characters. The pain points differ significantly: the profile focuses on 3D motion extraction from 2D priors and visual-to-3D motion bridging, while this paper addresses multi-concept control in video generation. Only loosely related through shared diffusion-based generation approaches.

title: PMDformer: Patch-Mean Decoupling Information Transformer for Long-term Forecasting
summary: Long-term time series forecasting (LTSF) plays a crucial role in fields such as energy management, finance, and traffic prediction. Transformer-based models have adopted patch-based strategies to capture long-range dependencies, but accurately modeling shape similarities across patches and variables remains challenging due to scale differences. To address this, we introduce patch-mean decoupling (PMD), which separates the trend and residual shape information by subtracting the mean of each patch, preserving the original structure and ensuring that the attention mechanism captures true shape similarities. Futhermore, to more effectively model long-range dependencies and capture cross-variable relationships, we propose Trend Restoration Attention (TRA) and Proximal Variable Attention (PVA). The former module reintegrates the decoupled trend from PMD while calculating attention output. And the latter focuses cross-variable attention on the most relevant, recent time segments to avoid overfitting on outdated correlations. Combining these components, we propose PMDformer, a model designed to effectively capture shape similarity in long-term forecasting scenarios. Extensive experiments indicate that PMDformer outperforms existing state-of-the-art methods in stability and accuracy across multiple LTSF benchmarks. The code is available at https://github.com/aohu1105/PMDformer.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PMDformer模型，解决长期时间序列预测中捕捉patches间形状相似性的挑战。核心创新包括：patch-mean decoupling (PMD) 分离趋势和残差形状信息；Trend Restoration Attention (TRA) 恢复趋势信息；Proximal Variable Attention (PVA) 关注近期相关时间片段。实验表明PMDformer在多个基准上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型采用基于patch的策略捕捉长程依赖，但在建模不同scale的patches间形状相似性方面存在挑战。
AI.method: 提出patch-mean decoupling (PMD) 分离趋势和残差；设计Trend Restoration Attention (TRA) 恢复趋势同时计算注意力；设计Proximal Variable Attention (PVA) 关注近期相关变量关系。
AI.result: PMDformer在多个LTSF基准上优于现有最先进方法，具有更好的稳定性和准确性。
AI.conclusion: 通过PMD、TRA和PVA的协同作用，PMDformer能有效捕捉长期预测场景中的形状相似性，为时序预测提供了新的有效方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Long-term Time Series Forecasting (LTSF) - predicting future values in temporal data like financial/energy series. This is a COMPLETELY DIFFERENT application domain from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both papers use Transformer architectures, PMDformer addresses time series prediction challenges (trend/residual decoupling), not 3D human motion generation from video/text. The pain points are entirely different: the research profile focuses on visual-to-3D motion domain gaps and motion quality, while this paper focuses on temporal dependencies in scalar time series data. There is no overlap in application domain.

title: DeCoFlow: Structural Decomposition of Normalizing Flows for Continual Anomaly Detection
summary: In industrial environments, new product categories arrive sequentially, requiring continual anomaly detection without access to past data. Normalizing Flows (NFs) provide exact density estimation but suffer from catastrophic forgetting as parameter updates across tasks distort the density manifold. While parameter isolation can prevent interference, it must preserve the strict invertibility and Jacobian validity of NFs. To satisfy these requirements, we exploit the inherent property that affine coupling layers maintain transformation validity regardless of subnet parameterization. Based on this, we propose DeCoFlow, which decomposes subnets into a frozen universal base and task-specific low-rank adapters to isolate updates. We further introduce Task-Specific Alignment, Auxiliary Coupling Layers, and Tail-Aware Loss to compensate for frozen-base rigidity. DeCoFlow achieves state-of-the-art image-level AUROCs of 98.40% on MVTec-AD and 93.00% on VisA, while maintaining parameter-level zero forgetting (0.00% FM under correct routing) with only 2.27M parameters per task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeCoFlow，一种基于规范化流的持续异常检测方法，通过将子网络分解为冻结的通用基座和任务特定低秩适配器来解决灾难性遗忘问题。
