AI.motivation: 工业环境中新产品类别顺序到达，需要持续进行异常检测但无法访问历史数据。规范化流虽能提供精确密度估计，但在跨任务学习时会发生灾难性遗忘，参数更新会扭曲密度流形。
AI.method: 利用仿射耦合层保持变换有效性的内在特性，将子网络分解为冻结的通用基座和任务特定低秩适配器以隔离更新。引入任务特定对齐、辅助耦合层和尾部感知损失来补偿冻结基座的刚性。
AI.result: 在MVTec-AD上达到98.40%的图像级AUROC，在VisA上达到93.00%，同时实现参数级零遗忘(0.00% FM)，每任务仅需2.27M参数。
AI.conclusion: DeCoFlow成功在保持规范化流可逆性和Jacobian有效性的前提下，有效解决了持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，在工业异常检测任务上取得最先进性能。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses industrial anomaly detection (defect detection in industrial products like MVTec-AD), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both fields may use normalizing flows, the application domains are entirely different: industrial quality control vs 3D human motion generation. The paper deals with 2D image anomaly detection, not extracting 3D motion from video or text-to-motion synthesis. The pain points, methods (normalizing flows for density estimation vs video generation models for motion), and goals are fundamentally mismatched.

title: Explainable Ensemble-Based Machine Learning Models for Detecting the Presence of Cirrhosis in Hepatitis C Patients
summary: Hepatitis C is a liver infection caused by a virus, which results in mild to severe inflammation of the liver. Over many years, hepatitis C gradually damages the liver, often leading to permanent scarring, known as cirrhosis. Patients sometimes have moderate or no symptoms of liver illness for decades before developing cirrhosis. Cirrhosis typically worsens to the point of liver failure. Patients with cirrhosis may also experience brain and nerve system damage, as well as gastrointestinal hemorrhage. Treatment for cirrhosis focuses on preventing further progression of the disease. Detecting cirrhosis earlier is therefore crucial for avoiding complications. Machine learning (ML) has been shown to be effective at providing precise and accurate information for use in diagnosing several diseases. Despite this, no studies have so far used ML to detect cirrhosis in patients with hepatitis C. This study obtained a dataset consisting of 28 attributes of 2038 Egyptian patients from the ML Repository of the University of California at Irvine. Four ML algorithms were trained on the dataset to diagnose cirrhosis in hepatitis C patients: a Random Forest, a Gradient Boosting Machine, an Extreme Gradient Boosting, and an Extra Trees model. The Extra Trees model outperformed the other models achieving an accuracy of 96.92%, a recall of 94.00%, a precision of 99.81%, and an area under the receiver operating characteristic curve of 96% using only 16 of the 28 features.

AI.tldr: 本研究首次应用机器学习算法检测丙型肝炎患者的肝硬化，使用2038名埃及患者的数据集训练了四种模型，其中Extra Trees模型表现最佳，准确率达96.92%。
AI.motivation: 丙型肝炎会导致肝硬化，早期检测对避免并发症至关重要。尽管机器学习在其他疾病诊断中已显示有效性，但尚未有研究将其应用于丙型肝炎相关肝硬化的检测。
AI.method: 从加州大学欧文分校机器学习数据库获取包含28个特征的2038名埃及患者数据集，使用四种机器学习算法（随机森林、梯度提升机、XGBoost和Extra Trees）进行训练和诊断。
AI.result: Extra Trees模型表现最优，达到96.92%的准确率、94.00%的召回率、99.81%的精确率，以及96%的AUC值，且仅使用16个特征即实现该性能。
AI.conclusion: 机器学习算法可有效用于丙型肝炎患者肝硬化的诊断，Extra Trees模型在各项指标上均表现优异，具有较高的临床应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant. It is about medical diagnostics - detecting cirrhosis in hepatitis C patients using machine learning classifiers. This has NO connection to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is medical healthcare/diagnostics, not motion generation, video-to-3D, or any computer graphics task. Even though it uses machine learning methods (like random forest, XGBoost), the context and domain are entirely different - medical disease detection vs visual motion generation. This would score 0-20 as it addresses a completely different field.

title: PhysEditWorld: A Large-Scale Dataset Toward Physics-Editable World Models
summary: Recent game world models can synthesize visually plausible, action-conditioned rollouts. However, their interaction behaviors often remain limited to exploratory or wandering trajectories, and physical dynamics are typically learned as implicit correlations from data rather than as controllable variables. This limitation hinders their applicability to authored game environments, where physical rules are deliberately designed and require explicit manipulation. We introduce PhysEditWorld, a multimodal dataset with physical parameters, with a primary focus on gravity in this initial version. At its core, PhysEditWorld is built upon a replay paradigm implemented with a UE5 replay-and-rendering pipeline. Each scenario records a normalized action trace and replays the same initial state, character controller, action sequence, and camera policy under multiple gravity configurations, enabling controlled and attributable physical variation. PhysEditWorld contains 12 cinematic UE5 scenes, over 100 hours of gameplay interactions, and more than 60 million rendered rollout frames. Each sample provides synchronized multimodal signals, including RGB, depth, normals, audio, action traces, camera trajectory, engine states, semantic annotations, and explicit gravity labels. We further conduct initial utility studies on both generative video models and world understanding models, demonstrating that PhysEditWorld enables improved gravity-faithful dynamics modeling, enhances consistency under physical edits, and provides a scalable foundation for controllable world modeling research.

AI.tldr: PhysEditWorld是一个基于UE5引擎的多模态游戏数据集，专注于重力物理参数，通过重放范式记录同一场景在不同重力配置下的表现，包含12个UE5场景、100+小时游戏交互和6000万+渲染帧，用于可控世界建模研究。
AI.motivation: 现有游戏世界模型的交互行为受限，缺乏可控制的物理变量，无法应用于需要显式物理操控的创作环境；需要构建一个物理参数明确、可控可归因的数据集来解决这一问题。
AI.method: 基于UE5重放和渲染管道实现，在相同初始状态、角色控制器、动作序列和相机策略下记录多个重力配置的重放；提供RGB、深度、法线、音频、动作轨迹、相机轨迹、引擎状态、语义标注和显式重力标签等多模态信号。
AI.result: 构建了包含12个UE5场景、100+小时游戏交互和6000万+渲染帧的数据集；在生成视频模型和世界理解模型上验证了数据集的实用性，实现了更好的重力-faithful动力学建模和物理编辑下的一致性增强。
AI.conclusion: PhysEditWorld为可控世界建模研究提供了可扩展的基础，使物理动态从隐式相关变为显式可控变量，能够支持重力-faithful的动力学建模和物理编辑。

relevance_reason: This paper is about physics-editable world models for game environments (gravity manipulation in UE5 games), which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation (human motion generation from visual/text prompts). While both are in computer graphics, this paper focuses on game physics simulation and world-level dynamics, not human motion generation. The methods (UE5 replay system) and goals (gravity-faithful dynamics for game scenes) are unrelated to the pain points of extracting 3D human motion from 2D video priors or bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gap. It's a game AI/world modeling paper, not a motion generation paper.

title: EvoOptiGraph: Weakness-Driven Coevolution via Graph-Based Structural Generation for Optimization Modeling
summary: Automating optimization modeling from natural language with large language models (LLMs) faces two key challenges. First, training corpora lack structural diversity. Second, data generation pipelines remain static and decoupled from model learning. To address these challenges, we propose EvoOptiGraph, a novel framework where data and model co-evolve, driven by model weaknesses. EvoOptiGraph represents each mixed-integer linear program (MILP) as an attributed bipartite graph and applies validity-preserving evolutionary operators to generate structurally diverse instances. The evolved graphs are converted into solver code and natural language via deterministic compilation and verified back-translation. Training proceeds in two stages: supervised fine-tuning (SFT) on an initial dataset, followed by reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR), where graph-derived weakness signals guide the generation of new instances targeting the model's failures. This forms a closed loop that continuously updates the training distribution. Empirical results on six public datasets show that EvoOptiGraph significantly outperforms larger generalist models, agentic methods, and specialized baselines in accuracy, executability, and generalization. These results demonstrate that targeted data-model coevolution is an effective strategy for improving LLMs on optimization modeling tasks.

AI.tldr: EvoOptiGraph是一个通过数据与模型共同演化来提升LLM优化建模能力的框架。
AI.motivation: 解决LLM优化建模的两个核心挑战：训练语料库缺乏结构多样性，以及数据生成管道与模型学习相脱节。
AI.method: 将混合整数线性规划(MILP)表示为属性二部图，应用保有效性演化算子生成结构多样性实例；通过监督微调(SFT)和带可验证奖励的强化学习(RLVR)两阶段训练，形成闭环持续更新训练分布。
AI.result: 在六个公共数据集上，EvoOptiGraph显著优于更大的通用模型、代理方法和专业基线，在准确性、可执行性和泛化性方面均表现出色。
AI.conclusion: 目标导向的数据-模型共同演化是提升LLM优化建模能力的有效策略。

relevance_reason: Completely different field and application domain. The paper is about LLM optimization modeling for Mixed Integer Linear Programming (MILP) - an Operations Research/Optimization problem, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. Even though both mention "graph" or "generation," the application domains are entirely different: motion generation for graphics vs. mathematical optimization problem generation. No relevance to video-to-3D motion extraction, visual guidance, or motion quality assessment.

title: Intracranial Aneurysm Classification and Segmentation via Tri-Axial ROI and Multi-Task Learning
summary: Intracranial aneurysms are often asymptomatic until rupture, which carries high mortality. Rupture risk assessment and treatment planning depend on both aneurysm morphology and anatomical location, yet existing automated methods remain limited to binary detection without fine-grained anatomical classification or multi-class segmentation. We present a multi-task framework that simultaneously performs multi-label classification, multi-class aneurysm segmentation, and multi-class vessel segmentation across 13 anatomical locations and four imaging modalities (CTA, MRA, T2, T1-post). Our two-stage approach combines a fast 2D tri-axial Region of Interest (ROI) extraction method with a 3D multi-task nnU-Net backbone. A dual-decoder design mitigates the extreme volume imbalance between aneurysm and vessel classes, while cross-attention pooling and modality-specific auxiliary heads improve feature learning across heterogeneous inputs. Our two-fold ensemble achieved 2nd place in the RSNA 2025 Intracranial Aneurysm Detection challenge. Code, model weights, and a 3D Slicer plugin are publicly available.

AI.tldr: 提出了一个多任务框架，同时进行多标签分类、多类动脉瘤分割和多类血管分割，涵盖13个解剖位置和四种成像模态
AI.motivation: 现有自动方法仅限二元检测，缺乏细粒度解剖分类或多类分割，而动脉瘤破裂风险评估和治疗规划需要了解动脉瘤形态和解剖位置
AI.method: 两阶段方法：快速2D三轴ROI提取结合3D多任务nnU-Net主干网，双解码器设计缓解动脉瘤和血管类之间的极端体积不平衡，跨注意力池化和模态特定辅助头改善特征学习
AI.result: 在RSNA 2025颅内动脉瘤检测挑战赛中获得第2名
AI.conclusion: 该框架能够同时完成多标签分类、多类动脉瘤分割和多类血管分割，为动脉瘤破裂风险评估和治疗规划提供了更全面的工具

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical image analysis (intracranial aneurysm classification and segmentation in brain CT/MRI scans) for healthcare applications. While it uses a two-stage pipeline and neural networks, the application domain is completely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The research profile focuses on generating human motion from video/text for graphics/animation, whereas this paper addresses medical diagnosis. These are fundamentally different fields - medical imaging vs computer graphics motion generation.

title: A Multi-Level Validation and Traceability Framework for AI-Generated Telescope Scheduling Decisions
summary: With the gradual introduction of AI into telescope scheduling, AI-based decision-making has shown advantages in handling complex multi-constraint problems. However, its outputs often suffer from inconsistent data references, reasoning errors, and non-executable decisions, limiting applicability in high-reliability observational tasks. In this work, we propose a multi-level validation and traceable reasoning framework that performs systematic reliability verification of AI-generated decisions prior to execution, and enables explicit representation of the reasoning process to support traceable decision-making. The framework integrates data reference validation, logical consistency checks, and observational and instrumental constraint verification to filter and correct invalid decisions. It also introduces atomic reasoning units and their dependency relationships, representing scheduling decisions as a sequence of interconnected reasoning steps that support error localization and post hoc analysis. Experiments show that the framework improves executability and reliability of AI scheduling and reduces loss of transient opportunities. In particular, feedback correction and structured validation of reasoning steps enhance the ability to repair and block erroneous decisions, especially in complex scenarios. Compared with pure AI methods, the framework-enhanced approach maintains flexibility while substantially improving reliability and executability. These results demonstrate a feasible and verifiable pathway for applying AI to high-reliability astronomical observation scheduling.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多级验证和可追溯推理框架，用于提高AI生成的望远镜调度决策的可靠性。该框架通过数据引用验证、逻辑一致性检查和观测仪器约束验证来过滤和纠正无效决策，并将调度决策表示为相互关联的推理步骤序列。实验表明，该框架提高了AI调度的可执行性和可靠性，减少了 transient 机会的损失。
AI.motivation: AI在望远镜调度中的应用面临输出数据引用不一致、推理错误和不可执行决策等问题，限制了其在高可靠性观测任务中的应用。
AI.method: 提出了一个多级验证和可追溯推理框架，集成数据引用验证、逻辑一致性检查和观测仪器约束验证，引入了原子推理单元及其依赖关系来表示调度决策。
AI.result: 该框架提高了AI调度的可执行性和可靠性，减少了 transient 机会的损失，反馈纠正和结构化验证增强了修复和阻止错误决策的能力。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保持灵活性的同时显著提高了可靠性和可执行性，为AI在高可靠性天文观测调度中的应用提供了一条可行且可验证的途径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI-generated telescope scheduling decisions in the astronomy domain - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It deals with scheduling optimization for astronomical observations, not 3D motion generation from video or visual guidance. The application domain is entirely different (astronomy/instrument control vs. computer graphics/motion synthesis), and while it mentions "validation frameworks," this is not comparable to visual-guided feature extraction or video-to-motion methods. No relevance to the research profile.

title: Mask to Concept: Auto-Promptable SAM3 via Efficient Test-Time Concept Embedding Search for Few-Shot Annotation
summary: Transforming foundation segmentation models from human-prompted tools into auto-promptable annotators is critical for scalable medical data annotation. Current methods commonly depend on external feature matchers or auxiliary networks to automate geometric prompting, but introducing architectural overhead and limiting performance scalability. Although SAM3 natively supports concept segmentation via reusable text prompts, its direct use in medical imaging is hindered by a lack of fine-grained clinical knowledge and the ambiguity of human-written descriptions. In this work, we propose Mask to Concept (M2C), an efficient framework that adapts SAM3 for medical few-shot annotation without external modules, parameter retraining, or manual text engineering. Using only a few labeled images, M2C enables SAM3 to automatically search for transferable visual concepts entirely within its frozen architecture: it initializes a learnable concept embedding, uses it to prompt segmentation, and updates the embedding by gradients of minimizing the concept segmentation error. We further introduce a Hybrid Uncertainty Estimation (HUE) module that calculates the prediction entropy and maps concept predictions back to the box prompts, measuring concept-geometry prompting inconsistency. Highly uncertain samples are flagged actively for human correction, and the corrected masks are then fed back to M2C to continuously search for more precise concept embeddings, forming a self-enhancing annotation loop with minimal expert effort. Experiments on medical segmentation benchmarks show that our method achieves SOTA few-shot segmentation performance and outstanding annotation efficiency, offering a practical and efficient pathway toward scalable medical image labeling. Codes are at https://github.com/Huster-Hq/M2C.

AI.tldr: 本文提出M2C框架，将SAM3基础分割模型适配为医学图像的少样本自动标注器，无需外部模块或参数重训练。通过可学习概念嵌入和混合不确定性估计模块，实现自增强的标注循环。
AI.motivation: 将人类提示的基础分割模型转变为自动提示的标注器对于可扩展医学数据标注至关重要。现有方法依赖外部特征匹配器或辅助网络，带来架构开销且限制性能扩展。SAM3直接用于医学成像存在细粒度临床知识缺乏和人类描述歧义的问题。
AI.method: 提出Mask to Concept (M2C)框架：1)仅用少量标注图像初始化可学习概念嵌入；2)使用概念嵌入提示分割并通过最小化分割误差梯度更新嵌入；3)引入混合不确定性估计(HUE)模块计算预测熵并映射概念预测回边界框，测量概念-几何提示不一致性；4)标记高不确定性样本供人工修正，将修正掩膜反馈回M2C形成自增强标注循环。
AI.result: 在医学分割基准数据集上，该方法实现了SOTA少样本分割性能，具有出色的标注效率，为可扩展医学图像标注提供实用高效路径。
AI.conclusion: M2C无需外部模块、参数重训练或人工文本工程，即可在SAM3冻结架构内自动搜索可迁移视觉概念，完成医学少样本标注任务，显著降低专家标注工作量。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical image segmentation (SAM3 adapted for few-shot annotation in medical imaging), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. Although both involve visual understanding, medical image segmentation has no overlap with video-to-motion generation, visual-guided motion synthesis, or 3D motion generation. The methods and goals are entirely different - one focuses on medical image annotation, the other on generating human motion from visual/text prompts.

title: Content-Based Smart E-Mail Dispatcher Using Large Language Models
summary: Email communication has become an integral part of personal and professional life, but handling its vast volume is still a significant issue for large organisations. Manual perusal of emails and forwarding their contents and attachments to intended recipients using other instant messaging platforms has proved to be error-prone and time-consuming leading to losses in terms of productivity and creating undue stress. The main objective of this paper is to explore an alternative mechanism that is to automate the task of dispatching emails based on their contents to the respective WhatsApp groups of students of various semesters of programs in an engineering college, facilitating a smooth flow of information from one end to another end in an organisation. The dispatcher system is built using agents querying large language models (LLMs) to enable it to analyze the contents of emails and route them to the relevant groups of students for their information and consumption. The system harnesses the capabilities of LLMs in analysing the textual contents for decision-making. With a well-structured agent framework prompt that includes email content as input with instructions and context, the system figures out the relevant groups to which the email message is dispatched, thus providing the required information on time. The proposed system does not rely on labelled datasets and provides several benefits, including enhanced productivity and a reduction in the cognitive load associated with reading emails.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于大型语言模型(LLMs)的自动化邮件分发系统,用于根据邮件内容将电子邮件自动路由到工程院校各学期学生的相应WhatsApp群组,实现信息的高效传递。
AI.motivation: 手动处理大量电子邮件并将其转发到即时通讯平台不仅容易出错,而且耗时,导致生产力下降和额外压力。现有的人工分发方式效率低下,无法满足大规模组织的信息传递需求。
AI.method: 该系统采用基于代理(agents)查询大型语言模型的架构,通过精心设计的代理框架提示(包含邮件内容、指令和上下文),LLM分析邮件文本内容并决策应将邮件分发到哪个学生群组,无需依赖标注数据集。
AI.result: 系统能够自动分析邮件内容并将信息准确路由到相关的学生WhatsApp群组,实现信息的及时传递。
AI.conclusion: 该自动化邮件分发系统无需标注数据集即可工作,具有提高生产力和降低阅读邮件认知负担的优势,为组织提供了一种高效的信息传递解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using LLMs for email routing/dispatch to WhatsApp groups - an entirely different field (natural language processing/application software) with no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, video generation, 3D motion extraction, or any visual-to-motion domain. The paper doesn't address any of the pain points related to 3D motion generation from video or visual guidance.

title: Extracting Neural Materials from Multi-view Images
summary: Neural materials can represent complex specular reflections and scattering effects in a compact, universal basis. However, acquiring and authoring such materials remains challenging. We present NeuMatEx, a differentiable inverse rendering method for extracting spatially varying neural materials from images. The nonlinear structure of neural material latent spaces makes optimization with naive inverse rendering infeasible. To address this, we train a Large Material Reconstruction Model (LMRM) that directly predicts initialbase color, neural material latents, and aleatoric uncertainty guides from images. This material prior provides a good initialization and better constrains our subsequent optimization using inverse path tracing. The predicted uncertainty further helps by anchoring high-confidence regions more tightly to the LMRM prediction, preventing lighting and complex specular effects from being baked into materials. Experiments on synthetic and real assets show that NeuMatEx extracts complex materials with better visual quality and material decomposition than PBR-based methods.

AI.tldr: NeuMatEx是一种可微逆渲染方法,从图像中提取空间变化的神经材质。核心创新是训练大材质重建模型(LMRM)预测初始基色、神经材质潜在变量和不确定性引导,为后续逆路径追踪优化提供良好初始化和约束。
AI.motivation: 神经材质可以表示复杂的镜面反射和散射效果,但获取和创作此类材质具有挑战性。神经材质潜在空间的非线性结构使得使用朴素逆渲染进行优化不可行,需要新的方法来解决优化难题。
AI.method: 1)训练LMRM直接从图像预测初始基色、神经材质潜在变量和 aleatoric 不确定性引导;2)利用预测的不确定性将高置信度区域更紧密地锚定到LMRM预测,防止光照和复杂镜面效果被错误地烘焙到材质中;3)使用逆路径追踪进行优化。
AI.result: 在合成和真实资产上的实验表明,NeuMatEx 提取的复杂材质在视觉质量和材质分解方面均优于基于PBR的方法。
AI.conclusion: 该工作成功实现了从图像中提取神经材质,为神经材质的获取和创作提供了有效途径,有望推动图形学中神经材质表示的实用化发展。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (extracting and generating 3D human motion from video/text), while the paper is about Extracting Neural Materials from Multi-view Images (inverse rendering for material decomposition). Although both are in computer graphics, material extraction is a different subfield than motion generation. The pain points, goals, and final outputs are entirely unrelated - one deals with material properties (albedo, specular, etc.) while the other deals with human motion dynamics. The methods might both use inverse rendering concepts, but the application domains have no overlap.

title: LLM-based Models for Detecting Emerging Topics in Service Feedback
summary:
Enhancing the analysis of service feedback is essential for public sector organizations, particularly tax administrations, where trust and compliance depend on fair and effective service delivery. As feedback volumes grow, identifying emerging service quality issues and potential disparities across diverse populations becomes increasingly challenging. Traditional approaches often rely on manual review or static expert-defined indicators, limiting scalability and the ability to capture complex patterns in textual feedback.
  This paper presents a novel methodology that integrates large language models (LLMs), statistical techniques, and human-AI collaboration to improve multilingual customer feedback analysis. The primary objective is to detect emerging service quality topics that may also reveal potential inequities in service delivery. Our framework combines fine-tuned, quantized LLMs with expert oversight to produce accurate, computationally efficient, and context-aware analyses.
  The proposed approach was evaluated using similarity analysis and assessments from experienced tax officers, demonstrating stronger alignment with expert judgments than baseline models. By incorporating a human-in-the-loop framework, the methodology reduces LLM fabrication while improving the reliability and relevance of generated insights.
  The results demonstrate the practicality of combining LLMs with human expertise to support scalable, evidence-based decision-making in public sector organizations. This work contributes to the development of responsible AI systems that enhance service quality, responsiveness, fairness, and public trust through more effective analysis of multilingual customer feedback.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合大语言模型(LLM)、统计技术与人机协作的多语种客户反馈分析方法，旨在帮助税务等公共部门识别新兴服务质量和潜在不公平问题。该框架通过微调量化LLM与专家监督相结合，在保持计算效率的同时提高分析准确性和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 公共部门尤其是税务机构的服务反馈分析面临挑战：反馈量不断增长，传统人工审核或静态指标方法难以规模化，且无法捕捉文本中的复杂模式。同时需要识别可能存在的不公平服务问题，但现有方法受限。
AI.method: 提出了一种整合LLM、统计技术与人机协作的新方法框架。具体包括：1)使用微调量化的大语言模型；2)引入专家监督机制；3)结合相似性分析和税务官员评估进行验证；4)采用人在环框架减少LLM幻觉输出。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法与专家判断的对齐程度优于基线模型，有效降低了LLM虚构内容的产生，提高了生成洞见的可靠性和相关性。验证了LLM与人类专家结合支持公共部门规模化循证决策的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究推动了负责任AI系统在公共部门的应用，通过更有效地分析多语种客户反馈，有助于提升服务质量、响应速度、公平性和公众信任，为公共部门提供了一种可扩展的循证决策支持方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about using LLMs for detecting emerging topics in service feedback for public sectors (tax authorities). It has absolutely no connection to Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, 3D motion synthesis, or video generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's NLP/text analysis for customer feedback, not motion generation or computer graphics.

title: Full spectrum Unlearnable Examples via Spectral Equalization
summary: Unlearnable examples (UEs) protect training data by injecting imperceptible perturbations so that models fail to extract exploitable representations. In this paper, we reveal that existing UEs exhibit a critical failure once low-pass filtering is applied, indicating that the effective perturbation signals for unlearnability concentrate predominantly in high frequencies. Hence, we argue that reliable UEs should remain effective across the full spectrum. To this end, we propose Full-spectrum Unlearnable examples via Spectral Equalization (FUSE), which aims to generate spectrum-agnostic perturbations by equalizing the contributions from different bands and enforcing cross-band consistency. Specifically, FUSE adopts a Random Spectral Masking (RSM) strategy during generator training, which randomly removes a contiguous frequency band, forcing the remaining bands to maintain unlearnability. In addition, FUSE further integrates Cross-Band Guidance (CBG), which enforces mutual consistency between high- and low-frequency components, thereby further enhancing low-frequency unlearnability and regulating high-frequency perturbations to preserve the semantic fidelity of images. Extensive experiments across multiple datasets, architectures, and spectral filtering demonstrate the strong protection achieved by FUSE.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FUSE方法，通过频谱均衡策略生成全频段有效的不可学习样本，解决现有方法在低通滤波下失效的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有不可学习样本(UEs)存在关键缺陷：其有效扰动信号主要集中在高频成分，在低通滤波下会失效，无法提供可靠的数据保护。
AI.method: 提出全频段不可学习样本生成方法FUSE，包含两种策略：1) 随机频谱掩码(RSM)：训练时随机移除连续频段，迫使剩余频段维持不可学习性；2) 跨频段引导(CBG)：强制高低频分量之间的相互一致性，增强低频不可学习性并调节高频扰动以保持图像语义完整性。
AI.result: 在多个数据集、架构和频谱滤波下验证，FUSE实现了强大的全频段保护效果。
AI.conclusion: 可靠的不可学习样本应在整个频谱范围内保持有效，FUSE通过频谱均衡策略成功实现了这一目标。

relevance_reason: This paper is about adversarial machine learning (Unlearnable Examples for image protection) - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: image privacy protection vs. 3D motion generation from video. Even though the paper uses spectral methods, they are used for adversarial perturbation, not for visual-to-motion domain bridging. No relevance to the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: Autoformalization of Agent Instructions into Policy-as-Code
comment: Accepted at the Second Workshop on Agents in the Wild: Safety, Security, and Beyond (AIWILD), ICML 2026
summary: Agent safety in high-stakes domains requires formal policy enforcement, but most existing approaches either rely on probabilistic guardrails (fine-tuned classifiers, prompt-based steering) that offer no formal guarantees, or on hand-coded symbolic enforcement that does not scale to the breadth of real policy specifications. We present an autoformalization pipeline that translates agent prompts, MCP tool descriptions, and natural language policy documents into formally verified policies using an LLM-based generator-critic loop. The resulting policies are written in the Cedar Policy Language. On the MedAgentBench benchmark, our autoformalized policies cover substantially more of the source natural-language specification than the hand-coded symbolic enforcement in prior work.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种用于智能体安全的形式化策略自动生成管道，使用基于LLM的生成器-批评者循环将智能体提示、MCP工具描述和自然语言策略文档转换为Cedar策略语言的形式化验证策略，并在MedAgentBench基准上进行了评估。
AI.motivation: 高风险领域的智能体安全需要形式化策略 enforcement，但现有方法要么依赖概率guardrails（无法提供形式化保证），要么依赖手工编写的符号enforcement（无法扩展）。需要一种可扩展且能覆盖实际策略规范广度的形式化策略 enforcement方法。
AI.method: 提出了一种自动形式化管道，包含：1）使用基于LLM的生成器-批评者循环；2）将智能体提示、MCP工具描述和自然语言策略文档转换为形式化策略；3）生成的策略使用Cedar策略语言编写；4）通过批评者组件进行形式化验证。
AI.result: 在MedAgentBench基准上，自动形式化策略比先前工作中手工编写的符号enforcement覆盖了更多的源自然语言规范。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为智能体安全提供了一种可扩展的形式化策略生成方案，能够自动将自然语言策略转换为可验证的形式化策略，并在基准测试中展现出优于手工编写方法的覆盖范围。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely irrelevant to the research profile. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (specifically extracting 3D motion from video, visual-guided motion generation). The paper is about autoformalizing agent instructions into policy-as-code for AI agent safety in medical domains. While both may use LLMs, the application domains are entirely different - this paper deals with policy enforcement and formal verification for AI agents, not motion generation or computer graphics. There is no match in field, application domain, methods used for the target task, or research goals.

title: Robust Onion: Peeling Open Vocab Object Detectors Under Noise
comment: Accepted at The 19th European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV)
summary: The impact of real-world noise on Open Vocabulary Object Detectors (OV-ODs) remains poorly understood due to their architectural complexity. We present our comprehensive analysis Robust Onion, an empirical study that uses controlled synthetic visual degradations to peel OV-ODs layer-by-layer, revealing how, why, and where robustness degrades, systematically analyzing feature collapse. Our findings reveal that models with similar vision backbones exhibit comparable robustness, driven by similar feature collapse at similar layers, while factors such as pretraining strategy, architectural nuances, and caption supervision contribute little. Robustness is primarily governed by the image domain rather than annotations, explaining the similar robustness impact on COCO and LVIS, and why datasets like ODinW-13 can give an impression of inflated robustness due to large, isolated objects. Finally, we validate our insights by improving robustness on real-world BDD100K, WiderFace, and VisDRONE via our lightweight plug-and-play NN & TK0 approach, using 96x fewer trainable parameters than end-to-end training. We also explain the prior works' robustness observations.

AI.tldr: 本文是首个全面分析开放词汇目标检测器（OV-ODs）在真实世界噪声下的鲁棒性的实证研究。通过逐层"剥开"模型分析特征崩塌现象，发现视觉骨干网络相似的模型表现出相近的鲁棒性，且主要受图像域影响而非标注策略。
AI.motivation: 开放词汇目标检测器（OV-ODs）因架构复杂其实在真实世界噪声下的鲁棒性表现如何目前理解有限，之前缺乏系统性的实证分析。
AI.method: 提出Robust Onion框架，使用受控的合成视觉退化逐层分析OV-ODs，揭示鲁棒性如何、在哪里退化，并系统性分析特征崩塌现象。同时提出轻量级plug-and-play方法NN & TK0。
AI.result: 相似视觉骨干的模型展现相似鲁棒性，源于相似层的特征崩塌；预训练策略、架构细节和标题监督贡献较小。鲁棒性主要由图像域决定而非标注，这解释了COCO和LVIS的相似鲁棒性影响，以及ODinW-13因大目标造成鲁棒性虚高的现象。在BDD100K、WiderFace、VisDRONE上验证了方法，效果提升显著且仅需端到端训练0.96%的参数量。
AI.conclusion: OV-ODs鲁棒性主要由视觉骨干和图像域决定，预训练和架构选择影响有限；轻量级NN & TK0方法可有效提升实际场景鲁棒性，为后续研究提供了改进方向和理论依据。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about Open Vocabulary Object Detection (computer vision - detecting objects in images), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (Computer Graphics - generating 3D human motion). These are entirely different application domains with no practical overlap. Object detection is unrelated to motion generation, even though both involve visual processing. The methods and goals are completely different.

title: SKILL-DISCO: Distilling and Compiling Agent Traces into Reusable Procedural Skills
summary: Agents often repeatedly solve similar task instances from scratch, leading to unnecessary reasoning cost and long execution traces. Prior work has explored workflow reuse and executable skill induction, but it remains unclear which task scenarios admit procedural skills and how the shared procedural structure should be represented across successful traces. We study this problem in FSM-defined scenarios, where successful traces can be viewed as paths in an unknown transition graph, and formulate procedural skills as reusable parameterized control-flow subgraphs. Based on this view, we introduce SkillDisCo, a distillation-and-compilation framework that distills reusable PFSM subgraphs from successful traces and compiles them into callable, executable, and verifiable procedural skills. Experiments on ALFWorld and WebArena show that SkillDisCo improves success rates and reduces agent turns across benchmarks and model scales, demonstrating the benefits of representing shared experience as reusable execution structures.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SkillDisCo框架,用于从成功轨迹中提取可重用的参数化控制流子图(PFSM),并将其编译为可调用、可执行和可验证的程序化技能,解决Agent重复解决相似任务导致的推理成本高和执行轨迹长的问题。
AI.motivation: 当前Agent在解决相似任务时经常从头开始推理,导致不必要的推理成本和冗长的执行轨迹。现有工作探索了工作流重用和可执行技能诱导,但尚不清楚哪些任务场景支持程序化技能,以及如何在成功轨迹中表示共享的程序化结构。
AI.method: 在FSM定义场景中,将成功轨迹视为未知转换图中的路径,将程序化技能表示为可重用的参数化控制流子图(PFSM)。提出SkillDisCo框架:1)从成功轨迹中提取可重用的PFSM子图;2)将其编译为可调用、可执行和可验证的程序化技能。
AI.result: 在ALFWorld和WebArena上的实验表明,SkillDisCo在基准测试和模型规模上提高了成功率并减少了Agent回合数,证明了将共享经验表示为可重用执行结构的价值。
AI.conclusion: SkillDisCo框架能够有效从成功轨迹中提取和重用程序化技能,在多个基准测试上提升Agent性能,同时降低推理成本,为构建更高效的Agent系统提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM Agent systems and skill extraction for task automation (ALFWorld, WebArena), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's about extracting reusable procedural skills from agent traces, not generating 3D motion from video. The methods (FSM, PFSM) are unrelated to video generation models, vision-language models, or 3D motion generation. The pain points addressed (agent reasoning cost, trajectory length) have no connection to the research profile's concerns about visual-to-3D motion domain gap or motion quality assessment.

title: Do Image Editing Models Understand Lighting?
summary: While recent advancements in generative image editing models have achieved stunning visual fidelity, it remains an open question whether these systems possess an intrinsic knowledge of real-world lighting. Existing benchmarks typically evaluate high-level plausibility of perceptual light transport on curated internet imagery, using VLMs or human judgement, or they rely on synthetically generated datasets. In this work, we introduce the 3D-anchored Light Probe (3DLP) benchmark, for which we have captured a new high-fidelity HDR dataset of real-world lighting changes. The dataset consists of 1K image pairs of diverse indoor scenery in which light probes are physically turned on and off. To allow for a granular performance analysis, we annotated specific image regions such as cast shadows or metallic surfaces. With this data, we evaluate a range of state-of-the-art image editing models by measuring how well their light probe edits align with reality. The evaluation uses two new scores to compensate for AI-generated photographic effects, such as adjusted white balance. Our results show that the overall performance of models differs considerably, with differences slightly less pronounced for specular highlights. The best image editing models are remarkably consistent with real-world physics, however, they still leave room for improvement. We observe that image regions that receive less light from the light probe are more prone to errors for all models. Furthermore, building on their success in evaluating macroscopic lighting plausibility, we test VLMs on our task but find that they are unsuitable for pixel-level light transport analysis. We will make the benchmark, together with the real-world dataset, publicly available to encourage future research on this topic.

AI.tldr: 本文提出3DLP基准测试，用于评估生成式图像编辑模型对真实世界光照的物理理解能力。通过构建包含1000对室内场景的新HDR数据集（光探针开/关状态），标注阴影和金属表面等区域，测试多个先进图像编辑模型。发现模型整体性能差异显著，在镜面高光区域表现稍好，但接收光较少的区域更易出错，VLM不适合像素级光传输分析。
AI.motivation: 生成式图像编辑模型虽已实现令人惊叹的视觉保真度，但尚不清楚这些系统是否具有对真实世界光照的内在理解。现有基准测试通常基于网络图像或合成数据，缺乏对物理正确光照传输的精细评估。
AI.method: 构建3DLP基准测试，创建新的高保真HDR数据集，包含1000对室内场景图像（光探针物理开关状态）。标注特定图像区域（投射阴影、金属表面等），使用两个新评分指标补偿AI生成的摄影效果（如白平衡调整），评估多个先进图像编辑模型，并测试VLM在光照传输分析中的适用性。
AI.result: 不同模型的整体性能差异显著，在镜面高光区域的差异稍小。最先进的图像编辑模型与真实世界物理一致性良好，但仍存在改进空间。所有模型在接收光较少的图像区域更容易出错。VLM不适合像素级光传输分析。
AI.conclusion: 3DLP基准测试和真实世界数据集的发布将推动该领域未来研究。模型需要改进对光照较少区域的渲染精度，VLM方法不适用于此任务。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a fundamentally different application domain. While both involve computer graphics, this paper focuses on evaluating image editing models' understanding of lighting physics (image domain), NOT text-to-motion generation or human motion synthesis. The pain points are completely unrelated - this paper deals with lighting consistency in image editing, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video, motion quality assessment, or visual-to-motion domain gaps. Although both fields may use diffusion models and VLMs, the application domains are entirely different - image generation/editing vs human motion generation. This is completely irrelevant to the text-to-motion generation research profile.

title: NebulaExp-8B: An Empirical Post-Training Pipeline via Full-Scale Ablation Research
summary: Post-training alignment determines the reasoning and human preference following capabilities of large language models, yet most existing works withhold detailed data construction, filtering rules and training recipes, which hinders community reproducibility and lightweight model optimization. This work presents NebulaExp, a fully transparent, ablation-driven post-training pipeline built on Qwen3-8B-base, covering two orthogonal model branches: general instruct model and complex reasoning-specialized model. We curate a raw corpus of 3.84M multi-source SFT samples and a 200K verifiable RL candidate pool, and design an end-to-end data processing stack including response distillation, multi-dimensional cross-verification filtering, fine-grained difficulty grading, task classification and diversity-aware sampling. For the Instruct branch, our three-stage optimized supervised fine-tuning approach NebulaExp-Ins-SFT improves the average benchmark score from the 55.01 baseline of Qwen3-8B-nothink to 60.99. GRPO reinforcement learning then further elevates the average score to 61.85. For the Reasoning branch, medium-difficulty GRPO RL improves average reasoning score from 73.88 to 75.17. To address RL's dependency on task verifiers, we systematically investigate single-teacher and multi-teacher OPD (MOPD): utilizing merely 4K instruction-following samples and outperforms RL baseline by 3.26 points on IFEval with +4.43 average overall gain; MOPD fuses four domain-specialist teachers with merely 10K samples, lifting average performance by 4.18 over the base model. This report provides a fully reproducible empirical post-training recipe for 8B-scale LLMs, and comprehensively dissects the capability trade-offs among instruction adherence, mathematical reasoning, code generation and general knowledge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了NebulaExp，一个基于Qwen3-8B-base的透明后训练pipeline，包含3.84M SFT样本和200K RL候选池，采用三阶段SFT、GRPO强化学习和OPD方法。针对指令跟随和推理两个分支分别进行训练，最终在8B规模上实现了可复现的后训练配方。
AI.motivation: 后训练对齐决定了LLM的推理和人类偏好能力，但现有工作缺乏详细的数据构建、过滤规则和训练配方，阻碍了社区可复现性和轻量级模型优化。
AI.method: 构建了包含响应蒸馏、多维交叉验证、难度分级、任务分类和多样性采样的端到端数据处理栈。采用三阶段优化的监督微调、GRPO强化学习，以及单教师和多教师OPD方法。包含两个正交模型分支：通用指令模型和复杂推理专用模型。
AI.result: 指令分支：三阶段SFT将平均分数从55.01提升到60.99，GRPO进一步提升到61.85。推理分支：中等难度GRPO将推理分数从73.88提升到75.17。OPD使用4K样本在IFEval上比RL基线高3.26分，总分+4.43；MOPD使用10K样本比基线提升4.18分。
AI.conclusion: 提供了8B规模LLM的完全可复现后训练配方，全面分析了指令遵循、数学推理、代码生成和通用知识之间的能力权衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM post-training (Qwen3-8B-base) and alignment methods (GRPO, OPD) for instruction following and reasoning tasks. It has NO relevance to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is completely different - this is about language model training, not motion generation, video-to-motion extraction, or visual-guided 3D motion synthesis. The methods (SFT, RL alignment) are unrelated to the research profile's methods (video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion generation).

title: LiveEdit: Towards Real-Time Diffusion-Based Streaming Video Editing
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2026, Project page: https://live-edit.github.io
summary: Streaming video editing has made rapid progress, yet practical deployment is still limited by two core issues: maintaining stable backgrounds and non-edited regions over time, and achieving the low latency required for real-time interactive scenarios. Meanwhile, recent streaming video generation methods are mostly developed for synthesis and cannot be directly applied to editing due to the strict preservation requirement and region-specific control. In this work, we present a novel streaming video editing framework that performs causal, frame-by-frame editing with strong content preservation and real-time responsiveness. Our key design is a three-stage distillation pipeline that progressively transfers editing capability from a powerful bidirectional foundation model to an efficient unidirectional streaming editor, enabling stable long-horizon edits without sacrificing visual fidelity. To further support real-time deployment, we introduce an AR-oriented mask cache that reuses region-related computation across frames, substantially reducing redundant processing and accelerating inference. Finally, we establish a dedicated benchmark for streaming video editing. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art visual quality among streaming baselines while drastically boosting inference speed to 12.66 FPS, making it suitable for interactive and augmented reality applications.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的流式视频编辑框架，通过三阶段蒸馏管道将强大的双向基础模型的编辑能力逐步转移到高效的单向流式编辑器，并引入AR导向的掩码缓存来重用跨帧的区域相关计算，实现因果化、逐帧编辑，在保持内容强保留的同时达到实时响应能力。
AI.motivation: 流式视频编辑面临两个核心问题：随时间保持稳定背景和非编辑区域，以及实现实时交互场景所需的低延迟。现有的流式视频生成方法主要用于合成，无法直接应用于编辑，因为编辑需要严格的保留要求和区域特定控制。
AI.method: 提出三阶段蒸馏管道，逐步将强大双向基础模型的编辑能力迁移到高效单向流式编辑器，实现稳定的长期编辑而不牺牲视觉质量；引入AR导向的掩码缓存，跨帧重用区域相关计算，大幅减少冗余处理并加速推理；建立专门的流式视频编辑基准。
AI.result: 该方法在流式基线中达到最先进的视觉质量，推理速度提升至12.66 FPS，适合交互式和增强现实应用。
AI.conclusion: 该框架实现了稳定的长期编辑，同时保持视觉保真度，使流式视频编辑适用于交互式和AR应用。

relevance_reason: The paper is about 2D streaming video editing, not 3D motion generation. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (extracting 3D human motion from video priors), while this paper addresses 2D video editing for AR/interactive applications. Although both use diffusion models, the application domains are completely different - video editing (2D visual content) vs motion generation (3D skeletal motion). This does not address any of the pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gap, or ensuring motion quality.

title: Do Safety Guardrails Need to Reason? LeanGuard: A Fast and Light Approach for Robust Moderation
comment: 9 pages, 6 figures, 3 tables. Project page: https://ndb796.github.io/LeanGuard ; code and models: https://github.com/ndb796/LeanGuard
summary: In order to screen a prompt or a response, the recent guardrail methods generate a chain-of-thought (CoT) before they issue a verdict. This design follows a common belief that step-by-step reasoning improves a decision. However, CoT also makes the guard heavy and slow, because the model must generate many tokens before it decides. This may not match how guardrails are actually deployed. A guardrail sometimes should not be heavy and slow, and it often runs on-device, for example on an embodied robot. In this paper, we pose a question whether a safety guardrail really needs to reason. To answer this question, we train a lightweight bidirectional encoder and a reasoning guard on the same corpus, and we then remove only the reasoning while we keep everything else fixed. With this controlled same-base comparison, we show that the chain does not improve moderation accuracy. We name the resulting guard LeanGuard. A 395M label-only encoder reaches an average F1 of 82.90 $\pm$ 0.26 over public benchmarks. It matches a reasoning guard that is built on a much larger decoder, while it uses only a single forward pass over an input of at most 512 tokens. This is about a ~100x reduction in inference compute. We further show that this label-only encoder stays robust under training-label noise and retains far more recall at a strict false-positive rate than the reasoning guard, so a heavier reasoning guard is not the more robust choice either. Our finding suggests that the current guardrail benchmarks may not be hard enough to reward reasoning, and that the necessity of CoT for moderation is still not proven. We release all source codes and models including LeanGuard at https://github.com/ndb796/LeanGuard.

AI.tldr: LeanGuard是一种无需链式推理（CoT）的轻量级内容审核Guardrail模型，仅用一个单次前向传播的395M参数编码器即可达到与大型推理Guard相当的审核效果，推理计算量减少约100倍。
AI.motivation: 当前Guardrail方法普遍采用链式推理（CoT）来做出判断，但这种设计使模型变得笨重且缓慢，不适合在设备端（如机器人）部署。作者质疑：安全Guardrail是否真的需要推理？
AI.method: 在相同语料库上训练一个轻量级双向编码器和一个推理Guard，然后仅移除推理部分，保持其他所有条件不变，进行受控的同基比较实验。
AI.result: LeanGuard在公开基准测试上达到平均F1 82.90±0.26，与基于更大解码器的推理Guard相当，但只需最多512个token的单次前向传播。推理计算量减少约100倍。
AI.conclusion: 链式推理并未提升内容审核准确性；当训练数据存在噪声时，标签-only编码器更加鲁棒，在严格误报率下保持更高的召回率。这表明当前Guardrail基准测试可能不够困难，未能奖励推理能力，CoT对内容审核的必要性仍未被证明。

relevance_reason: This paper is about AI safety/content moderation (Guardrail models), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. It addresses content filtering for AI systems, not 3D motion extraction, video-to-motion generation, or visual-guided motion synthesis. The application domain is completely different - it's about moderating harmful content in language models, not generating human motion from video or text. The "robot" mentioned refers to on-device AI systems, not robotic motion generation.

title: Depth-Semantic Alignment and Affinity-Guided Fusion for Structured Radar Point Cloud Generation
summary: Point clouds are an important carrier of three-dimensional spatial information, and their quality directly affects the performance of downstream perception tasks such as object detection and tracking. However, millimeter-wave radar point clouds are typically sparse, noisy, and structurally incomplete. To address these limitations, this paper proposes a multimodal point cloud generation method based on vision-radar fusion. The proposed method leverages image semantic information to impose structural constraints and achieve spatial alignment for radar point clouds, while incorporating a sparse completion strategy to enhance point density and recover missing structures. The generated point clouds are further evaluated in object detection and tracking tasks. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed method effectively improves point cloud quality and enhances the detection accuracy and robustness of perception models in complex environments, providing a practical solution for multisensor point cloud generation and intelligent perception systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视觉-雷达融合的多模态点云生成方法，旨在解决毫米波雷达点云稀疏、噪声大、结构不完整的问题。
AI.motivation: 毫米波雷达点云通常稀疏、噪声大且结构不完整，直接影响目标检测与跟踪等下游感知任务的性能，需要一种方法来提升点云质量。
AI.method: 利用图像语义信息对雷达点云施加结构约束并实现空间对齐，同时引入稀疏补全策略增强点云密度并恢复缺失结构。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法有效提升了点云质量，增强了感知模型在复杂环境下的检测精度和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 为多传感器点云生成和智能感知系统提供了实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses radar point cloud generation for autonomous driving perception (sensor fusion for millimeter wave radar), while the research profile requires human motion generation for computer graphics. Although both involve "generation" concepts, radar point cloud enhancement for object detection is fundamentally different from text-to-motion generation. The methods (visual-radar fusion, sparse completion) and goals (improve perception accuracy) are unrelated to motion synthesis in graphics.

title: Kalman Prototypical Networks for Few-shot Fault Detection in Combined Cycle Gas Turbines
summary: Combined-cycle gas turbines (CCGTs) play a key role in modern power generation, offering both high efficiency and reduced environmental impact. However, their complex thermo-fluid and mechanical interactions complicate fault detection, particularly when labeled fault data are scarce. In this paper, we introduce the Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN), a metric-based few-shot learning (FSL) framework specifically tailored for CCGT fault diagnosis. We model the evolution of class prototypes as latent stochastic states in a dynamic system to reduce episodic variance and improve robustness in embedding representation. Synthetic data sets generated with a high-fidelity Modelica-based dynamic simulation of an offshore CCGT system were used, simulating both normal operation and progressive leak faults under transient conditions. Application of the proposed framework on simulated leak fault detection tasks demonstrate that KPN outperforms conventional FSL methods such as Matching Networks, Relation Networks, and MAML in both accuracy and stability under varying support and query configurations. The proposed framework significantly improves training convergence and generalization by stabilizing class representations, making it well-suited for real-world CCGT fault detection where labeled data is limited.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN)的度量少样本学习框架，用于联合循环燃气轮机(CCGT)的故障诊断。该方法通过将类原型建模为动态系统中的潜在随机状态来减少情景方差并提高嵌入表示的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 联合循环燃气 turbines(CCGT)在现代发电中具有重要地位，但其复杂的热流体和机械相互作用使得故障检测变得困难，尤其是在标记故障数据稀缺的情况下。传统方法难以有效处理这类小样本故障诊断问题。
AI.method: 提出Kalman Prototypical Network (KPN)，将类原型的演化建模为动态系统中的潜在随机状态。采用基于Modelica的高保真动态模拟生成合成数据集，模拟海上CCGT系统的正常运行和瞬态条件下的渐进泄漏故障。在不同支持和查询配置下评估框架性能。
AI.result: KPN在准确性和稳定性方面均优于传统的少样本学习方法(如Matching Networks、Relation Networks和MAML)。该框架通过稳定类表示显著提高了训练收敛性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: KPN框架特别适用于标记数据有限的真实世界CCGT故障检测场景，为解决小样本故障诊断问题提供了一种有效的新方法。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about fault detection in Combined Cycle Gas Turbines (CCGT) using Kalman Prototypical Networks and Modelica simulations. The application domain is mechanical engineering/power systems, which has no relation to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The methods (few-shot learning for fault diagnosis) are entirely different from the required methods (video generation models, vision-language models, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion generation). This is a fundamental field mismatch.

title: Capacity-Controlled Multi-View Stylization of 3D Gaussian Splatting
comment: Accepted to ECCV 2026. Project page: https://vcc2310.github.io/SceneStyler/
summary: While 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) provides an efficient and explicit representation for novel view synthesis, enforcing stylistic coherence across viewpoints remains challenging. Existing 3D stylization methods typically apply 2D feature-matching losses independently per rendered view, which leads to unstable style allocation, many-to-one feature reuse, and limited cross-view consistency. We propose a capacity-controlled framework for multi-view stylization of 3DGS, grounded in optimal transport. Specifically, we reformulate local style matching as a semi-balanced optimal transport problem. By introducing explicit column-capacity constraints with tunable strength, our formulation mitigates many-to-one matching and enables controllable allocation of style features. This transport-based objective provides a principled mechanism for balancing feature coverage and stylistic diversity while maintaining stable correspondences across viewpoints. To further enhance cross-view coherence, we incorporate a novel cross-view matching guidance to constrain correspondences between scene content and style patterns. In addition, we introduce several geometric regularizations to enhance the vanilla 3DGS, thereby enabling optimized Gaussian primitives to represent finer-grained textures during stylization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach significantly improves multi-view stylistic consistency and produces stable, expressive 3D stylizations while preserving the core semantic structure of the scene.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于最优传输的3D Gaussian Splatting多视角风格化框架，通过列容量约束和跨视角匹配指导，实现保持跨视角一致性的3D风格化。
AI.motivation: 现有3D风格化方法对每个渲染视角独立应用2D特征匹配损失，导致风格分配不稳定、特征复用混乱以及跨视角一致性有限的问题。
AI.method:
1. 将局部风格匹配重新表述为半平衡最优传输问题
2. 引入可调强度的显式列容量约束
3. 引入跨视角匹配指导来约束场景内容与风格模式的对应关系
4. 添加几何正则化增强原始3DGS以表示更精细的纹理
AI.result: 显著提升多视角风格一致性，产生稳定且富有表现力的3D风格化，同时保留场景的核心语义结构。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过最优传输原理为3DGS风格化提供了原则性的机制，能够在保持特征覆盖和风格多样性的同时实现稳定的跨视角对应。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D Gaussian Splatting stylization (visual scene appearance), not text-to-motion generation (temporal human motion). The application domain is fundamentally different - motion generation focuses on creating temporal motion sequences while this paper focuses on visual style transfer across rendered views. Although both are in computer graphics, the core task of generating human motion from text/video is distinct from scene stylization. The optimal transport method used for cross-view consistency is also different from the motion generation methods (diffusion models, VLMs for motion assessment) in the research profile.

title: LithoDreamer: A Physics-Informed World Model for Multi-Stage Computational Lithography
comment: Correspondence to: Qi Sun <qisunchn \at zju \dot edu \dot cn>
summary: As semiconductor technology nodes scale, computational lithography is essential for ensuring yield and performance. However, lithography is a continuous physical process involving mask optimization, optical imaging, resist exposure, and development, which existing models fail to capture. To overcome this limitation, we present LithoDreamer, the first physics-informed World Model (WM) framework for computational lithography, which formulates the ``Layout-Mask-Resist Image-After Development Image (ADI)'' pipeline as a decision-driven multi-step evolution system. LithoDreamer captures feature changes between adjacent states to model stage-specific physics-informed latent spaces, in which it controls process intervention exploration and drives subsequent state transitions. To achieve interpretable intervention optimization without continuous supervision, we propose a contrastive variational optimization paradigm that contrasts the latent differences between intervention paths with variational evolution constraints, guiding the model to generate evolutions consistent with real lithography physics. Experiments show LithoDreamer achieves state-of-the-art performance in forward evolution and inverse planning. Our lithography dataset is publicly available at GitHub (https://github.com/7jiangyq/lithodreamer.git).

AI.tldr: LithoDreamer是首个用于计算光刻的物理信息世界模型(WM)框架，将光刻流程建模为决策驱动的多步演化系统，捕捉相邻状态间的特征变化来构建物理信息潜在空间，实现可解释的干预优化。
AI.motivation: 随着半导体技术节点缩小，计算光刻对确保良率和性能至关重要。但光刻是涉及掩模优化、光学成像、抵抗曝光和显影的连续物理过程，现有模型无法完整捕捉这一复杂流程。
AI.method: 提出LithoDreamer框架，将"布局-掩模-显影后图像(ADI)"管道表述为决策驱动的多步演化系统。捕捉相邻状态间的特征变化来建模阶段特定的物理信息潜在空间，控制过程干预探索并驱动后续状态转换。为实现无需连续监督的可解释干预优化，提出对比变分优化范式，将干预路径间的潜在差异与变分演化约束进行对比。
AI.result: 实验表明LithoDreamer在前向演化和逆向规划中达到最先进性能。光刻数据集已公开于GitHub。
AI.conclusion: LithoDreamer成功实现了计算光刻的物理信息世界模型建模，为光刻过程的正向演化和逆向规划提供了有效框架。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The paper is about computational lithography in semiconductor manufacturing (physics-informed world models for photolithography process: layout→mask→developed image), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. Although both use "world models" terminology, the application domains are entirely different - semiconductor photolithography vs. computer graphics motion generation. This is a semiconductor physics problem, not a computer graphics or motion generation problem.

title: ProtoKV: Streaming Video Understanding under Delayed Query with Summary-State Memory
summary: Streaming video understanding (SVU) must answer queries that arrive asynchronously while visual tokens stream continuously under strict GPU-memory and query-time latency budgets. A key challenge is delayed query: decisive cues may appear briefly, yet many subsequent updates occur before the query arrives, increasing the risk that those cues are evicted or diluted under bounded memory. We propose ProtoKV, a constant-footprint SVU memory that represents far history as a fixed-capacity summary state rather than retaining token instances. ProtoKV keeps an exact near-window KV cache and aggregates older content into a semantic-spatial prototype bank with residual statistics. At query time, each prototype is exposed through a bounded pseudo-token interface that is drop-in compatible with standard attention. Under matched budgets and comparable query-time cost, ProtoKV improves accuracy by up to 12.5 points over token-retention baselines on SVU benchmarks in the long-delay regime, with gains that grow as query delay increases.

AI.tldr: ProtoKV是一种用于流式视频理解的恒定内存方法，通过保留近窗口KV缓存并将远历史聚合到语义空间原型库中，在查询延迟较长的情况下相比基线方法提升高达12.5个百分点的准确率。
AI.motivation: 流式视频理解面临异步查询和延迟查询的挑战，关键线索可能稍纵即逝，但后续更新会增加，导致这些线索在有限内存下被驱逐或稀释的风险。
AI.method: ProtoKV保留精确的近窗口KV缓存，将旧内容聚合到语义空间原型库中并附带残差统计。每个原型通过有界伪标记接口暴露，可与标准注意力机制无缝兼容。
AI.result: 在匹配的预算和相当的查询时间成本下，ProtoKV在长延迟场景的SVU基准测试中准确率提升高达12.5个百分点，且随着查询延迟增加，收益也随之增长。
AI.conclusion: ProtoKV通过原型库表示远历史而非保留标记实例，在恒定内存占用下有效解决了流式视频理解中的延迟查询问题，为视频理解系统提供了高效的记忆管理方案。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on streaming video understanding with memory management (KV cache optimization), which is a general computer vision task. This is completely different from the research profile's focus on Text-to-Motion Generation and 3D motion extraction from video. The application domain (video understanding vs motion generation) and methods (KV cache management vs video generation models for motion) are entirely mismatched. This paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation, visual-to-3D motion domain bridging, or quality assessment for generated motions.

title: A Latent ODE Approach to Spatiotemporal Modeling of Cine Cardiac MRI
summary: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMR) captures rich spatiotemporal information about ventricular structure and motion, but conventional risk models use only a few image-derived indices from selected cardiac phases. We present a latent dynamical model that encodes bi-ventricular anatomy and full-cycle cine motion as a continuous latent trajectory, using heart-rate-aware neural ordinary differential equation (ODE) dynamics and a graph-based mesh autoencoder to reconstruct anatomically consistent 3D+t ventricular motion. A covariate-conditioned prior defines the expected end-diastolic latent state, and a Cox proportional hazards model tests whether deviations from this prior predict incident heart failure. We studied 72,386 UK Biobank participants without baseline cardiovascular disease, including 367 incident heart failure events. In a held-out evaluation subset, adding the latent score to refitted pooled cohort equations improved the stratified C-index from 0.704 to 0.785, compared with 0.764 for seven established cardiac markers. Compared with non-graph and non-ODE approaches, the proposed model gave the best trade-off between reconstruction fidelity, generative realism, and downstream prognostic performance. These results suggest that continuous full-cycle modeling of ventricular motion provides informative cardiac phenotypes beyond conventional CMR summaries, while external validation in more representative patient cohorts is required before clinical risk-prediction use.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种潜在大脑动力学模型，利用神经网络常微分方程和基于图的网格自动编码器，对双心室解剖结构和全周期 cine 运动进行连续潜轨迹编码，用于预测incident心力衰竭。
AI.motivation: 常规风险模型仅使用选定心动周期中的一些图像衍生指标，而 CMR 捕获了关于心室结构和运动的丰富时空信息，现有方法未能充分利用这些信息。
AI.method: 使用心率感知的神经 ODE 动力学和基于图的网格自动编码器重建解剖一致的 3D+t 心室运动；协变量条件先验定义预期的舒张末期潜状态；Cox 比例风险模型检验偏离该先验是否能预测心力衰竭。
AI.result: 72,386名UK Biobank参与者中367例incident心力衰竭事件；将潜在大脑评分添加到重新拟合的集合队列方程中，使分层C指数从0.704提高到0.785，而7个既定心脏标记物为0.764；该模型在重建保真度、生成真实性和下游预后性能之间取得最佳平衡。
AI.conclusion: 心室运动的连续全周期建模提供了超越传统CMR摘要的信息性心脏表型，但在临床风险预测使用前需要在更具代表性的患者队列中进行外部验证。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging analysis (cine cardiac MRI) for heart failure prediction using latent ODEs and graph autoencoders, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation for human motion synthesis. Although both involve "motion," cardiac motion modeling for medical diagnosis is entirely different from human motion generation in computer graphics. The methods, objectives, and application domains have no meaningful overlap.

title: Calibrated Harmonic Overlaid Implicit Neural Representations for Multi-Dimensional Data
summary: Implicit neural representation (INR) has emerged as a powerful prior for multi-dimensional data (e.g., multispectral images and videos). However, most INR methods employing periodic activation functions (e.g., Sine) predominantly rely on function composition. This mechanism introduces optimization instability as network depth increases, thereby limiting their performance. Meanwhile, these methods fail to incorporate proper physical priors to effectively alleviate spectrum bias. To address these issues, inspired by the commonalities between deep periodic networks and generalized Fourier series, we propose a novel Calibrated Harmonic Overlaid Implicit Neural Representation (CHOIR). Specifically, we utilize Coordinated Harmonic Superposition (CHS) to replace the conventional function composition used in most INRs, thereby ensuring optimization stability when scaling network depth. Furthermore, we introduce a Perceptual Spectrum Calibration (PSC) to mitigate spectrum bias. This calibration embeds the ubiquitous power-law spectrum prior of natural images and adjusts the globally fixed spectrum towards a physically plausible log-uniform distribution. Extensive experiments on various multidimensional data recovery problems demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over state-of-the-art approaches. Code is available at https://github.com/chorl0229/CHOIR.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的校准谐波叠加隐式神经表示(CHOIR)方法，用于多维数据恢复，解决了现有INR方法的优化不稳定性和频谱偏差问题。
AI.motivation: 现有使用周期激活函数的INR方法主要依赖函数复合，导致网络深度增加时优化不稳定，且缺乏适当的物理先验来有效缓解频谱偏差。
AI.method: 提出两个关键组件：1)协调谐波叠加(CHS)替代传统函数复合，确保优化稳定性；2)感知频谱校准(PSC)嵌入自然图像的幂律频谱先验，将固定频谱调整为物理合理的对数均匀分布。
AI.result: 在各种多维数据恢复问题上均取得了优于现有最先进方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: CHOIR方法有效解决了INR方法的优化不稳定性和频谱偏差问题，在多维数据恢复任务中展现出优越性能。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on Implicit Neural Representations (INR) for multi-dimensional data recovery/signal reconstruction, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use neural representations, this paper addresses optimization stability and spectral bias in low-level signal processing (audio, images, video frames), not generating 3D human motion from video/text priors. The application domain mismatch is fundamental - this is about data recovery/signal interpolation, not motion generation for computer graphics.

title: Socratic agents for autonomous scientific discovery in high-dimensional physical systems
summary: The automation of scientific discovery has reached an inflection point. While AI systems now operate instruments, optimize parameters and generate hypotheses, most remain procedural: they execute workflows fixed by human designers. True autonomous science demands epistemic autonomy--the capacity to construct, challenge and revise physical explanations in response to evidence. Here we introduce AHOIS, a multi-agent AI scientist that embeds Socratic midwifery into closed-loop experimentation. A physics-critic agent interrogates hypotheses through causal questioning, constraint checking, counterexample generation and falsification-criteria formulation. We evaluate AHOIS on a real multimode-fibre optical platform, a high-dimensional system with complex wave transformations, indirect detection, environmental drift and multi-modal acquisition. Without prior encoding schemes, classifiers or speckle models, the system autonomously proposed and validated a random-interference encoding hypothesis, discovered task-adaptive sparse-measurement strategies, diagnosed distinct failure modes (encoding instability, fluorescence contamination and detector noise) and translated a published imaging protocol into an executable workflow on a non-original configuration. The discovered encoding yielded 16x16 measurements with effective rank 56.9 and classification accuracies of 76.97% on MNIST and 83.17% on Fashion-MNIST. Ablations show that Socratic interrogation improves physical consistency, hypothesis completeness, uncertainty calibration and experimental-plan validity. These results establish a route from workflow automation towards evidence-grounded, self-correcting autonomous discovery in complex physical environments.

AI.tldr: AHOIS是一个嵌入苏格拉底式追问的多智能体AI科学家系统，能够在复杂物理环境中进行自主科学发现，在多模态光纤平台上实现了高精度的图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 当前AI系统虽然能够操作仪器、优化参数和生成假设，但仍然停留于程序化执行固定工作流的阶段，缺乏真正的认识论自主性——即根据证据构建、挑战和修正物理解释的能力。
AI.method: AHOIS是一个多智能体AI科学家系统，将苏格拉底式产婆术嵌入闭环实验。物理批评智能体通过因果追问、约束检查、反例生成和伪证标准制定来审视假设。系统在多模态光纤光学平台上进行评估。
AI.result: 系统在没有先验编码方案、分类器或散斑模型的情况下，自主提出并验证了随机干涉编码假设，发现了任务自适应的稀疏测量策略，诊断出不同的失败模式（编码不稳定、荧光污染和探测器噪声），并实现了16x16测量，有效秩56.9，MNIST分类准确率76.97%，Fashion-MNIST分类准确率83.17%。消融实验表明苏格拉底式追问提高了物理一致性、假设完整性、不确定性校准和实验计划有效性。
AI.conclusion: 这些结果建立了从工作流自动化向复杂物理环境中基于证据的自我修正自主发现的发展路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is completely outside the target domain. It addresses AI for autonomous scientific discovery in physical fiber-optic systems (physics experiments), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's about multi-modal fiber optics for image classification, not 3D human motion generation from video. Methods are also unrelated: uses multi-agent AI with Socratic questioning for physics discovery, not video generation models, VLM assessment, or visual-guided motion extraction.

title: Anatomy-Guided Residual Motion Diffusion for Controllable 4D Cardiac MRI Synthesis
summary: Developing robust artificial intelligence models for 4D (3D + time) medical imaging is constrained by limited annotated data, inter-device domain shifts, and privacy restrictions. To address this, we propose a 4D controllable generative framework for anatomically consistent data augmentation. A semi-supervised variational autoencoder learns a compact latent representation of anatomical volumes while jointly predicting aligned segmentation masks in a unified framework. Anatomical structure is then disentangled from temporal dynamics through a cascaded latent diffusion model (LDM). A static LDM generates subject-specific anatomy conditioned on clinical priors (diagnosis and volumes measures) and a subsequent motion LDM estimates residual latent motions, ensuring strict temporal coherence across the 4D sequence. The proposed approach was evaluated on cine cardiac MRI as a representative 4D imaging application. Experiments across multiple datasets demonstrate high controllability of static anatomy (Pearson r > 0.8) and strong temporal coherence (FVD = 288.08). In cross-vendor generalization experiments, augmenting training sets with synthetic 4D sequences significantly improves downstream segmentation performance. Using nnU-Net, the proposed augmentation strategy improves the average Dice score by 1.4% and reduces the Hausdorff Distance by 3.0mm compared to training on real data alone, for the left ventricle, Dice improves by 2.8% with a 5.4mm reduction in boundary error. Overall, this framework provides a scalable and controllable solution for 4D medical image synthesis, supporting the development of more robust models with limited annotations and cross-vendor variability. Code available on https://github.com/cyiheng/4DCardiacMRISynthesis.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于心脏电影MRI的4D可控生成框架,通过半监督变分自编码器和级联潜在扩散模型实现解剖结构和时间动态的分离,生成高质量合成4D序列用于数据增强,有效提升跨厂商分割模型的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 4D医学成像的AI模型开发受限于注释数据不足、设备间域偏移和隐私限制,需要一种可控的解剖学一致性数据增强方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 提出4D可控生成框架:1)半监督变分自编码器学习解剖体紧凑潜在表示并联合预测分割掩膜;2)级联潜在扩散模型将解剖结构与时间动态分离;3)静态LDM基于临床先验生成受试者特异性解剖;4)运动LDM估计残差潜在运动,确保4D序列时间一致性。
AI.result: 在心脏电影MRI上评估,静态解剖可控性Pearson r>0.8,时间一致性FVD=288.08。跨厂商泛化实验中,使用合成4D序列增强训练集显著提升分割性能:与仅用真实数据训练相比,nnU-Net平均Dice提升1.4%,Hausdorff距离减少3.0mm;左心室Dice提升2.8%,边界误差减少5.4mm。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为4D医学图像合成提供了可扩展且可控的解决方案,支持在有限注释和跨厂商可变性的情况下开发更鲁棒的模型。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical imaging (cardiac MRI synthesis), not computer graphics or human motion generation. While it uses diffusion models, the application domain is completely different - it generates 4D cardiac MRI sequences for data augmentation, not human motion/poses. The "motion" refers to temporal dynamics of cardiac imaging, not human body movement. No text-to-motion generation, no visual-to-3D motion bridging, no human motion synthesis. This is a medical AI paper using similar methods but in an entirely different field.

title: LearniBridge: Learnable Calibration of Feature Caching for Diffusion Models Acceleration
summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have driven substantial progress in image and video generation but suffer from prohibitive computational costs. Feature caching accelerates inference by reusing intermediate representations. Existing methods rely on historical features for implementation simplicity, yet suffer from severe error accumulation at high acceleration ratios. To address this limitation, we investigate the nature of the requisite feature correction. We demonstrate that the optimal calibration update is characterized by a shared low-rank subspace across diverse prompts. Guided by this structural insight, we propose LearniBridge, a learnable calibration mechanism for feature caching that bridges multiple timesteps through lightweight LoRA updates. This mechanism enables effective calibration requiring only 3-5 training samples. Extensive experiments on image and video generation show that LearniBridge achieves up to $5.87\times$, $5.75\times$, and $4.10\times$ acceleration on FLUX, HunyuanVideo, and WAN2.1, respectively. On WAN2.1, it improves VBench by 1.28% over the previous SOTA at $4.10\times$ acceleration. Our code is available at https://github.com/Iiiiiiirene/LearniBridge.

AI.tldr: 本文提出LearniBridge，一种基于可学习校准的特征缓存加速方法，用于加速Diffusion Transformers (DiTs)的图像和视频生成推理。该方法通过LoRA更新在多个时间步之间建立桥梁，仅需3-5个训练样本即可实现有效校准，在FLUX、HunyuanVideo和WAN2.1上分别实现最高5.87×、5.75×和4.10×加速。
AI.motivation: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs)在图像和视频生成方面取得了显著进展，但存在 prohibitive computational costs（极高的计算成本）。现有的特征缓存加速方法依赖于历史特征来实现，导致在高加速比下出现严重的误差累积问题。
AI.method:
1. 研究特征校正的本质，发现最优校准更新具有跨不同prompt的共享低秩子空间结构
2. 提出LearniBridge，一种可学习的校准机制，通过轻量级LoRA更新在多个时间步之间建立桥梁
3. 该机制仅需3-5个训练样本即可实现有效校准
AI.result: 在FLUX、HunyuanVideo和WAN2.1上分别实现5.87×、5.75×和4.10×的加速效果。在WAN2.1上，相比之前的SOTA方法，在4.10×加速下VBench分数提升了1.28%。
AI.conclusion: LearniBridge通过揭示特征校正的低秩子空间结构，成功解决了高加速比下误差累积的难题，以极少的训练样本实现了高效的特征缓存校准，为扩散模型的推理加速提供了新的有效途径。

relevance_reason: While this paper mentions WAN2.1 (which could relate to the Seedance/Wanxiang video generation method in the profile), it focuses on DIFFUSION MODEL ACCELERATION via feature caching - an infrastructure optimization task, NOT text-to-motion generation. The application domain is fundamentally different: this paper generates 2D video/image content (HunyuanVideo, FLUX), whereas the research profile requires 3D human motion generation (pose sequences, character movement). Even though both use diffusion models, video content generation ≠ motion generation. The pain points and end goals are completely unrelated - this paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion from video, bridging visual-to-motion domains, or motion quality assessment.

title: EGG: An Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation
summary: High-performance GPU kernels are critical for reducing the exponentially growing computational costs of large language models (LLMs), but their development heavily relies on manual tuning by domain experts. While recent advances in LLM-based approaches show promise for automating kernel generation, they still struggle to achieve both correctness and high performance. This limitation primarily arises from the lack of domain-specific optimization guidance, hindering effective exploration of the optimization space. We propose EGG, an Expert-Guided Agent Framework for Kernel Generation, which incorporates expert optimization principles to guide LLMs' decisions. Inspired by expert workflows, we decompose kernel generation into two hierarchical stages: 1) algorithmic structure design, which establishes a high-quality computational structure foundation; 2) hardware-specific tuning, which performs targeted adjustments through parallel mapping, tensor tiling, and memory optimization. This staged decomposition defines explicit optimization objectives, structuring the design space to achieve progressive refinement. To this end, a stage-aware multi-agent collaboration mechanism is designed for inter and intra-stage context management, ensuring stable optimization trajectories. Experiments on KernelBench and real-world workloads show that EGG achieves a 2.13x average speedup over PyTorch, outperforming existing agent-based and RL-based approaches.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EGG框架，一个利用专家优化指导的LLM代理系统，用于自动生成高性能GPU内核。通过两阶段分层设计（算法结构设计+硬件特定调优）和多代理协作机制，实现自动化内核优化。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型的计算成本呈指数级增长，手动调优GPU内核依赖领域专家，耗时且效率低。现有LLM自动生成方法难以同时保证正确性和高性能，主要受限于缺乏领域特定的优化指导。
AI.method: 提出两阶段分层框架：1)算法结构设计阶段建立高质量计算结构；2)硬件特定调优阶段通过并行映射、tensor tiling和内存优化进行针对性调整。设计阶段感知的多代理协作机制管理阶段内和阶段间的上下文。
AI.result: 在KernelBench和实际工作负载上的实验表明，EGG相比PyTorch平均加速2.13倍，优于现有基于代理和强化学习的方法。
AI.conclusion: EGG框架通过将专家优化知识融入LLM决策过程，结合分层设计和多代理协作，成功实现了自动化GPU内核生成的突破，为LLM的高效部署提供了可行路径。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. The EGG paper is about GPU kernel generation/optimization using LLMs for accelerating computational workloads - entirely in the ML Systems/Compilers domain. It has nothing to do with Computer Graphics, Text-to-Motion Generation, or human motion synthesis. The research profile is about generating 3D human motion from text/video, while this paper is about auto-generating optimized GPU kernels for compute acceleration. Even though both use "two-stage" approaches, the application domains are completely different - one targets motion animation, the other targets compiler optimization.

title: Event-based Gaze Control System for Accurate Real-time Spin Estimation in Professional Ball Games
summary: Spin plays a crucial role in many ball sports due to its effect on the trajectory of the ball. Vision-based estimation of the ball's spin during a game with conventional cameras is challenging due to the ball's small size, high speed, and fast rotation. To address these challenges, we propose an event-based active vision system that can track unmodified balls and measure their spin in real-time. The system consists of an event camera for its high temporal resolution and minimal motion blur, high-speed pan/tilt galvanometer mirrors to keep the ball in the field of view, and a low-latency focus-tunable telephoto lens to increase the spatial resolution on the ball and keep it in focus. To track the ball, we use a hybrid approach that combines 2D event-based detection for centering and 3D positions from a ball localization system for re-initialization. For high-accuracy spin estimation, we propose an offline method that performs contrast maximization on the sphere (s-CMax). This method achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on static balls across multiple sports (table tennis, baseball, tennis, and golf), with mean magnitude and axis errors of 2.1% and 4.0 degrees, respectively. We then develop a low-latency online method for table tennis as a case study in real-time applications. This method uses an uncertainty-aware convolutional neural network trained on pseudo-ground-truth spin labels from the offline approach, combined with a GPU-accelerated batch implementation of contrast maximization for refinement. We demonstrate reliable tracking and spin estimation with a three-view setup during professional table tennis matches, with high accuracy (8.8% magnitude and 6.4 degrees axis mismatch), 3 ms latency, and 750 Hz throughput.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于事件相机的主动视觉系统，用于实时跟踪和测量球类运动中的旋转（spin）。系统结合事件相机、高速万向节镜、可调焦距远摄镜头，采用2D事件检测与3D球定位的混合跟踪方法。离线方法s-CMax在静态球上达到2.1%幅值误差和4.0°轴向误差；在线方法在乒乓球比赛中达到8.8%幅值误差、6.4°轴向误差，延迟仅3ms，吞吐量750Hz。
AI.motivation: 在球类运动中，旋转对球的轨迹有重要影响，但传统相机由于球体积小、速度快、旋转迅速，难以准确估计球的旋转状态。
AI.method: 系统包括：1) 事件相机用于高时间分辨率和最小运动模糊；2) 高速pan/tilt galvanometer镜以保持球在视野内；3) 低延迟可调焦远摄镜头增加空间分辨率；4) 混合跟踪方法结合2D事件检测与3D球定位；5) 离线s-CMax方法进行对比度最大化；6) 在线方法使用不确定性感知CNN结合GPU加速的对比度最大化进行优化。
AI.result: 离线方法在静态球（乒乓球、棒球、网球、高尔夫）上达到最先进的精度，平均幅值误差2.1%，轴向误差4.0°。在线乒乓球应用中达到可靠跟踪和旋转估计，幅值误差8.8%，轴向误差6.4°，延迟3ms，吞吐量750Hz。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的事件基主动视觉系统能够实时准确地跟踪和测量球类旋转，在专业乒乓球比赛中表现出高精度和低延迟，具有广泛应用前景。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about event-camera-based ball spin tracking in sports (ping pong, baseball, tennis), which is motion ESTIMATION/TRACKING of ball rotation, NOT text-to-motion generation or human motion generation in Computer Graphics. The methods (event cameras, CNN for uncertainty) and goals (sports analytics) have no overlap with the research profile's focus on generating 3D human motion from visual/text priors using video generation models and VLM-based quality assessment.

title: ResilPhase: Plug-and-Play Phase Mapping and Noise-Resilient Macro-Trajectory Extrapolation for Diffusion Acceleration
summary: The adoption of powerful diffusion models is hindered by their significant inference latency. Recent ``cache-then-forecast'' schemes alleviate this issue by accelerating DiTs using derivative-based polynomials, but they suffer from severe quality degradation at high acceleration ratios. Our analysis reveals its root cause: the discrete extrapolation performed on representations that are misaligned with the continuous diffusion trajectory and are numerically unstable. Thus, accelerated DiTs suffer from accumulated spatial errors, noisy derivative amplification, and high-order instability. We therefore reformulate accelerated inference as stable macro-trajectory extrapolation in ordinary differential equation (ODE) space. Instead of predicting intermediate features, we align forecasting with the model's Global Drift (GD), i.e., the end-to-end state evolution, thereby eliminating feature inconsistency and memory overhead. However, even this smooth macro-trajectory remains vulnerable to the derivative fallacy: its higher-order temporal derivatives are intrinsically noisy. Thus, we introduce a derivative-free barycentric Lagrange extrapolator to effectively bypass derivative instability and approximation error. We further propose a bounded Phase Mapping that regularizes the extrapolation domain, suppressing oscillatory error growth. These elements collectively constitute ResilPhase, a noise-resilient acceleration framework. Experiments on FLUX.1-dev and HunyuanVideo demonstrate state-of-the-art fidelity under aggressive acceleration ratios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出ResilPhase框架，通过在常微分方程空间中稳定地进行宏轨迹外推，结合无导数重心拉格朗日外推器和有界相位映射，解决扩散模型加速推理中的质量退化问题。
AI.motivation: 当前缓存-预测方案通过基于导数多项式加速DiT，但在高加速比下产生严重质量退化。问题根源在于：与连续扩散轨迹不对齐的离散外推具有数值不稳定性，导致空间误差积累、导数噪声放大和高阶不稳定。
AI.method: 提出三大创新：(1)将加速推理重新表述为ODE空间中的稳定宏轨迹外推，与全局漂移(GD)对齐而非预测中间特征；(2)引入无导数重心拉格朗日外推器绕过导数不稳定性；(3)提出有界相位映射正则化外推域，抑制振荡误差增长。
AI.result: 在FLUX.1-dev和HyuanVideo上实现高加速比下的最优保真度。
AI.conclusion: ResilPhase通过消除特征不一致和内存开销，绕过导数不稳定性和近似误差，为扩散模型的高效推理提供了噪声弹性加速框架。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about accelerating diffusion model inference for IMAGE/VIDEO generation (FLUX, HyuanVideo), not human motion generation. While both use diffusion models, this paper addresses inference optimization for image/video generation models, not text-to-motion generation. The pain points, methods, and application domain are entirely mismatched with the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation research profile.

title: ReasonCLIP-58M: Visually Grounded Commonsense Reasoning Supervision for CLIP
summary: CLIP and its variants are widely adopted visual backbones in multimodal systems, but their pretraining remains dominated by descriptive image-text alignment.
