title: Rolling Shutter Relative Pose Estimation Made Practical
summary: Rolling shutter (RS) cameras equip virtually all consumer devices, yet RS-aware relative pose estimation has remained impractical: the state-of-the-art solver requires a minimum of 20 point correspondences, making RANSAC-based robust estimation prohibitively expensive due to the exponential dependence of the iteration count on the sample size. We make RS relative pose estimation practical by introducing affine correspondences (ACs) into the RS two-view geometry. We derive novel \emph{RS-corrected affine constraints} that account for the coupling between point perturbations and the row-dependent essential matrix, providing two equations per correspondence beyond the standard epipolar constraint. Building on these constraints, we develop a linearized algebraic solver that estimates pose and RS motion from only 7 ACs. The solver exploits the physical smallness of RS parameters to linearize the constraints, eliminates the 12 RS unknowns via null-space projection, and solves the remaining degree-20 system via action matrices in 1.2\,ms. On the TUM RS benchmark, our method achieves the best pose and RS parameter accuracy among all tested methods and, uniquely among RS solvers, provides accurate translational velocity estimates -- which are poorly conditioned from point correspondences alone due to a $\vec{v}$-$\vec{t}$ coupling. On the global-shutter EuRoC MAV dataset, the solver achieves comparable accuracy to the standard 5-point algorithm, demonstrating that it generalizes well to the GS setting. Code is at https://github.com/danini/rolling_shutter_made_practical.

AI.tldr: 论文提出了一种实用的滚动快门(RS)相对位姿估计方法，通过引入仿射对应(ACs)和RS校正的仿射约束，仅需7个ACs即可在1.2ms内估计位姿和RS运动参数。
AI.motivation: 消费级设备普遍配备RS相机，但现有RS相对位姿估计方法需要至少20个点对应，导致基于RANSAC的鲁棒估计因迭代次数指数依赖而成本过高变得不实用。
AI.method: 推导了考虑点扰动与行相关本质矩阵耦合的RS校正仿射约束，利用RS参数物理规模小线性化约束，通过零空间投影消除12个RS未知量，最后用动作矩阵求解剩余20次系统。
AI.result: 在TUM RS基准上达到最佳位姿和RS参数精度，是唯一能提供准确平移速度估计的RS求解器；在全局快门EuRoC MAV数据集上达到与标准5点算法相当的精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法首次使RS相对位姿估计变得实用，在RS和GS设置下均表现出色，为消费级设备视觉里程计算法发展奠定了基础。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating human motion from video/text), while this paper is about Rolling Shutter camera pose estimation in Computer Vision (estimating camera motion from 2D point correspondences). Although both involve "motion," the paper deals with structure-from-motion/camera calibration, not motion generation for graphics. The methods (affine correspondences, RANSAC, essential matrix) are classical computer vision techniques for pose estimation, not video-to-motion or text-to-motion generation methods. This paper would be relevant for camera tracking or SLAM, but not for text-to-motion or video-to-motion generation tasks.

title: AgentX: Towards Agent-Driven Self-Iteration of Industrial Recommender Systems
comment: Authors are listed alphabetically by their first name
summary:
Recommendation algorithm iteration is moving from an artisanal, engineer-bound process toward an industrialized research loop, but this transition remains blocked by a structural execution bottleneck: the idea-to-launch cycle still depends on human engineers to generate hypotheses, modify production code, launch A/B experiments, and attribute online results. Innovation therefore scales linearly with headcount rather than compounding with evidence, compute, and accumulated experimental knowledge. We present AgentX, a production-deployed multi-agent system that fundamentally restructures this production function. AgentX operates as a self-evolving development engine: it autonomously generates, implements, evaluates, and learns from recommendation experiments at a scale and pace that no manual workflow can sustain.
  The system orchestrates four tightly coupled stages in a closed loop. A Brainstorm Agent synthesizes evidence from historical experiments, system architecture, data analysis, and external research into ranked, executable proposals. A Developing Agent translates each proposal into production-ready code through repository-grounded generation and multi-dimensional reliability verification. An Evaluation Agent conducts safe online rollout with guardrail-vetoed A/B judgment, converting both successes and failures into structured knowledge assets. A Harness Evolution layer (SGPO) then distills execution trajectories into semantic-gradient updates that continuously sharpen the agents themselves -- making the system not merely automated, but self-improving.

AI.tldr: 提出了AgentX，一个生产部署的多智能体系统，将推荐算法迭代从依赖人类工程师的手工过程转变为自动化的研究循环，实现自我改进
AI.motivation: 当前推荐算法迭代仍依赖人类工程师生成假设、修改代码、启动A/B实验并归因在线结果，创新只能随人数线性增长，无法随证据、计算和累积实验知识复合增长
AI.method: AgentX协调四个紧密耦合的阶段形成闭环：1)Brainstorm Agent综合历史实验、系统架构、数据分析和外部研究生成排名提案；2)Developing Agent将提案转化为生产就绪代码并进行多维可靠性验证；3)Evaluation Agent执行带护栏否决的A/B测试安全上线，将成功和失败转化为结构化知识；4)Harness Evolution层(SGPO)将执行轨迹提炼为语义梯度更新，持续提升智能体能力
AI.result: 系统作为一个自我进化的开发引擎，能够以任何手工工作流无法维持的规模和速度自主生成、实施、评估和学习推荐实验
AI.conclusion: 该系统不仅是自动化，而且实现了自我改进，从线性扩展转变为复合扩展

relevance_reason: This paper is about industrial recommender systems and multi-agent automation, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. It discusses agent-driven self-iteration for recommendation algorithms, which has nothing to do with 3D motion generation, video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, or bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gaps. The application domain is entirely different - it's information retrieval/machine learning rather than computer graphics.

title: SpatialFlow-GRPO: Where Spatial Credit Drives Image Editing
summary: Recent online reinforcement learning has substantially improved image editing quality. However, existing Flow-GRPO-style methods usually rely on a single whole-image reward, which makes fine-grained editing optimization difficult. We observe that a key obstacle in image editing is this spatial uniformity assumption: a whole-image reward cannot distinguish how different spatial regions contribute to image quality. To address this issue, we propose SpatialFlow-GRPO, a training framework that introduces spatially fine-grained reward feedback. The framework converts region-aware rewards into semantic-region-level optimization signals and aligns region advantages with the corresponding latent positions during policy updates. We also train a region-aware reward model, SFReward, construct SFReward-14K with region-annotated editing samples, and introduce MultiEditBench to evaluate multi-region editing ability. On OmniGen2 and FLUX.2-klein-4B, SpatialFlow-GRPO outperforms Flow-GRPO on GEdit-Bench, ImgEdit-Bench, and MultiEditBench. The results show that SpatialFlow-GRPO converts local feedback into spatially aligned update signals and improves editing quality.

AI.tldr: 现有Flow-GRPO方法使用整体图像奖励，无法区分不同空间区域的贡献，导致细粒度编辑优化困难。
AI.motivation: 解决图像编辑中的空间均匀性假设问题——整体图像奖励无法区分不同空间区域对图像质量的贡献，阻碍了细粒度编辑优化。
AI.method: 提出SpatialFlow-GRPO框架：1)引入空间细粒度奖励反馈；2)将区域感知奖励转换为语义区域级优化信号；3)在策略更新中使区域优势与潜在位置对齐。训练区域感知奖励模型SFReward，构建SFReward-14K数据集，引入MultiEditBench评估基准。
AI.result: 在OmniGen2和FLUX.2-klein-4B上，SpatialFlow-GRPO在GEdit-Bench、ImgEdit-Bench和MultiEditBench上优于Flow-GRPO。
AI.conclusion: SpatialFlow-GRPO能够将局部反馈转换为空间对齐的更新信号，有效提高图像编辑质量。

relevance_reason: The paper is about IMAGE EDITING using Flow-GRPO, which is a completely different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both are in Computer Graphics, the paper deals with 2D image generation/editing (OmniGen2, FLUX.2), not 3D human motion generation. The pain points are also different - this addresses spatial rewards for image quality, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video or bridging visual-to-motion domain gaps. Even though both use diffusion models, the application domain mismatch is fundamental - image generation ≠ motion generation.

title: TAVR-VLM: Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding for Hallucination-Resistant Report Generation
summary: Transcatheter Aortic Valve Replacement (TAVR) planning requires meticulous multimodal reasoning. However, adapting Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to this high-stakes domain is severely impeded by diagnostic hallucinations, where generated text lacks anatomical grounding. To address this, TAVR-VLM is introduced: a novel framework featuring Risk-Conditioned Causal Grounding Attention (R-CGA) that instantiates a model-internal ``Risk $\rightarrow$ Region $\rightarrow$ Word'' structural grounding pathway. R-CGA compresses multimodal inputs into a causal risk bottleneck, purifying dense visual features into a global risk mask. During autoregressive generation, a support-projected causal consistency objective constrains token-level grounding within the risk-defined support mask. Evaluated on $\text{M}^3\text{TAVR}$, a comprehensive 1,482-patient cohort, TAVR-VLM establishes a new state-of-the-art. It achieves an AUROC of 0.896, boosts CIDEr to 0.936, and drastically reduces the hallucination rate to 8.1\%, thereby improving interpretability for evidence-based surgical AI.

AI.tldr: TAVR-VLM是一种用于TAVR术前规划的新型多模态大语言模型框架，通过引入风险条件因果接地注意力(R-CGA)机制，有效解决了多模态大语言模型在主动脉瓣置换领域面临的诊断幻觉问题。该框架在1482例患者的M³TAVR数据集上取得了先进性能，AUROC达0.896，CIDEr达0.936，幻觉率降至8.1%。
AI.motivation: TAVR(经导管主动脉瓣置换)术前规划需要细致的多模态推理，然而将多模态大语言模型(MLLMs)应用于这一高风险领域受到严重阻碍，主要问题在于诊断幻觉——生成的文本缺乏解剖学依据。
AI.method: 提出了一种名为风险条件因果接地注意力(R-CGA)的新框架，构建了模型内部的"风险→区域→词汇"结构接地路径。R-CGA将多模态输入压缩为因果风险瓶颈，将密集的视觉特征纯化为全局风险掩码。在自回归生成过程中，支持投影的因果一致性目标将 token级别的接地约束在风险定义的支持掩码内。
AI.result: 在M³TAVR数据集(1482例患者)上评估，TAVR-VLM建立了新的先进水平：AUROC达0.896，CIDEr提升至0.936，幻觉率大幅降低至8.1%，从而提高了循证外科AI的可解释性。
AI.conclusion: TAVR-VLM通过R-CGA机制成功创建了"风险→区域→词汇"的内部结构接地通路，有效减少了诊断幻觉，在TAVR规划的多模态大语言模型应用中取得了突破性进展，为循证外科AI提供了更高的可解释性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about medical AI (TAVR preoperative planning/report generation from medical imaging) - completely different application domain from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use Vision-Language Models, the task is medical report generation (healthcare) vs. human motion generation (computer graphics). The application domains are entirely unrelated - medical imaging vs. 3D human motion synthesis. This is a classic example of similar methods (VLMs) in completely different fields.

title: RIS-Assisted Proactive Handover for Reliable mmWave Wireless Networks
summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) networks are highly susceptible to line-of-sight (LoS) blockages. Vision-aided wireless communications (VAWC) enable proactive handovers (PHO) to mitigate such blockages; however, PHO becomes challenging when no nearby base station (BS) is available. In such cases, reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS) can be used to restore connectivity. To ensure timely PHO, the RIS configuration time must be taken into account, as the large number of RIS elements can limit responsiveness in time-sensitive scenarios. This work proposes a novel RIS-assisted PHO approach that optimizes the number of allocated RIS elements to balance signal processing complexity and link quality under handover timing constraints, making the RIS-assisted link more energy-efficient. An optimization problem based on particle swarm optimization (PSO) is formulated to determine the optimal end-to-end RIS link setup that runs offline to bypass latency constraints. Results show that reducing the number of RIS elements by 12\% leads to a 10\% decrease in dissipated energy without compromising the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR). Moreover, the RIS-assisted link achieves a 15--30 dB improvement in blocked regions while maintaining accurate PHO timing.

AI.tldr: 本论文提出了一种基于RIS（可重构智能表面）辅助的毫米波网络 proactive handover（PHO）优化方法，通过优化RIS元素数量来平衡信号处理复杂性与链路质量，并在 handover 时间约束下实现节能。
AI.motivation: 毫米波网络依赖视距传播，易受障碍物阻挡。尽管视觉辅助无线通信可实现主动切换，但当附近无基站时需依靠RIS恢复连接。然而大量RIS元素的配置时间限制了响应速度，因此需要在保证及时切换的同时优化RIS配置。
AI.method: 采用粒子群优化（PSO）算法离线求解最优RIS链路配置，优化目标是平衡信号处理复杂度和链路质量，通过调整分配给链路的RIS元素数量来满足 handover 时间约束并降低能耗。
AI.result: 减少12%的RIS元素可降低10%的能耗，同时保持信噪比不变；在受阻区域实现15-30 dB的链路质量提升，并维持准确的切换时间性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过RIS元素数量优化实现了能耗与性能的平衡，为毫米波网络在视距受阻场景下提供了一种可行的主动切换解决方案，具有重要的实际应用价值。

relevance_reason: This paper is about RIS-assisted wireless mmWave networks and handover optimization - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is wireless communications, not motion generation or computer graphics. Methods (PSO algorithm for network optimization) are also entirely different from video generation models, vision-language models, or 3D motion generation models needed for the research profile.

title: A Pipeline for Generating Longitudinal Synthetic Clinical Notes Using Large Language Models
summary: Synthetic data is increasingly used to enable the development and evaluation of AI systems in domains where access to real-world data is restricted. In healthcare, clinical documentation presents particular challenges due to its sensitivity. This work introduces a synthetic clinical notes pipeline and dataset designed to support the development of clinical AI tools while avoiding the privacy risks associated with real patient data. The dataset is generated using a modular pipeline that combines structured patient generation, semi-structured patient journey simulation, and unstructured clinical note generation using large language models. The pipeline is designed to prioritise internal consistency across longitudinal patient records, while also capturing variation in writing style, note structure, and clinical detail. Additional mechanisms, including LLM-based validation and augmentation steps, are used to improve faithfulness, realism, and diversity of the generated notes. We release a dataset of 70 synthetic patients, each associated with 20-50 clinical notes spanning a full hospital journey. The dataset is provided at multiple levels of validation, enabling users to balance realism and scalability depending on their use case. This dataset supports the development, testing, and evaluation of clinical AI systems, including summarisation tools, coding models, and decision support systems, without reliance on real patient data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于生成合成临床笔记的模块化流水线及数据集，旨在支持临床AI工具开发，同时避免真实患者数据的隐私风险。该流水线结合了结构化患者生成、半结构化患者旅程模拟和基于大语言模型的非结构化临床笔记生成。发布了包含70名合成患者的数据集，每名患者有20-50份临床笔记。
AI.motivation: 医疗领域的临床文档因包含敏感信息而难以获取，限制了临床AI系统的开发与评估。真实患者数据的使用面临严格的隐私法规约束，因此需要高质量的合成数据来替代真实数据支持AI系统开发。
AI.method: 采用模块化流水线设计，包含三个主要阶段：1）结构化患者生成；2）半结构化患者旅程模拟；3）基于大语言模型的非结构化临床笔记生成。通过LLM验证和增强步骤提高生成笔记的真实性、现实性和多样性。数据集提供多个验证级别。
AI.result: 生成了包含70名合成患者的数据集，每名患者有20-50份临床笔记，涵盖完整的医院就诊旅程。数据集在多个验证级别下可用，用户可根据用例在现实性和可扩展性之间进行平衡。
AI.conclusion: 该合成临床笔记数据集可支持临床AI系统的开发、测试和评估，包括摘要工具、编码模型和决策支持系统等，且不依赖真实患者数据，有效解决了医疗数据隐私问题。

relevance_reason: This paper is about generating synthetic clinical notes (medical text) using LLMs, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is healthcare/medical text generation, not motion generation. There is no 3D motion, no visual-guided feature extraction, no video-to-motion conversion, and no visual quality assessment for motions. The pain points and methods are entirely different - this addresses data privacy in medical AI, not the visual-to-3D motion domain gap or motion quality issues in computer graphics.

title: Bridging Vision and Language Concepts through Optimal Transport Semantic Flow
summary: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) promise transparent reasoning by predicting through human-interpretable concepts, yet their effectiveness fundamentally depends on how well visual and textual representations are aligned or matched. Existing vision-language CBMs often rely on pre-aligned encoders or global cosine similarity, which obscures fine-grained concept localization and fails to reflect true semantic geometry. In this work, we rethink concept alignment as a dynamic cross-modal transport process instead of static projection and propose the Optimal Transport Flow Concept Bottleneck Model (OTF-CBM). It first learns a data-driven semantic cost via Inverse Optimal Transport to measure cross-modal distances, and then performs unbalanced optimal-transport-based flow matching to model semantic transitions between visual patches and textual concepts. With velocity-based concept activation, OTF-CBM captures interpretable geometric relations without ODE integration. Experiments further show that OTF-CBM achieves superior classification accuracy and concept faithfulness, offering a new geometric and dynamical perspective for interpretable cross-modal reasoning.

AI.tldr: OTF-CBM是一种新型的概念瓶颈模型，通过将概念对齐重新定义为动态跨模态传输过程来实现可解释的视觉-语言推理。该方法使用逆最优传输学习语义成本，并通过基于不平衡最优传输的流匹配来建模视觉patch与文本概念之间的语义转换。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉-语言CBMs依赖于预对齐编码器或全局余弦相似性，这掩盖了细粒度概念定位并无法反映真实语义几何。现有方法将概念对齐视为静态投影，而非动态传输过程。
AI.method: 1) 使用逆最优传输学习数据驱动的语义成本来测量跨模态距离；2) 执行基于不平衡最优传输的流匹配来建模语义转换；3) 使用基于速度的概念激活来捕获可解释的几何关系，无需ODE积分。
AI.result: OTF-CBM实现了卓越的分类准确性和概念保真度，为可解释的跨模态推理提供了新的几何和动力学视角。
AI.conclusion: 该研究提出了一种创新的概念对齐范式，将静态投影转变为动态传输过程，为可解释的视觉-语言推理开辟了新的几何方法。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Vision-Language Concept Bottleneck Models for image classification and interpretability, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both fields involve vision and language, the application domains are entirely different: this paper focuses on semantic alignment between images and text for explainable classification, not on generating 3D human motion from video. The "flow matching" in this paper refers to semantic transport between visual patches and text concepts, not motion generation. The pain points (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, motion quality assessment, visual-to-3D domain gap) are not addressed at all.

title: Generative Retrieval via Diffusion Transformer with Metric-Ordered Sequence Training and Hybrid-Policy Preference Optimization
summary: Embedding-based retrieval ranks items by their similarity to a query in a shared vector space and usually aims to return the highest-scoring items. In many production settings this is not what is wanted: given a seed set that expresses a fine-grained pattern, one needs more items that both satisfy a target attribute and stay within that pattern. We formalize this as pattern-preserving attribute retrieval. The two goals pull against each other: averaging the seeds preserves the pattern but stays in a low-attribute region, while global attribute retrieval drifts to unrelated patterns. We approach the task with continuous generative retrieval, where a model reads a sequence of item embeddings and generates query embeddings for nearest-neighbor search. We propose MO-DiT+HPPO, a staged framework with raw-sequence pretraining, multi-domain metric-ordered continuation pretraining, tail-centroid fine-tuning, and HPPO. Metric-ordered training turns sparse online retrieval labels into in-pattern trajectories ordered from low to high predicted attribute density, teaching one model the metric-improvement direction across domains. HPPO aligns the generated query distribution with the true online objective by labeling a hybrid candidate pool with the online intersection metric and applying reference-anchored preference optimization. A Pareto pair filter keeps only winner pairs that do not lower same-pattern purity, raising the attribute metric without sacrificing the pattern. Across four attribute domains under item- and pattern-holdout protocols, metric-ordered DiT improves the intersection metric over a pretrained generative retriever, and HPPO improves it further, with significant gains on seven of eight domain-split cells and a marginal tie on the hardest split. Metric-predictor validation, order ablations, CPT/SFT comparisons, and a candidate-policy ablation show where the gains come from.

AI.tldr: 本文提出模式保持属性检索任务，解决在保持种子集模式的同时提升目标属性的检索难题。通过MO-DiT+HPPO框架，结合度量有序训练和混合候选池偏好优化，在四个属性域上显著提升交集指标。
AI.motivation: 现有基于嵌入的检索方法无法解决模式保持与属性提升的矛盾：平均种子保持模式但属性低，全局属性检索会偏离原模式。需要在保持细粒度模式的同时提升目标属性的检索。
AI.method: 提出MO-DiT+HPPO分阶段框架：1)原始序列预训练；2)多域度量有序继续预训练；3)尾质心微调；4)HPPO混合候选池偏好优化。度量有序训练将稀疏在线检索标签转化为模式内轨迹，HPPO用在线交集度量标注混合候选池并应用参考锚定偏好优化。Pareto对过滤器保持同模式纯度高的胜对。
AI.result: 在四种属性域的项目和模式留出协议下，度量有序DiT相比预训练生成检索器提升交集指标，HPPO进一步提升，7/8域分割单元显著提升，1个最难分割单元平局。
AI.conclusion: 度量有序训练和HPPO偏好优化有效解决了模式保持属性检索问题，通过将稀疏在线标签转化为模式内有序轨迹学习度量改进方向，并通过对齐生成查询分布与真实在线目标实现显著收益。

relevance_reason: This paper is about "generative retrieval" using Diffusion Transformers, likely for e-commerce/recommendation systems (based on terminology like "mode retention," "target attribute," "item-pattern retention protocol," "intersection metrics"). This is completely different from the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation domain. While both use diffusion models, the application domain is wrong - this is retrieval/optimization in recommendation systems, not 3D motion generation from video or text. The pain points and methods (video generation for motion, visual-guided feature extraction, VLM for quality assessment) have no overlap.

title: Modeling Local, Global, and Cross-Modal Context in Multimodal 3D MRI
summary: Brain MRI poses a fundamental challenge for machine learning: models must learn from high-dimensional 3D data spanning multiple co-registered modalities, despite the limited sample sizes typical of neuroimaging studies relative to the diversity in anatomy, pathology, and acquisition conditions. While multimodal imaging provides complementary information critical for clinical interpretation, effectively integrating these signals remains difficult. We propose Multimodal Intra- and Cross-Context Vision Transformer (MICViT), a 3D vision transformer that explicitly models both modality-specific representations and cross-modal interactions across local and global contexts. Concretely, MICViT combines four attention mechanisms: modality-specific local and global attention for intra-modal feature learning, and cross-modal local and global attention to capture interactions between modalities. We evaluate MICViT on brain age prediction across three heterogeneous datasets (UK Biobank, n=41,404; SOOP, n=1,062; Cam-CAN, n=613) using multiple MRI modalities (e.g. T1, FLAIR, DWI, SWI). MICViT consistently outperforms state-of-the-art CNN and transformer baselines in 3D settings. Notably, it benefits more strongly from multimodal inputs, yielding larger performance gains as additional modalities are incorporated. These results demonstrate that explicitly modeling intra- and cross-modal interactions is key to unlocking the full potential of multimodal brain MRI, highlighting a promising direction for representation learning in neuroimaging.

AI.tldr: MICViT是一种用于脑MRI分析的3D视觉Transformer，通过四种注意力机制（模态特定局部/全局注意力和跨模态局部/全局注意力）来学习模态特定表示和跨模态交互，在三个数据集上实现脑年龄预测的最优性能。
AI.motivation: 脑MRI分析面临高维度3D数据、有限样本量以及多模态数据整合困难的核心挑战，需要一种能够有效融合T1、FLAIR、DWI、SWI等多模态MRI信息的方法。
AI.method: 提出MICViT框架，包含四种注意力机制：模态特定局部注意力和全局注意力用于模态内特征学习，跨模态局部注意力和全局注意力用于捕捉模态间交互。采用3D vision transformer架构处理3D脑MRI数据。
AI.result: MICViT在三个异质数据集（UK Biobank n=41404, SOOP n=1062, Cam-CAN n=613）上 consistently outperforms CNN和Transformer基线方法，并且从多模态输入中获益更多，添加更多模态时性能提升更大。
AI.conclusion: 显式建模模态内和跨模态交互是释放多模态脑MRI潜力的关键，为神经影像表征学习提供了有前景的方向。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - this paper is about brain MRI analysis for medical diagnosis (brain age prediction), not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. Although it uses 3D vision transformers, the application domain is medical imaging/healthcare, which is entirely different from human motion generation, video-to-motion synthesis, or computer graphics. The methods and goals have no connection to the research profile's pain points about extracting 3D motion from video or generating human motions.

title: Learning to Recover Task Experts from a Multi-Task Merged Model
summary: Multi-task model merging aims to consolidate several task-specific experts into a unified model, yet static merging consistently suffers from parameter interference. While dynamic merging models aim to bridge this gap, many works rely on the costly storage and loading of redundant expert components at inference. In this work, from the perspective of task expert, we view parameter interference as parameter perturbation introduced to each expert during merging process. We show that such parameter perturbations can be modeled as affine transformation, which can be approximated as additive offsets. Motivated by these, we propose Recover Task eXpert (ReTeX), a framework that predicts those offsets, in order to undo parameter interference and recover task-expert performance from a single merged checkpoint. To recover the appropriate expert when task identity is unknown, we introduce a router-free task identifier based on SVD subspace signatures computed offline before inference. At inference, the identifier selects the task whose subspace yields the smallest projection residual for a given input. As a result, ReTeX recovers over 95% of individual-expert performance in both vision and NLP domains, while significantly improving generalization to unseen tasks. Crucially, we also show that the parameter offset prediction leads to emergent adaptive interpolation of expert knowledge for out-of-distribution (OOD) tasks. ReTeX adaptively interpolates seen expert knowledge to handle unseen tasks. Our code is available at https://github.com/BAIKLAB/ReTeX

AI.tldr: ReTeX通过预测参数偏移量来恢复合并模型中各任务专家的性能，无需存储原始专家即可恢复95%以上的个体专家表现。
AI.motivation: 多任务模型静态合并存在参数干扰问题，而动态合并需要冗余专家组件的高成本存储和加载。
AI.method: 将参数干扰建模为仿射变换的加性偏移，预测偏移量以恢复专家性能；使用基于SVD子空间签名的无路由任务标识符识别任务身份。
AI.result: 在视觉和NLP领域均恢复了95%以上的个体专家性能，显著提升了对未见任务的泛化能力，并能自适应插值已见专家知识处理OOD任务。
AI.conclusion: ReTeX实现了高效的任务专家恢复，只需单一合并检查点即可，无需存储原始专家组件，为多任务学习提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about multi-task model merging and parameter interference recovery in ML/NLP models, while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. This paper deals with recovering individual expert performance from merged multi-task models using affine transformations and SVD subspace signatures - it has nothing to do with video generation, 3D motion extraction, visual-guided feature extraction, or any computer graphics tasks. The methods and application domain are entirely unrelated.

title: Tractography-Driven Synthetic Data Generation for Fiber Bundle Segmentation in Tracer Histology
summary: Diffusion MRI (dMRI) tractography enables non-invasive reconstruction of white-matter pathways, but its accuracy is fundamentally limited by indirect, low-resolution measurements of axonal organization. Tracer injection studies in non-human primates provide a gold standard for validating dMRI tractography. This, however, requires time-consuming manual annotation of fiber bundles in histology sections. We propose a synthetic-data augmented framework for automated fiber bundle segmentation in macaque tracer histology. Our approach uses ex vivo dMRI tractography as a generative prior to synthesize 2D image patches for training. This provides us with sufficiently realistic foreground texture, which we compose with backgrounds from blockface photos and diversify via domain randomization. A 2D U-Net is trained on mixed real and synthetic patches. Experiments on held-out brains demonstrate improved generalization across brains and fiber bundle densities compared to training with real data only. Training with synthetic data only leads to poor performance, underscoring the need for real supervision. Overall, our approach achieves performance comparable to the state-of-the-art while requiring 3x less manually annotated data.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种合成数据增强的框架，用于自动分割猕猴追踪组织学中的纤维束。该方法利用离体扩散MRI tractography作为生成先验，合成2D图像 patches进行训练，结合块面照片作为背景，并通过域随机化进行数据增强。训练2D U-Net后，在保留的大脑上展现出良好的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 扩散MRI tractography的精度受限于间接、低分辨率的轴突组织测量。 tracer注射研究在非人类灵长类动物中提供了验证dMRI tractography的黄金标准，但这需要在组织学切片中对手工纤维束进行耗时的人工标注。因此需要开发自动化分割方法来减少人工标注工作量。
AI.method: 提出合成数据增强框架：(1)利用离体dMRI tractography作为生成先验，合成2D图像patches用于训练，提供足够逼真的前景纹理；(2)将合成前景与块面照片背景合成；(3)通过域随机化进行数据多样化；(4)在混合真实和合成patches上训练2D U-Net。
AI.result: 实验表明：(1)与仅使用真实数据训练相比，泛化能力得到改善，能够更好地泛化到不同大脑和纤维束密度；(2)仅使用合成数据训练导致性能不佳，凸显了真实监督的必要性；(3)达到与最先进方法相当的性能，同时需要的标注数据减少了3倍。
AI.conclusion: 合成数据增强框架能够有效减少人工标注工作量，同时保持与最先进方法相当的性能。真实数据和合成数据的结合是必要的，单纯合成数据无法达到最佳性能。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical imaging / neuroscience (fiber bundle segmentation in tracer histology using dMRI tractography and 2D U-Net), while the research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different - medical brain imaging segmentation vs human motion generation from video. Although both use "diffusion" in their methods, they are in completely different fields (diffusion MRI vs diffusion models for generation). The pain points addressed are also unrelated - this paper focuses on reducing manual annotation work in neuroscience, not extracting 3D motion from 2D video or ensuring motion quality/consistency.

title: Diagnosing Task Insensitivity in Language Agents
summary: Large language models can serve as capable long-horizon agents, but their out-of-distribution (OOD) generalization remains weak. We identify a key source of this failure as task insensitivity: when faced with similar but distinct tasks, models might apply patterns learned during training and fail to solve the task at hand. We show that models often continue with actions aligned with the original task even when the instruction is semantically corrupted and cannot be directly answered. We further find that, when we replace the task description in a trained prompt with another similar but distinct task, the model may still output the same action. This behavior is accompanied by a consistent training-time attention drift away from task tokens and toward local observations, suggesting an optimization bias toward shortcuts. To mitigate this problem, we propose Task-Perturbed NLL Optimization, a lightweight contrastive regularizer that explicitly encourages action dependence on the task instruction. Extensive evaluations show that our intervention improves task sensitivity and OOD generalization while preserving more stable attention to task tokens.

AI.tldr: 本文研究大型语言模型作为长期决策智能体时的分布外泛化能力弱问题，识别任务不敏感性是失败根源，并提出任务扰动的负对数似然优化方法提升模型对任务指令的敏感度。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型虽能作为长期决策智能体，但其分布外泛化能力较弱，当面对相似但不同的任务时，模型倾向于沿用训练时学到的模式而非真正理解当前任务，这限制了模型在实际场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出Task-Perturbed NLL Optimization（TPNLL），一种轻量级对比正则化器，通过显式鼓励智能体动作依赖于任务指令来缓解任务不敏感问题，并设计实验验证注意力机制的变化。
AI.result: 该方法显著提升了模型的任务敏感度和分布外泛化能力，同时使注意力更稳定地集中在任务token上，改变了训练时注意力从任务token漂移到局部观察的趋势。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式建模任务指令与动作之间的依赖关系，可以有效缓解LLM作为智能体时的捷径优化偏见问题，提升分布外泛化性能，为构建更可靠的语言智能体提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Language Agents and their out-of-distribution generalization abilities (Task-Perturbed NLL Optimization), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different: LLMs/AI Agents vs 3D Motion Generation from video. The methods used (TPNLL for improving LLM task sensitivity) have no overlap with video generation models, visual-guided feature extraction, or 3D motion generation. The pain points addressed are also completely different (LLM generalization vs visual-to-3D motion domain gap). There is no relevance between this paper and the research profile.

title: Confidence-Aware Tool Orchestration for Robust Video Understanding
summary: Video reasoning language models implicitly assume that every input frame is equally reliable. This leads to what we term the Blind Trust Problem: under realistic perturbations such as motion blur, glare, or occlusion, frontier video reasoning models can suffer 15-30%p accuracy drops on real-world embodied benchmarks, while remaining unaware that their visual evidence has been degraded. To address this challenge, we propose Robust-TO, an agentic video understanding framework that explicitly integrates per-frame trustworthiness into every stage of reasoning. Robust-TO organizes heterogeneous visual perception tools under a unified evidence interface. Each tool receives a sub-query derived from the original question and a set of trustworthy frames selected by the reliability-relevance score. It returns evidence in a shared format: a concrete prediction (e.g., a bounding box, motion trajectory, recognized text, or action label), temporal grounding, and a calibrated reliability score. During reasoning, these calibrated scores guide evidence weighting in a three-tier synthesis process (high/medium/low) and define a confidence-cost GRPO reward that jointly optimizes correctness, evidence reliability, and efficiency. On two video reasoning benchmarks spanning eight tasks, Robust-TO achieves 56.4% average accuracy on clean inputs, surpassing the strongest open-source baseline by 10.6%p and outperforming Gemini-2.5-Pro (46.2%). Under five realistic corruption types, Robust-TO maintains 54.3% average accuracy, 5.8%p above the strongest open-source baseline, while exhibiting the smallest clean-to-corrupted accuracy drop among all compared methods.

AI.tldr: 视频推理模型在面对运动模糊、眩光、遮挡等现实干扰时存在"盲目信任"问题，准确率下降15-30%。本文提出Robust-TO框架，通过引入每帧可信度评分来整合异构视觉感知工具，在推理过程中采用三层证据合成机制（高/中/低），并在奖励函数中联合优化正确性、证据可靠性和效率。
AI.motivation: 视频推理语言模型隐式假设每个输入帧同等可靠，但在面对运动模糊、眩光、遮挡等现实干扰时，准确率大幅下降15-30%，且模型无法意识到视觉证据已退化。这严重影响模型在真实场景中的应用。
AI.method: Robust-TO框架包含三个核心组件：1）统一证据接口：异构视觉感知工具接收子查询和可信帧集合，返回结构化证据（预测结果、时间定位、可信度评分）；2）可信度-相关性评分：选择可靠帧；3）三层证据合成：根据可信度评分引导证据加权；4）置信度-成本GRPO奖励：联合优化正确性、证据可靠性和效率。
AI.result: 在两个视频推理基准的八个任务上，Clean输入达56.4%平均准确率，比最强开源基线高10.6%，超越Gemini-2.5-Pro（46.2%）。在五种现实 corruption类型下，保持54.3%准确率，比最强开源基线高5.8%，且clean-to-corrupted准确率降幅最小。
AI.conclusion: Robust-TO通过引入每帧可信度评分机制，有效解决了视频推理模型的"盲目信任"问题，在干净和干扰环境下均取得显著性能提升，为构建更鲁棒的 embodied AI 系统提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (Computer Graphics) - generating 3D human motion from video priors. The paper is about Video Understanding/Reasoning - analyzing and reasoning about video content. While both deal with video, motion generation (graphics/animation) is fundamentally different from video reasoning (computer vision). The paper addresses confidence-aware video reasoning under visual degradation, not 3D motion extraction or generation. The pain point of "handling ambiguous visual guidance" is only tangentially related - the paper focuses on reliable video understanding, not bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gap.

title: Where Do CoT Training Gains Land in LLM based Agents?
summary: Chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning is widely used in language-model agents, but prior work has shown that verbalized CoT is not always faithful and may instead reflect post-hoc reasoning, which means the model already knows the answer before reasoning. We therefore ask what CoT training is actually improving: is the model getting better at changing its action through generated reasoning, or is it getting better at predicting the action directly from the prompt? We study this question by comparing \emph{prompt actions} (predicting action without CoT) with CoT actions (predicting action with CoT). Across checkpoints, prompt-action quality improves substantially. While interacting with the environment, the relative advantage of CoT actions over prompt actions remains similar, showing that CoT training does not widen the advantage of CoT reasoning, and it helps to improve the quality of prompt actions. We further find that later checkpoints are less likely to revise the action in response to CoT, suggesting greater reliance on the prompt. Motivated by these patterns, we selectively mask action-token supervision on a fraction of training examples. This intervention improves out-of-domain generalization.

AI.tldr: 研究Chain-of-thought (CoT)训练的实际效果，发现CoT训练主要改进的是模型直接根据提示预测行动的能力，而非通过生成推理改变行动的能力。
AI.motivation: CoT推理在语言模型代理中广泛使用，但先前工作表明口述的CoT不一定忠实，可能反映的是事后推理（即模型在推理前就知道答案）。因此需要研究CoT训练实际上在改进什么。
AI.method: 通过比较"prompt actions"（不使用CoT预测行动）与"CoT actions"（使用CoT预测行动）来研究这一问题，并在训练中选择性屏蔽部分样本的action-token监督。
AI.result: 1. 随着checkpoint增加，prompt-action质量显著提高；2. CoT actions相对于prompt actions的优势在环境交互中保持相似；3. 后期checkpoint更少因CoT而修改行动，显示出更强的prompt依赖性；4. 选择性屏蔽action-token监督的干预提高了域外泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: CoT训练并未显著扩大CoT推理的优势，而是主要改进了模型直接根据提示预测行动的能力；通过选择性屏蔽action-token监督可以提高模型的域外泛化性能。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Chain-of-thought reasoning in LLM-based agents, completely unrelated to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - this focuses on LLM reasoning and action prediction in agents, not visual-guided 3D motion generation from video. No overlap with the research profile's pain points or methods.

title: Qwen-Image-Agent: Bridging the Context Gap in Real-World Image Generation
summary: While text-to-image (T2I) models have achieved remarkable progress, they struggle with real-world requests that are often underspecified, implicit, or dependent on up-to-date knowledge. We identify this challenge as the Context Gap: the mismatch between the user context and the sufficient generation context for T2I models. To bridge this gap, we propose Qwen-Image-Agent, a unified agentic framework that integrates plan, reason, search, memory and feedback in a context-centric manner. Qwen-Image-Agent treats user input as partial context and progressively constructs the generation context through Context-Aware Planning and Context Grounding. Specifically, Context-Aware Planning identifies missing context and plans how it should be acquired and used, while Context Grounding gathers this context from reason, search, memory, and feedback. To evaluate agentic image generation, we further introduce Image Agent Bench (IA-Bench), a benchmark covering four core image agent capabilities: Plan, Reason, Search, and Memory. Experiments on IA-Bench, Mindbench and WISE-Verified show that Qwen-Image-Agent outperforms strong baselines and achieves state-of-the-art performance.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Qwen-Image-Agent框架，解决文本到图像模型在处理现实世界中未明确说明、隐含或依赖最新知识的用户请求时面临的"上下文差距"问题。
AI.motivation: 文本到图像(T2I)模型在处理现实世界请求时存在"上下文差距"——用户上下文与生成所需的充分上下文之间的不匹配，因为用户请求往往是未明确说明的、隐含的或依赖最新知识的。
AI.method: 提出了统一的智能体框架Qwen-Image-Agent，以上下文为中心的方式整合计划、推理、搜索、记忆和反馈。该框架通过上下文感知规划(Context-Aware Planning)识别缺失的上下文并规划如何获取和使用它，以及上下文接地(Context Grounding)从推理、搜索、记忆和反馈中收集上下文。
AI.result: 在IA-Bench、Mindbench和WISE-Verified上的实验表明，Qwen-Image-Agent优于强基线模型并实现了最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: Qwen-Image-Agent通过上下文感知规划和上下文接地有效弥合了上下文差距，为智能图像生成提供了新的研究方向。

relevance_reason: Complete application domain mismatch. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion), while the paper is about Text-to-Image Generation (generating 2D images). Although both use "two-stage" pipelines and "agent" frameworks at a high level, the core application domains are fundamentally different - motion generation vs image generation. The paper addresses "context gap" in T2I models (missing user context in prompts), which is unrelated to the motion generation profile's pain points about extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors and visual-to-3D domain bridging.

title: Look-Before-Move: Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention in Dynamic 3D Story Worlds
summary: As embodied AI and world models increasingly operate in dynamic 3D environments, visual perception must move beyond passively interpreting given observations toward actively deciding what to observe. We study this problem through camera planning in dynamic 3D story worlds, where the camera must not only generate smooth motion, but also decide what visual evidence should be acquired before it moves. We formulate this capability as Narrative-Grounded World Visual Attention, where the camera acts as an embodied observer that determines what to observe, how to compose the observation, and how to shift attention over time under narrative intent and physical 3D constraints. To realize this capability, we propose Look-Before-Move, a camera planning framework that separates observation specification from motion execution. It first builds a Semantic Observation Contract to convert directorial intent into executable visual constraints, then performs Monte Carlo Viewpoint Search to find narrative-compliant and geometrically feasible viewpoints, and finally applies Semantic Trajectory Grounding to connect selected viewpoints into continuous, collision-aware, and temporally coherent camera motion. We further construct a dynamic 3D Story World Benchmark based on StoryBlender, covering 50 stories, 457 scenes, and 1585 shots with animated characters, semantic scene configurations, and executable 3D environments. Experiments show that our framework improves subject perception, intent consistency, and trajectory quality over representative baselines, demonstrating the importance of organizing visual attention before generating camera motion.

AI.tldr: 研究动态3D故事世界中的摄像机规划问题，提出Look-Before-Move框架，使摄像机能够主动决定观察什么、如何构图以及如何转移注意力，而非被动响应给定观察。
AI.motivation: 随着具身AI和世界模型在动态3D环境中运行，视觉感知需要从被动解释给定观察转向主动决定观察什么。这是通过动态3D故事世界中的摄像机规划问题来研究的。
AI.method: 提出Look-Before-Move框架，包含三个关键组件：(1)语义观察契约(Semantic Observation Contract)将导演意图转换为可执行的视觉约束；(2)蒙特卡洛视角搜索(Monte Carlo Viewpoint Search)寻找叙事一致且几何可行的视角；(3)语义轨迹接地(Semantic Trajectory Grounding)将选定的视角连接成连续、碰撞感知且时间连贯的摄像机运动。
AI.result: 基于StoryBlender构建了包含50个故事、457个场景和1585个shots的动态3D故事世界基准。实验表明该框架在主体感知、意图一致性和轨迹质量方面优于代表性基线方法。
AI.conclusion: Look-Before-Move框架证明了在生成摄像机运动之前组织视觉注意力的重要性，为动态3D环境中的智能摄像机规划提供了有效方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses CAMERA motion planning in 3D story worlds, which is a different application domain from the research profile's focus on HUMAN motion generation. While both involve "motion" in 3D environments, the target of motion is completely different: camera motion vs. human body motion. The pain points differ significantly - the paper focuses on camera viewpoint selection and trajectory quality for visual storytelling, not on extracting 3D human motion from 2D video priors or bridging visual-to-3D human motion domain gaps. The methods (semantic observation contracts, Monte Carlo viewpoint search) are also not aligned with the profile's methods (video generation models, VLM for quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction for human motion). This is a moderately related area in the broader computer graphics field but addresses a different core problem.

title: PhysRAG: Enhancing Physics-Awareness in Video Generation via Retrieval-Augmented Generation
summary: Developing physically aware video generation models remains a significant challenge due to the difficulty in capturing diverse physical phenomena, such as thermal dynamics, mechanics, and optics. In this work, we introduce PhysRAG, a novel pipeline that enhances physical awareness in video generation through Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). To address the issue of limited high-quality data, we design a two-stage data filtering pipeline based on the WISA-80K dataset, resulting in a curated set of 7K high-quality videos for training. Furthermore, we construct a physical video database and develop a mechanism to inject physical knowledge into a video diffusion model using learnable queries. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance in both visual quality and physical rule compliance, surpassing existing models in benchmarks such as PhyGenBench and VBench. We conduct extensive ablation studies to validate the effectiveness of our key components, including the data filtering pipeline, RAG mechanism, and method for physical information extraction. To facilitate future research, our code, data, and models are prepared for release at https://github.com/sediment1024/PhysRAG.

AI.tldr: PhysRAG是一个通过检索增强生成(RAG)技术提升视频生成模型物理感知能力的新 pipeline，旨在解决现有模型难以捕捉热力学、力学和光学等多样化物理现象的问题。
AI.motivation: 开发具有物理感知能力的视频生成模型面临重大挑战，原因在于难以捕捉热动力学、力学和光学等多样化的物理现象，同时缺乏高质量的训练数据。
AI.method: 1) 设计了两阶段数据过滤pipeline，基于WISA-80K数据集筛选出7K高质量视频；2) 构建物理视频数据库；3) 开发可学习查询机制将物理知识注入视频扩散模型；4) 在PhyGenBench和VBench等基准上评估模型性能。
AI.result: 该方法在视觉质量和物理规则遵循方面均达到最先进水平，超越了现有模型。通过消融实验验证了数据过滤pipeline、RAG机制和物理信息提取方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: PhysRAG通过RAG技术成功提升了视频生成模型的物理感知能力，为物理感知视频生成研究提供了新的思路和数据资源。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses VIDEO GENERATION (creating 2D video frames with physical awareness), while the research profile is specifically about TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION (generating 3D skeletal human motion from visual/text inputs). These are fundamentally different application domains in computer graphics - one creates 2D visual content, the other generates 3D character motion data. Although both use diffusion models, the output domain is completely different: video frames vs human motion sequences. The pain points also differ significantly - the paper focuses on physical realism in video generation, whereas the profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video priors and bridging visual-to-3D motion gaps.

title: Einstein World Models
summary: Does intelligence require the ability to reason about phenomena beyond direct experience? It is natural to suspect that some complex thought cannot be captured through language alone. However, of particular concern to this work, is whether visualising counterfactual events can complement language as a mechanism for complex thought. We ask whether LLMs can be trained to utilise such visualisation mechanisms, in a way that benefits their reasoning abilities. Motivated by this question, we propose Einstein World Models. EWMs are a blueprint for LLM-based reasoning systems that place visual-temporal rollouts inside the reasoning trace, allowing them to reason in ways that text alone may not support well. In an EWM, the LLM calls a world-module (not to be confused with a world model), to produce short rollouts of scenes under consideration. The returned rollout is treated not as the answer, but as an inspectable hypothesis that can support later reasoning. Einstein World Models extend the capability of LLMs for tool calling (such as web search or code execution), into the domain of visual thought experiments.

AI.tldr: 论文提出Einstein World Models (EWMs)框架，通过在推理轨迹中嵌入视觉-时序 rollout，使LLM能够进行可视化思维实验，从而超越纯文本推理的局限。
AI.motivation: 智能是否需要超越直接经验进行推理？复杂思维能否仅通过语言捕捉？视觉化反事实事件能否作为语言的补充机制？LLM能否被训练利用这种视觉化机制来提升推理能力？
AI.method: 提出EWM蓝图：LLM调用world-module生成场景的短视觉rollout，返回的rollout作为可检查的假设而非最终答案，支持后续推理。EWM将工具调用能力（如网页搜索、代码执行）扩展到视觉思维实验领域。
AI.result: 建立了一个将视觉-时序rollout纳入推理轨迹的LLM推理系统框架，使LLM能够进行可视化思维实验来推理反事实场景。
AI.conclusion: Einstein World Models为LLM提供了一种新机制，通过可视化思维实验增强复杂推理能力，是对纯文本推理的重要扩展。]

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, generating human motion), while this paper is about LLM reasoning and cognitive science - using visual rollouts to help Large Language Models perform "visual thought experiments." The paper addresses whether AI needs visual experience for reasoning, which is entirely unrelated to the pain points of bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gaps or generating quality motion from video priors. No overlap in methods or application domain.

title: PortraitGen: Exemplar-Driven GRPO with Dual-Reward Guidance for Photorealistic Portrait Generation
summary: Reinforcement Learning like Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) has significantly advanced text-to-image post-training. However, current methods often favor superficial aesthetics, such as over-saturated colors, leaving critical flaws like AI artifacts and biological implausibilities unresolved. We attribute these limitations to two primary factors: (1) The absence of real images during post-training confines GRPO sampling to the original distribution, failing to break inherent generative boundaries; (2) the optimization process lacks specific rewards targeting fine-grained artifacts like overly oily skin and other AI artifacts. To address this, we propose PortraitGen, a novel framework tailored for photorealistic portrait generation. First, we break inherent generative boundaries by directly introducing real images into the GRPO sampling groups, where image inversion is employed to obtain their transition probabilities and latents. Second, to explicitly steer the model toward photorealism, we introduce a complementary dual-reward mechanism: OmniReward for general quality and AI-Portrait for human-centric fidelity. Furthermore, we curate PortraitBench, a comprehensive portrait-centric benchmark. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PortraitGen significantly outperforms existing baselines, effectively suppressing AI artifacts and achieving unprecedented photorealism.

AI.tldr: PortraitGen 是一个基于 GRPO 的新型框架，通过引入真实图像和双奖励机制，显著提升了人像 photorealistic portrait generation，有效抑制 AI 伪影。
AI.motivation: 当前 GRPO 方法偏向 superficial aesthetics（如过度饱和色彩），未能解决 AI 伪影和生物不合理性问题，原因是缺乏真实图像引导和针对细粒度伪影的奖励。
AI.method: 提出 PortraitGen 框架：1) 通过图像反转将真实图像引入 GRPO 采样组，打破生成边界；2) 引入双奖励机制（OmniReward 和 AI-Portrait）；3) 推出 PortraitBench 基准测试。
AI.result: PortraitGen 显著优于现有基线，有效抑制 AI 伪影，达到前所未有的 photorealism。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入真实图像和双奖励机制，PortraitGen 为 photorealistic portrait generation 设立了新标准。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant - This paper is about photorealistic PORTRAIT IMAGE GENERATION, not TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION. The application domains are fundamentally different: image synthesis vs 3D motion generation. While both use generative AI, motion generation requires extracting temporal-spatial motion patterns from videos and generating skeletal animations, which has no relation to portrait image generation. The pain points are also unrelated (AI artifacts in images vs visual-to-3D motion domain gap).

title: Adaptive Utility driven Resource Orchestration for Resilient AI (AURORA-AI)
comment: Accepted at IEEE Research and Technologies for Society and Industry 2026 conference
summary: Modern AI systems are increasingly deployed under non-stationary computational, demographic, and operational conditions in which static resource allocation strategies degrade both predictive performance and human-centric properties such as fairness and explainability. This paper presents AURORA-AI, an Adaptive Utility-driven Resource Orchestration framework for Resilient AI that unifies Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman feedback control, Lyapunov-based stability monitoring, and a fairness-aware composite utility into a single closed-loop policy.The framework continuously redistributes computational budget across a population of heterogeneous AI models so that the global utility, defined jointly over predictive performance, demographic parity, cost, latency, robustness, and interpretability, remains maximised under disruption. The framework is evaluated in a stress-rich discrete-time simulation that concurrently injects demographic bias shocks, gradual concept drift, and abrupt black-swan disruptions, and is compared against five established controllers including Static, Round Robin, Greedy, LinUCB, and a deep reinforcement-learning agent based on Proximal Policy Optimisation. AURORA-AI achieves immediate recovery from the black-swan event compared to eighty-eight time steps for the Static baseline and twenty-two for Proximal Policy Optimisation, lifts the alpha-quantile and the super-quantile by twenty-nine and twenty-five percent respectively, simultaneously reduces the mean and maximum demographic parity gap, and increases the fraction of Lyapunov-stable operating steps. These results indicate that fairness-aware adaptive orchestration grounded in stability theory is a practical and theoretically motivated path toward resilient human-centric AI deployment.

AI.tldr: 本文提出AURORA-AI框架,一种基于自适应效用驱动的资源编排方法,统一Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman反馈控制、Lyapunov稳定性监控和公平性感知复合效用,在非稳态条件下持续重新分配计算资源,使全局效用(预测性能、人口统计公平性、成本、延迟、鲁棒性、可解释性联合优化)保持最大化。
AI.motivation: 现代AI系统常部署在非稳态的计算、人口统计和操作环境中,静态资源分配策略会导致预测性能和公平性、可解释性等人文属性下降,需要在 disruptions 下实现弹性部署。
AI.method: AURORA-AI框架结合Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman反馈控制、Lyapunov稳定性监控和公平性感知复合效用,形成闭环策略,在离散时间模拟中同时注入人口统计偏见冲击、渐进概念漂移和突发黑天鹅 disruptions,与Static、Round Robin、Greedy、LinUCB、PPO等五种控制器对比。
AI.result: AURORA-AI实现黑天鹅事件即时恢复(alpha量子提升29%、super量子提升25%),同时降低人口统计公平性差距,增加Lyapunov稳定运行步骤。
AI.conclusion: 基于稳定性理论的公平性自适应编排是实现弹性人文中心AI部署的实用且理论驱动的路径。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about AI resource orchestration and system resilience (using Hamilton-Jacobi-Bellman control and Lyapunov stability), not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. The application domain is entirely different - it's focused on computing resource allocation under non-stationary conditions, fair AI deployment, and system stability monitoring. None of the methods or application areas match the research profile which deals with video-to-motion generation, visual-guided feature extraction, and 3D motion synthesis in computer graphics.

title: Focusing on What Matters: Saliency-Harnessing Accurate Routing for Diffusion MoE
summary: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architectures have emerged as a powerful paradigm for scaling diffusion models in visual generation. Recent advancements have focused on adaptively allocating computational resources across diverse tokens to improve efficiency and performance. However, we identify a routing assignment problem in existing diffusion MoE frameworks: the router fails to accurately allocate more computational resources to salient tokens. Our analysis attributes this failure to the router's reliance on noise-corrupted latent features throughout the denoising process. Such stochastic noise obscures the critical structural and textural information, thereby preventing the router from effectively distinguishing salient tokens. To address this, we propose SharpMoE, a post-training framework with a saliency-harnessing accurate routing mechanism, which utilizes clean latent features as a noise-free guidance signal for routing. By bypassing the noise-distorted inputs, SharpMoE provides the router with clear saliency guidance, enabling the identification of salient tokens even in high-noise stages. Furthermore, we introduce a trajectory routing loss to constrain the compute allocation throughout the multi-step denoising trajectory, ensuring precise resource allocation along the generation rollout. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SharpMoE serves as a versatile, plug-and-play solution that further enhances the pretrained, converged MoE models, achieving state-of-the-art performance in visual generation.

AI.tldr: 针对扩散模型中MoE架构的路由分配问题，提出SharpMoE框架，利用干净潜在特征作为无噪声引导信号进行路由，并引入轨迹路由损失约束多步去噪轨迹的计算分配。
AI.motivation: 现有扩散MoE框架中，路由器依赖噪声污染的潜在特征，无法准确区分显著token并分配计算资源，因为随机噪声掩盖了关键的结构和纹理信息。
AI.method: SharpMoE使用干净潜在特征作为无噪声引导信号进行路由，绕过噪声扭曲的输入；同时引入轨迹路由损失约束整个多步去噪轨迹的计算分配。
AI.result: SharpMoE作为通用即插即用解决方案，进一步增强了预训练收敛的MoE模型，在视觉生成中达到最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过利用干净潜在特征提供清晰的显著性引导，SharpMoE使路由器即使在高噪声阶段也能有效识别显著token，为扩散MoE系统的路由改进提供了新思路。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses diffusion MoE routing for general visual/image generation, which is a different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, image generation (what this paper does) is fundamentally different from human motion generation (what the research profile needs). The pain points and methods don't align with the motion-specific challenges like extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-to-3D motion domain gap, or 3D Motion Generation Models. This is a method paper for improving diffusion model efficiency in image synthesis, not related to computer graphics motion generation.

title: TraMP-LLaMA: Generative Interpretability with Decoupled Instruction Tuning for Facial Expression Quality Assessment
summary: Existing facial expression quality assessment (FEQA) methods typically produce only a severity score, without explicitly communicating the observable facial motion evidence that supports the prediction. This limits interpretability and makes it difficult to inspect the basis of model outputs in Parkinson's disease assessment. To address this gap, we propose TraMP-LLaMA, a unified multimodal framework that jointly predicts severity scores and generates structured textual reports from facial motion cues. The framework integrates RGB appearance and landmark trajectory cues, and adopts a decoupled instruction-tuning strategy to reduce task interference between severity prediction and language generation. To support this task, we further extend the PFED5 dataset with expert-guided textual motion descriptions and construct PFED5-plus. Experiments on PFED5-plus show that TraMP-LLaMA outperforms competitive video-language baselines in report generation and achieves the best severity prediction performance among the compared methods under joint multi-expression training, improving Spearman's rank correlation by at least 4.39 percent over all competing methods. The text annotations and code are available at https://github.com/shuchaoduan/TraMP-LLaMA.

AI.tldr: 针对帕金森病面部表情质量评估的现有方法仅输出严重程度分数，缺乏可解释性问题，提出TraMP-LLaMA统一多模态框架，整合RGB外观和关键点轨迹线索，联合预测严重程度分数并生成结构化文本报告。
AI.motivation: 现有面部表情质量评估方法只能产生严重程度分数，无法表达支持预测的面部运动证据，限制了模型输出的可解释性，难以在帕金森病评估中检查预测依据。
AI.method: 提出TraMP-LLaMA框架，整合RGB外观和关键点轨迹线索，采用解耦指令调优策略减少严重程度预测和语言生成之间的任务干扰。在PFED5数据集基础上扩展构建PFED5-plus数据集。
AI.result: 在PFED5-plus数据集上，TraMP-LLaMA在报告生成任务上优于竞争性视频语言基线方法，在联合多表情训练下达到最佳严重程度预测性能，Spearman等级相关系数比所有竞争方法提高至少4.39%。
AI.conclusion: TraMP-LLaMA框架能够同时实现可解释的文本报告生成和准确的严重程度预测，为帕金森病面部表情评估提供了有效工具。

relevance_reason: This paper is about facial expression quality assessment for Parkinson's disease (medical application), NOT Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. While it uses keypoint trajectories and RGB features superficially similar to visual-guided motion generation, the application domain is completely different - it's medical assessment/prediction rather than 3D motion generation. The paper focuses on predicting severity scores and generating textual reports for disease diagnosis, not generating or creating new motions. This is a fundamentally different field (medical image analysis vs computer graphics motion generation).

title: How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?
comment: Preprint of a book chapter to appear: P. Fränti, "How to evaluate clustering with ground truth?", In Center-based clustering, Springer Nature, 2026
summary: External indexes can be used for cluster evaluation when ground truth is available. We review the most common external validity indexes focusing on set-matching-based measures. We recommend centroid index (CI), because it is an intuitive cluster-level measure with an explainable result. If we need a more fine-tuned, point-level measure, there are more choices. Pair-set index (PSI) provides a normalized score which is not biased by cluster sizes. If all points should matter equally, then clustering accuracy (ACC) or any other set-matching measure is suitable.

title: Scaling Multi-Reference Image Generation with Dynamic Reward Optimization
summary: While personalized image generation has achieved remarkable progress, multi-reference image generation (MRIG) remains a challenging task. Most existing benchmarks fail to adequately evaluate complex MRIG scenarios, hindering further progress in this area. To better assess model performance on complex MRIG tasks, we introduce OmniRef-Bench, a benchmark that covers complex combinations of reference image types and a large number of reference images. Evaluations on OmniRef-Bench show that mainstream open-source models struggle in complex MRIG scenarios, and their performance deteriorates significantly as the number of mixed-type reference images increases. To address this issue, we propose DyRef, a two-stage training framework. In the first stage, supervised fine-tuning equips the model with the basic capability to handle complex MRIG tasks. In the second stage, we introduce Difficulty-aware Advantage Reweighting (DAR) and Discriminative Reward Scaling (DRS). DAR dynamically adjusts the optimization objective to improve performance when handling a large number of mixed-type reference images. DRS enlarges intra-group reward differences for more effective policy optimization. Experiments demonstrate that DyRef significantly improves the performance of open-source models on OmniRef-Bench and single-image editing benchmarks, demonstrating the effectiveness and generalization capability of our approach.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了OmniRef-Bench基准测试和DyRef训练框架，用于解决多参考图像生成(MRIG)任务。OmniRef-Bench覆盖了复杂的参考图像类型组合，而DyRef通过两阶段训练（监督微调+难度感知优势重加权+判别性奖励缩放）显著提升了开源模型在复杂MRIG场景下的性能。
AI.motivation: 多参考图像生成是一个具有挑战性的任务，现有的基准测试无法充分评估复杂的MRIG场景，这阻碍了该领域的进一步发展。主流入源模型在复杂MRIG场景中表现不佳，且随着混合类型参考图像数量的增加，性能显著下降。
AI.method: 提出OmniRef-Bench基准测试和DyRef两阶段训练框架。第一阶段通过监督微调使模型具备处理复杂MRIG任务的基本能力。第二阶段引入难度感知优势重加权(DAR)和判别性奖励缩放(DRS)：DAR动态调整优化目标以处理大量混合类型参考图像；DRS扩大组内奖励差异以实现更有效的策略优化。
AI.result: 在OmniRef-Bench上的评估表明，主流入源模型在复杂MRIG场景中表现不佳，性能随混合类型参考图像数量增加而显著下降。DyRef显著提升了开源模型在OmniRef-Bench和单图像编辑基准测试上的性能。
AI.conclusion: DyRef框架能有效解决多参考图像生成任务中的挑战，具有良好的有效性和泛化能力。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Multi-Reference Image Generation (MRIG) - generating 2D images from multiple reference images. The research profile specifically requires Text-to-Motion Generation for computer graphics - generating 3D human motion from video/text priors. Even though both involve generation tasks, the application domains are completely different: image generation vs motion generation. Using diffusion models for image generation is fundamentally different from using them for human motion generation. The paper does not address any of the pain points mentioned (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gap, handling visual guidance for motion). This is a clear case of wrong application domain.

title: Joint Learning of Experiential Rules and Policies for Large Language Model Agents
summary: For LLM agents in multi-step interactive environments, a key challenge is to make effective use of accumulated interaction experience. Existing work has typically separated two uses of such experience: keeping it outside the model as natural-language rules for later prompting, or using trajectories and feedback to update the model parameters. The former is easy to interpret but can fall out of sync with the evolving policy; the latter improves the policy more broadly but provides only limited correction for local mistakes in sparse-reward settings. We present Joint Learning of Experiential Rules and Policies for LLM Agents (JERP), which updates a long-term experiential-rule pool and the policy from the same interaction trajectories. At decision time, JERP retrieves task-relevant rules and conditions the agent on them together with the interaction history. After each episode, it uses the collected trajectories both to optimize the policy and to revise the rule pool by comparing current rollouts with reference successful trajectories. This coupling keeps the rule pool aligned with the evolving policy while allowing stable and effective behaviors to be gradually absorbed into the model itself. Experiments on AlfWorld and WebShop show that JERP yields consistent gains in decision performance for complex interactive tasks.

AI.tldr: 本文提出JERP方法，用于解决LLM智能体在多步骤交互环境中如何有效利用累积交互经验的问题。该方法将经验规则池和策略从相同的交互轨迹中联合学习，在决策时检索相关规则并结合交互历史来条件化智能体。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常将交互经验的利用分离为两种方式：作为自然语言规则用于提示，或通过轨迹更新模型参数。前者易于解释但可能与演化策略不同步；后者能更广泛改进策略，但在稀疏奖励设置下对局部错误的修正有限。
AI.method: JERP方法包含三个关键步骤：1) 在决策时检索任务相关规则并与交互历史结合来条件化智能体；2) 收集轨迹用于优化策略；3) 通过比较当前 rollout 与参考成功轨迹来修订规则池。这种耦合使规则池与演化策略保持对齐，同时允许稳定有效的行为逐渐被吸收到模型中。
AI.result: 在AlfWorld和WebShop上的实验表明，JERP在复杂交互任务的决策性能上获得了一致的提升。
AI.conclusion: JERP成功地将经验规则学习与策略学习相结合，解决了两种传统方法分离的局限性，为LLM智能体在多步骤交互环境中的有效学习提供了新的思路。

relevance_reason: This paper is about LLM agents learning decision-making rules and policies for interactive environments (AlfWorld, WebShop), which is completely unrelated to the Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation field. The application domain is entirely different - this is about language model agents, not about 3D motion generation, video-to-motion, or any computer graphics applications. Even though it mentions "rules" and "policies," these are concepts used in LLM agent decision-making, not the visual-guided motion generation methods (video generation models, VLM for quality assessment, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion models) mentioned in the research profile.

title: Computer Vision for MOBA Analytics: A Dataset and Baseline for Visibility Analysis in Dota 2
comment: Accepted for presentation at the 2026 Simpósio Brasileiro de Jogos e Entretenimento Digital (SBGames)
summary: Introduction: Most Multiplayer Online Battle Arena (MOBA) analytics studies rely on structured data, which does not directly capture what each team could actually see during a match. Objective: This work introduces Dota2-Vis, a video-based dataset, and a baseline pipeline for visibility analysis in professional Dota 2 matches. Methodology: The dataset comprises all 144 matches from The International 2025, recorded from both team perspectives, totaling 288 Full HD videos, together with 2,477 manually annotated minimap images. We evaluate multiple variants of a modern object detector for player-icon detection and use the best-performing model to estimate opponent-visible player presence over time. Results: YOLO11l (large) achieved the best overall performance, reliably identifying player icons even in dense and visually cluttered minimap scenes. The resulting visibility curves reveal player, hero, role, and team-level patterns that complement conventional MOBA analytics, highlighting behavioral differences that are difficult to obtain from structured data alone. The dataset and code are publicly available at https://github.com/RicardoRCarvalho/dota2-vis/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了Dota2-Vis，一个基于视频的电竞数据集,用于分析职业Dota2比赛中的可见性问题。该数据集包含2025年国际邀请赛的144场比赛(共288个全高清视频),并提供了2,477张手动标注的小地图图像。研究评估了YOLO系列目标检测器在小地图玩家图标检测上的性能,并分析了对手可见的玩家存在模式。
AI.motivation: 现有MOBA(多人在线竞技场)游戏分析主要依赖结构化数据,但这类数据无法直接反映比赛中各队伍实际能看到的内容,即视野信息对于理解比赛策略至关重要但传统数据难以捕捉。
AI.method: 1)构建数据集:收集TI2025的144场比赛,每场从双方视角录制,共288个全高清视频,并手动标注2,477张小地图图像;2)评估YOLO11l等多个目标检测器变体进行玩家图标检测;3)使用性能最优的模型估计对手可见的玩家存在随时间变化情况。
AI.result: YOLO11l(大型版本)在密集和视觉混乱的小地图场景中表现最佳,能可靠识别玩家图标。生成的可见性曲线揭示了玩家、英雄、角色和团队层面的模式,这些信息是传统结构化数据难以获取的,为MOBA分析提供了补充视角。
AI.conclusion: Dota2-Vis数据集和基线管道为MOBA游戏的视野分析提供了有效工具,YOLO11l模型可准确检测小地图玩家图标。该研究填补了视频基MOBA分析方法的空白,公开的数据集和代码将促进该领域进一步研究。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant application domain. The research profile is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text), while this paper is about MOBA game analytics (Dota 2 visibility analysis using YOLO for mini-map player icon detection). These are entirely different fields - one deals with generative motion synthesis, the other deals with game informatics and object detection in gaming UI. The methods (YOLO object detection vs video generation/diffusion models for motion) and goals (game analytics vs motion generation quality) have no overlap.

title: OpenRCA 2.0: From Outcome Labels to Causal Process Supervision
summary: Root cause analysis (RCA) poses a holistic test of LLM agentic capabilities, such as long-context understanding, multi-step reasoning, and tool use. However, existing datasets suffer from a fundamental gap: they label only the root cause, not the propagation path connecting it to the observed symptom, which largely simplifies the task to naive pattern matching. To support rigorous evaluation, we introduce PAVE, a step-wise labeling protocol that leverages known interventions from fault injection to reconstruct causal propagation paths. The mechanism is forward verification: reasoning from cause to effect rather than inferring backward from symptoms. Applying PAVE yields OpenRCA 2.0 (500 instances), the first cross-system RCA benchmark with step-wise causal annotations for LLM agents. Across 11 frontier LLMs, recovering the exact root-cause set succeeds in only 20.7% of cases on average. To locate where this difficulty lies, we relax the criterion and find what we call the ungrounded diagnosis: agents identify at least one correct root-cause service in 76.0% of cases, but ground that service in a verified causal propagation path to the observed symptom in only 61.5%. Outcome-only evaluation hides this failure mode; step-wise causal ground truth is the missing piece for trustworthy LLM-based RCA agents.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PAVE协议和OpenRCA 2.0基准，用于评估LLM代理的根因分析能力。与现有数据集不同，该基准包含从原因到症状的因果传播路径标注，而非仅标注根因。
AI.motivation: 现有RCA数据集仅标注根因，缺少连接根因与观察症状的传播路径，导致任务简化为简单的模式匹配，无法全面评估LLM代理的长上下文理解、多步推理和工具使用等能力。
AI.method: 提出PAVE分步标注协议，利用故障注入的已知干预来重建因果传播路径，遵循从原因到效果的前向验证推理方式。构建OpenRCA 2.0基准，包含500个跨系统实例，首创分步因果标注。
AI.result: 在11个前沿LLM中测试显示：精确根因集恢复平均仅成功20.7%；宽松标准下，"无依据诊断"中76.0%能识别正确根因服务，但仅61.5%能在验证的因果传播路径中将其与症状关联。
AI.conclusion: 仅评估结果会掩盖LLM代理的真实失败模式；分步因果标注是实现可信RCA代理的关键缺失环节。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Root Cause Analysis (RCA) using LLM agents for system debugging, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domains are entirely different: the research profile focuses on visual-to-3D motion generation, video generation models, and human motion synthesis, while this paper deals with causal reasoning for fault diagnosis in technical systems. The methods (LLM-based causal analysis) and domain (system troubleshooting) have no connection to video generation, motion generation, or computer graphics.

title: Geometric Gradient Rectification for Safe Open-Set Semi-Supervised Learning
summary: Open-set semi-supervised learning aims to leverage unlabeled data that may contain out-of-distribution outliers while maintaining performance on in-distribution classes. Existing methods mainly follow two paradigms: filtering suspicious samples or incorporating unlabeled objectives with soft weighting. We argue that both face a common trade-off: aggressive filtering can discard informative but hard ID samples, whereas utilization can introduce auxiliary gradients that conflict with supervised learning when pseudo labels are wrong. We therefore shift the focus from sample selection to gradient-level control. We propose \textit{Geometric Gradient Rectification} (GGR), a plug-in framework that uses the supervised gradient as an anchor and projects conflicting auxiliary gradients onto an admissible region in gradient space. This makes the applied auxiliary update first-order non-opposing within the rectified coordinate block while preserving orthogonal components that may still carry useful representation signals. We further extend GGR with subspace-aware rectification to stabilize the anchor under noisy mini-batch gradients. Experiments on CIFAR and ImageNet benchmarks show that GGR improves representative OSSL baselines in most settings and yields gains in both closed-set generalization and open-set robustness. Code will be available at https://github.com/JiaheChen2002/GGR.

AI.tldr: 本文提出GGR框架，通过梯度级控制解决开集半监督学习中的权衡问题——传统方法在过滤可疑样本与利用未标注数据之间存在矛盾，GGR将监督梯度作为锚点，将冲突的辅助梯度投影到允许区域，实现一阶非对抗更新。
AI.motivation: 现有OSSL方法面临两难：激进取样可能丢弃信息丰富的困难ID样本，而利用未标注数据时错误伪标签会引入与监督学习冲突的梯度。现有的样本过滤或软加权范式无法从根本上解决这个矛盾。
AI.method: 提出几何梯度 rectification（GGR）插件框架，使用监督梯度作为锚点，将冲突的辅助梯度投影到允许区域，使更新在一阶梯度上非对抗，同时保留可能仍有用的正交分量。还扩展了子空间感知的rectification以稳定锚点。
AI.result: 在CIFAR和ImageNet基准测试上，GGR提升了代表性OSSL基线模型在大多数设置下的性能，同时在闭集泛化和开集鲁棒性两方面都获得了增益。
AI.conclusion: 从样本选择转向梯度级控制是解决OSSL中挑战的有效范式，GGR框架具有通用性，可作为插件应用于多种OSSL方法。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses Open-Set Semi-Supervised Learning for image classification (CIFAR/ImageNet benchmarks), which is an entirely different field from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is fundamentally different - this is about machine learning classification, not motion generation, video generation, or any computer graphics task. The methods (gradient rectification for OSSL) have no relevance to extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-guided motion generation, or the visual-to-3D motion domain gap problems.

title: TOPS: First-Principles Visual Token Pruning via Constructing Token Optimal Preservation Sets for Efficient MLLM Inference
summary: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) have achieved strong multimodal reasoning capabilities, but their efficiency is limited by the large number of visual tokens, which introduces substantial computational overhead. Visual token pruning offers a natural solution, yet existing methods are imperfect: attention-based criteria tend to retain redundant tokens, while diversity-based criteria are often agnostic to user instructions. Even methods that combine multiple criteria still lack a principled formulation of the intrinsic objective of token pruning. In this paper, we revisit visual token pruning from a first-principles perspective and formulate it as constructing Token Optimal Preservation Sets. Through a top-down information-theoretic analysis, we identify three fundamental principles for effective token selection: Task Relevance, Information Coverage, and Semantic Diversity. Based on these principles, we propose TOPS, a training-free and model-agnostic pruning module that can be applied to various MLLMs. Extensive experiments on 7 MLLM backbones and 14 benchmarks demonstrate that TOPS outperforms prior methods under diverse pruning settings. Notably, on LLaVA-NeXT, TOPS removes 77.8% of visual tokens while preserving 100.0% and 100.6% performance on its 7B and 13B models, respectively, suggesting that pruning redundant visual tokens can sometimes mitigate hallucination and inspire future lightweight MLLM design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TOPS方法，从第一性原理角度重新审视视觉token剪枝，通过信息论分析识别出任务相关性、信息覆盖和语义多样性三个基本原则，在移除77.8%视觉token的同时保持甚至提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 多模态大语言模型因大量视觉token导致计算开销大，效率受限。现有视觉token剪枝方法存在缺陷：基于注意力的标准倾向于保留冗余token，基于多样性的标准忽略用户指令，缺乏对token剪枝内在目标的 principled 定义。
AI.method: 从第一性原理角度将视觉token剪枝形式化为构建Token Optimal Preservation Sets。通过自顶向下的信息论分析，识别出三个基本原则：任务相关性、信息覆盖和语义多样性。基于这些原则，提出TOPS——一种无需训练、模型无关的剪枝模块，可应用于各种MLLMs。
AI.result: 在7个MLLM backbone和14个benchmark上进行了广泛实验。TOPS在各种剪枝设置下优于先前方法。在LLaVA-NeXT上，TOPS移除了77.8%的视觉token，同时分别在7B和13B模型上保持100.0%和100.6%的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文表明剪枝冗余视觉token有时可以缓解幻觉，并为未来轻量级MLLM设计提供启示。TOPS作为一个无需训练、模型无关的剪枝模块，在效率和性能之间实现了良好的平衡。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visual token pruning for efficient Multi-Modal Large Language Model (MLLM) inference - completely different application domain. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from visual/video inputs), while this paper addresses LLM efficiency optimization. Although both involve visual features, the goal is entirely different: motion generation vs. LLM inference acceleration. This would be like comparing image generation to medical imaging - both use similar underlying techniques but serve completely different purposes.

title: Unison: Benchmarking Unified Multimodal Models via Synergistic Understanding and Generation
summary: Unified multimodal models capable of both understanding and generation have achieved remarkable strides. However, despite their unified designs, existing evaluations typically assess understanding and generation capabilities in isolation, overlooking the synergy between comprehension and generation. To bridge this gap, we introduce Unison, a comprehensive benchmark comprising 2,169 high-quality unified task samples, designed to evaluate joint understanding and generation in unified multimodal models. Unison offers three key strengths: 1) Comprehensive Dimensions: Unison encompasses internal consistency, understanding-guided generation, generation-guided understanding, and mutual enhancement to enable holistic evaluation. 2) Diagnostic Evaluation: it provides both unified and decoupled tracks for understanding and generation, allowing fine-grained attribution of failure modes and quantitative analysis of the gains from unified modeling. 3) Human Alignment: we also introduce Unison-Judge, an evaluation model well aligned with human judgments to ensure reliable assessment. Based on systematic evaluations of state-of-the-art models on Unison, we uncover critical limitations in current unified multimodal systems and highlight promising directions for future research. Codes, Unison and Unison-Judge are publicly available at https://github.com/FudanCVL/Unison.

AI.tldr: Unison是一个综合基准测试，用于评估统一多模态模型的联合理解和生成能力，包含2169个高质量样本。
AI.motivation: 现有统一多模态模型的评估通常将理解和生成能力分开评估，忽视了两者之间的协同作用。
AI.method: 构建了Unison基准测试，提供三个关键优势：1)综合维度(内部一致性、理解引导生成、生成引导理解、相互增强)；2)诊断评估(统一和分离轨道)；3)人类一致性(Unison-Judge评估模型)。
AI.result: 通过对最先进模型的系统评估，揭示了当前统一多模态系统的关键限制。
AI.conclusion: 为统一多模态模型的未来研究指明了有前景的方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about benchmarking unified multimodal models for general understanding and generation tasks - completely different field from Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. It does not address any of the pain points related to 3D motion extraction from video, visual-to-motion domain gap, or motion quality assessment. The application domain is entirely different (general multimodal AI evaluation vs. computer graphics motion generation).

title: A Process Harness for Uplifting Legacy Workflows to Agentic BPM: Design and Realization in CUGA FLO
summary: We introduce the process harness, a new mechanism for uplifting legacy workflows into Agentic Business Process Management (Agentic BPM) without replacing the underlying workflow engine. A process harness places a policy-governed agentic layer around a deterministic workflow engine, intercepting designated control points to contribute reasoning, adaptation, and oversight while the engine retains structural authority over the process. To define the process harness rigorously, we develop the Task-Decision-Flow (TDF) model, specifying both its data schema and its execution semantics. TDF decomposes LLM reasoning across three policy-governed agent types: a TaskAgent for knowledge-intensive task execution, a DecisionAgent for per-case gateway routing, and a FlowAgent that governs runtime flow adaptation through a principled hook mechanism. Each agent reasons within an explicit policy drawn from the process FRAME, the aggregate policy set governing all LLM calls in the system. We then present CUGA FLO as the design and implementation realization of the TDF model, and demonstrate it on a loan approval workflow that exercises all three agent types and hook-driven regulatory override. The process harness uniquely reconciles imperative requirements, realized through deterministic workflow execution that enforces structural compliance, with normative requirements, realized through policy-framed agentic autonomy invoked at designated control points wherever the process demands it.

AI.tldr: 流程驾驭（Process Harness）是一种将传统工作流升级为智能业务流程管理（Agentic BPM）的新机制，无需替换底层工作流引擎。该机制通过在确定性工作流引擎周围放置一个策略治理的智能层，在指定的控制点拦截并贡献推理、适应和监督。
AI.motivation: 解决如何在不替换遗留工作流引擎的情况下，将传统工作流升级为具有智能代理能力的现代业务流程管理系统，同时保留确定性引擎的结构化权威和合规性。
AI.method: 提出任务-决策-流（TDF）模型，定义数据模式和执行语义。TDF将LLM推理分解为三种策略治理的代理类型：TaskAgent（知识密集型任务执行）、DecisionAgent（按案例网关路由）、FlowAgent（通过原则性钩子机制管理运行时流适配）。每种代理在显式策略下推理，这些策略来自管理系统中所有LLM调用的过程FRAME聚合策略集。实现CUGA FLO设计和部署。
AI.result: 成功在贷款审批工作流上演示了三种代理类型和钩子驱动的监管覆盖，验证了流程驾驭机制能够协调强制性要求（通过确定性工作流执行实现结构化合规）和规范性要求（通过策略治理的智能代理自主性实现）。
AI.conclusion: 流程驾驭机制独特地调和了命令式要求和规范性要求，为遗留工作流向智能业务流程管理的演进提供了一种可行的升级路径，同时保持了结构化权威和合规性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Business Process Management (BPM) and workflow automation in enterprise settings (loan approval workflows), completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The paper deals with LLM-based agents for business decision-making and workflow routing, not visual motion synthesis, video generation, or 3D motion extraction from video. While both mention "LLM" and "agents," the application domain is entirely different - this is enterprise software/business process engineering versus computer graphics and motion generation. There is no relevance to the research profile's pain points about visual-to-3D motion domain gaps or motion quality assessment in graphics.
