title: Event-Aware Instructed Assistant for Referring Video Segmentation
summary: Existing referring video segmentation methods often treat a video as a single event consisting of multiple images, overlooking the fact that a video typically contains multiple distinct events. Under such a mechanism, the model needs to directly understand all the complex content in the video and text, which can easily lead to confusion and hallucinations. To address this issue, we propose to decompose a video to a set of simple events by learnable Event Query, and understand complex video content in an event-by-event, easy-to-understand manner. This is based on the observation that natural language expressions often divide a video into distinct, text-related segments, each representing a separate event within a compound event. We introduce EVIS, an Event-Aware Video Instructed Segmentation Assistant, which utilizes text-guided Event Queries to partition a video into simple events, extracting event-aware visual-text features to achieve a hierarchical understanding of the video. Additionally, we propose Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning, which enables the MLLMs to track targets in long-term videos by integrating fine-grained pixel features with prior object queries. Extensive experimental results on 5 public benchmarks demonstrate EVIS's strong performance in addressing the referring video segmentation task.

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVIS，一种用于指代视频分割的方法。通过可学习的Event Query将视频分解为多个简单事件，实现逐事件层级化理解，并提出Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning帮助多模态大语言模型在长视频中跟踪目标。
AI.motivation: 现有指代视频分割方法将视频视为包含多张图像的单一事件，忽略了视频通常包含多个独立事件的事实。这导致模型需要直接理解视频和文本中的所有复杂内容，容易产生混淆和幻觉问题。
AI.method: 1.使用可学习的Event Query将视频分解为多个简单事件；2.利用文本引导的Event Queries划分视频并提取事件感知的视觉-文本特征；3.提出Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning，将细粒度像素特征与先验对象查询相结合，实现长视频目标跟踪。
AI.result: 在5个公开基准数据集上的广泛实验证明了EVIS在指代视频分割任务上的优异性能。
AI.conclusion: EVIS通过逐事件、易理解的方式处理复杂视频内容，有效避免了混淆和幻觉问题，在指代视频分割任务上取得了strong performance。

relevance_reason: The paper is about "Referring Video Segmentation" - segmenting objects in videos based on text descriptions - which is a video understanding/segmentation task, NOT a Text-to-Motion Generation task. The research profile is about generating 3D human motion from video priors, while this paper is about segmenting and tracking objects in video for visual understanding. Even though both deal with video, they are in completely different application domains: motion generation vs. video segmentation. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation (extracting 3D motion from 2D video, ensuring quality of generated motions, bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gap). Using Event Queries and Object-Pixel-Hybrid Learning for video segmentation is a different methodology applied to a different problem.

title: Vulnerability of Natural Language Classifiers to Evolutionary Generated Adversarial Text
summary: Deep learning models have achieved impressive performance across various fields but remain vulnerable to adversarial inputs, particularly in NLP, where such attacks can have significant real-world consequences. Adversarial attacks often involve small, semantically similar token replacements to fool NLP models, and recent methods have become more precise by targeting specific vulnerable words, often by exploiting some level of access to the model's internal structure. This paper proposes GAversary, a hybrid Genetic Algorithm (GA) to generate adversarial attacks on natural language models. The GA is able to treat the target model as a black box, requiring only the logit value output by the model to guide the search. GAversary differs from GAs previously proposed for this problem by using GloVe embeddings to propose word replacements (the mutation operator) to improve the semantic similarity of the adversarial examples. GAversary is applied to several benchmark data sets and well-known target models. GAversary is able to substantially reduce the target model's accuracy on test data compared to the BAE and A2T attacks compared against (in the best case, reducing a 76.8% accuracy to 5.8%, compared to BAE's 27.6%). The trade-off is that GAversary perturbs just under twice as many words as the other two methods, with a slightly lower semantic similarity to the original text and around a 5% increase in run-time.

AI.tldr: GAversary是一种混合遗传算法，用于对NLP模型生成对抗性攻击，将目标模型视为黑盒，仅使用logit值指导搜索，利用GloVe嵌入提出词替换以提高对抗样本的语义相似性。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在各种领域取得了令人印象深刻的性能，但在NLP领域容易受到对抗性输入的攻击，这些攻击可能产生重大的现实世界后果。现有的对抗攻击方法通过针对特定脆弱词来提高精度，但通常需要访问模型内部结构。
AI.method: 提出GAversary，一种混合遗传算法(GA)来生成对抗性攻击。该算法将目标模型视为黑盒，仅需要模型的logit值输出作为搜索指导。与先前用于此问题的GA不同，GAversary使用GloVe嵌入来提出词替换(突变算子)，以提高对抗样本的语义相似性。
AI.result: GAversary能够显著降低目标模型在测试数据上的准确率。与BAE和A2T攻击相比，GAversary在最佳情况下将76.8%的准确率降低到5.8%，而BAE仅降至27.6%。代价是GAversary扰动的词数量略多于其他两种方法的两倍，语义相似性略低，运行时间增加约5%。
AI.conclusion: GAversary是一种有效的黑盒对抗攻击方法，在攻击效果上显著优于BAE和A2T，但存在扰动词数量较多和语义相似性略低的权衡。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about adversarial attacks on NLP/text classification models using genetic algorithms and GloVe embeddings. It has no connection to Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - NLP security vs motion generation. It does not address any of the pain points (3D motion extraction, visual-to-3D motion gap, motion quality assessment) nor does it use any relevant methods (video generation, visual-guided feature extraction, 3D motion models).

title: On-board Remote-Sensing Foundation Models for Unsupervised Change Detection of Disaster Events
summary: Remote Sensing Foundation Models (RSFMs) have emerged as a powerful alternative to supervised models for Earth Observation, allowing satellites to autonomously trigger high-resolution captures or adjust tasking parameters upon detecting an anomaly, thereby maximizing the utility of the mission's limited power and computational resources. RSFMs are versatile, unified encoders that optimize onboard storage for multiple orbital applications while ensuring high-fidelity feature extraction. In particular, unsupervised change detection with RSFMs offers a well-informed and transformative path for disaster monitoring without expensive labels. In this paper, we present a novel unsupervised detection method based on ResNet (RSFM) + FPN which identifies a wide spectrum of anomalies by detecting subtle semantic shifts in the latent space between successive orbital passes. By relying on an untrained FPN architecture and its intrinsic priors, the system achieves efficient image-level generation and higher resolution mapping with minimal effort (training-free) compared to previous proposals (patch-based, trained). And by replacing tailored models with RSFMs, we can achieve comparable results through an approach that eliminates the need for bespoke training and extensive development effort and adds customization, while ensuring high-performance generalization across diverse terrains and sensors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于ResNet (RSFM) + FPN的无监督异常检测方法，用于遥感变化检测。该方法利用未经训练的FPN架构及其内在先验，通过检测连续轨道观测之间潜在空间中的微妙语义变化来识别各种异常，无需标注数据或专门训练。
AI.motivation: 遥感基础模型(RSFMs)作为监督模型的替代方案出现，能够使卫星在检测到异常时自主触发高分辨率采集或调整任务参数，从而最大化任务的有限功率和计算资源利用。无监督变化检测为灾害监测提供了一种无需昂贵标签的变革性路径。
AI.method: 提出了一种基于ResNet (RSFM) + FPN的新型无监督检测方法。该方法通过检测连续轨道观测之间潜在空间中的微妙语义变化来识别广泛的异常谱系。系统依赖于未经训练的FPN架构及其内在先验，实现了高效的全图像级生成和更高分辨率映射，与之前的方法（基于补丁的、需训练的）相比，只需最少量工作（无需训练）。
AI.result: 通过用RSFM替代定制模型，该方法无需专门的训练和广泛的开发工作即可实现相当的结果，同时确保了跨不同地形和传感器的高性能泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法提供了一种高效的训练自由方法来实现遥感异常检测，在保持高性能泛化的同时简化了工作流程，为灾害监测等应用提供了实用的解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about remote sensing/satellite imagery for unsupervised disaster change detection using ResNet+FPN. It has NO relevance to the research profile which is about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation (generating human 3D motion from video/text). The application domains are completely different - satellite image analysis vs. human motion generation. The methods, while both involving visual processing, serve entirely different purposes. This is a classic example of wrong application domain match.

title: Ask, Don't Judge: Binary Questions for Interpretable LLM Evaluation and Self-Improvement
comment: Acceepted to the Second Workshop on Compositional Learning at ICML 2026, Seoul, South Korea
summary: Evaluating LLM outputs remains a major bottleneck in NLP: human evaluation is expensive and slow, lexical metrics correlate poorly with human judgments on open-ended generation, and holistic LLM judges often produce opaque scores that are hard to debug. We propose BINEVAL, a framework that decomposes evaluation criteria into atomic binary questions and aggregates the resulting verdicts into interpretable, multi-dimensional scores. Given a task prompt, a meta-prompt generates fine-grained evaluation questions, and an LLM answers them independently for each output, yielding transparent question-level feedback together with calibrated overall scores. This decomposition makes evaluation easier to inspect, easier to diagnose, and directly usable for prompt improvement. Across SummEval, Topical-Chat, and QAGS, BINEVAL matches or outperforms strong baselines including UniEval and G-Eval, with especially strong results on factual consistency benchmarks such as QAGS. Beyond competitive correlation with human judgments, BINEVAL better matches human score distributions and avoids the ceiling effects common in prior LLM judges, leading to better discrimination between borderline and clearly flawed outputs. We further show that the same question-level feedback supports iterative prompt optimization, improving evaluator prompts on summarization and generation prompts on IFBench under both self-update and cross-model update settings. Overall, BINEVAL provides a task-agnostic, training-free, and interpretable evaluation framework that combines strong empirical performance with practical diagnostic and optimization value.

AI.tldr: BINEVAL是一种无需训练的任务无关框架，通过将评估标准分解为细粒度的二元原子问题来评估LLM输出，然后聚合这些判断生成可解释的多维度评分。
AI.motivation: 当前LLM输出评估面临三大瓶颈：人工评估昂贵且缓慢、词汇指标与开放生成的人类判断相关性差、整体LLM评判产生不透明的分数难以调试。
AI.method: 给定任务提示，元提示生成细粒度评估问题，LLM独立回答每个输出相关的问题，生成透明的问题级反馈和校准的总体分数。分解使评估更容易检查、诊断，并直接用于提示改进。
AI.result: 在SummEval、Topical-Chat和QAGS上，BINEVAL匹配或优于包括UniEval和G-Eval在内的强基线，在QAGS等事实一致性基准上表现尤其出色。BINEVAL更好地匹配人类分数分布，避免了先前LLM评判的天花板效应，能更好地区分边缘和有明显缺陷的输出。
AI.conclusion: BINEVAL提供了任务无关、无需训练且可解释的评估框架，结合了强大的实证性能与实用的诊断和优化价值。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about LLM evaluation framework (BINEVAL) for text generation tasks, entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is text-based LLM output evaluation, not 3D motion generation, video-to-motion, or visual-guided motion synthesis. No connection to the pain points about extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-to-3D domain gap, or motion quality assessment in graphics.

title: PanoImager: Geometry-Guided Novel View Synthesis and Reconstruction from Sparse Panoramic Views
summary: Panoramic sensing offers wide field-of-view coverage, yet 3D reconstruction from sparse panoramas remains challenging under rotation-dominant, weak-parallax motion. In such regimes, SfM/SLAM initialization is often ill-conditioned and unreliable. We present PanoImager, an SfM-free framework that combines feed-forward pose/depth priors, geometry-conditioned diffusion view completion, and depth-guided 3DGS optimization. Given only a few panoramic images, PanoImager decomposes them into local perspective views, synthesizes auxiliary observations to enrich sparse evidence, and stabilizes Gaussian optimization for improved cross-view consistency. Experiments on multiple benchmarks show improved stability under extreme sparsity, suggesting PanoImager as an offline/background component for map refinement when SfM/SLAM fails to initialize.

AI.tldr: PanoImager是一种无需SfM的稀疏全景图像3D重建框架，通过结合姿态/深度先验、扩散视图补全和深度引导的3DGS优化，在极端稀疏条件下实现稳定的3D重建。
AI.motivation: 在旋转主导、弱视差运动条件下，传统SfM/SLAM初始化常常病态且不可靠，导致稀疏全景图像的3D重建面临挑战。
AI.method: 将全景图像分解为局部透视视图，利用几何条件扩散模型合成辅助观察以丰富稀疏证据，并结合深度引导的3DGaussian Splatting优化来稳定跨视图一致性。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上展现出更好的极端稀疏条件下的稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 可作为SfM/SLAM初始化失败时的离线/后台地图细化组件，提升3D重建系统的鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses 3D scene reconstruction from sparse panoramic views, which is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use computer graphics techniques and diffusion models, the research profile focuses on generating human motion sequences (temporal animation), whereas PanoImager focuses on static 3D geometry reconstruction (spatial scene understanding). The paper uses geometry-conditioned diffusion for view synthesis and 3D Gaussian Splatting - these are different from the motion generation methods (video generation models, VLM for motion quality assessment) in the research profile. The pain points are also distinct: extracting 3D motion from video priors vs. reconstructing 3D geometry from sparse views. This represents a case of "similar methods but wrong application domain" - both are computer graphics but motion generation vs. scene reconstruction are different fields.

title: EO-WM: A Physically Informed World Model for Probabilistic Earth Observation Forecasting
summary: Earth Observation (EO) forecasting aims to predict future Earth surface dynamics from satellite observations under changing meteorological conditions. In this paper, we view this task as a partially observed, weather-driven world modeling problem, in which weather acts as a conditioning signal, while forecasting remains uncertain due to sparse observations and unobserved land-surface states. However, existing methods do not fully capture this setting: deterministic models collapse uncertainty into a single future prediction, while diffusion-based methods typically treat weather variables as undifferentiated conditioning signals, and existing benchmarks focus mainly on reconstruction accuracy rather than whether forecasts respond correctly to changed weather forcing.We introduce EO-WM, a video diffusion transformer for multispectral EO forecasting. EO-WM incorporates a physically informed conditioning framework that represents meteorological forcing through a climatological baseline, weather anomalies, and cumulative physical stress signals. Specifically, it separates baseline and anomaly through distinct conditioning pathways, and accumulates anomalous forcing over time to capture sustained heat and drought stress. To evaluate weather-response behavior beyond standard metrics, we introduce two diagnostic benchmarks: an Extreme Summer Benchmark for severity-aware prediction of vegetation degradation under extreme weather, and a Seasonal Matched-Pair Benchmark for testing response fidelity under changed weather forcing. Experiments show that EO-WM reduces the error in predicted Normalized Difference Vegetation Index (NDVI) decline amplitude by a relative 5.63% and improves directional hit rate by a relative 7.80%, while remaining competitive on standard pixel-level metrics. The benchmarks and model will be made open-source at https://github.com/Luo-Z13/EO-WM.

AI.tldr: EO-WM是一个用于多光谱地球观测预测的视频扩散变换器，将天气作为条件信号，通过物理信息化的条件框架（包括气候基线、天气异常和累积物理应力信号）来预测地球表面动态。
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能充分捕捉部分观测、天气驱动的世界建模问题：确定性模型将不确定性简化为单一预测，扩散方法将天气变量视为无差异的条件信号，现有的基准测试主要关注重建精度而非对改变的天气的响应正确性。
AI.method: 提出EO-WM模型，包含物理信息化的条件框架，通过气候基线、天气异常和累积物理应力信号表示气象强迫；通过不同的条件路径分离基线和异常，并累积异常强迫以捕捉持续的热度和干旱胁迫。
AI.result: EO-WM在预测NDVI下降幅度误差上相对降低5.63%，在方向命中率上相对提高7.80%，同时在标准像素级指标上保持竞争力。
AI.conclusion: EO-WM能够更好地响应变化的天气强迫，为极端夏季植被退化和季节性天气变化下的预测提供更准确的预测效果。

relevance_reason: This paper is about Earth Observation/Remote Sensing (predicting vegetation NDVI based on weather), which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics/Text-to-Motion Generation. While both use diffusion models, they are in entirely different application domains - one predicts vegetation changes in remote sensing, the other generates 3D human motion from visual/textual inputs. The pain points, methods, and goals are completely different. Even though the paper uses video diffusion transformers, this is for multispectral earth observation forecasting, not for motion generation.

title: Pseudo-Text-Conditioned 3D Grounding DINO for Organ Localization in Abdominal CT
summary: Reliable organ localization in abdominal CT can provide spatial priors for downstream trauma analysis. We propose CT-3GDINO, a lightweight 3D detector that adapts a Grounding-DINO-style query-based architecture to fixed organ localization using frozen pseudo-text class tokens instead of a real text encoder. The model combines a Swin3D visual backbone, bidirectional feature enhancement, pseudo-text-guided query selection, and a cross-modality decoder to predict normalized 3D boxes for liver, spleen, left kidney, right kidney, and bowel. We train and evaluate on 193 matched RSNA/RATIC CT volumes with segmentation-derived boxes. The best multi-scale model, trained from scratch, achieves 0.5830 overall top-1 class-wise mAP over 3D IoU thresholds from 0.1 to 0.7, outperforming fixed- and trainable-backbone classification-pretrained variants with 0.5570 and 0.4657 mAP. Performance is strong for coarse localization, with 0.9649 AP at IoU 0.1, but remains limited for strict box alignment, with 0.1552 AP at IoU 0.7. These results establish CT-3GDINO as an open-source baseline for pseudo-text-conditioned 3D organ localization and motivate future work on localization-aware pretraining, richer multimodal conditioning, and injury-focused detection.

AI.tldr: 提出CT-3GDINO，一种基于伪文本条件的轻量级3D器官检测器，用于腹部CT影像中肝、脾、左肾、右肾和肠的定位任务。
AI.motivation: 可靠的器官定位可以为下游创伤分析提供空间先验信息，现需要针对固定器官定位的轻量级3D检测器。
AI.method: 结合Swin3D视觉骨干网、双向特征增强、伪文本引导的查询选择和跨模态解码器，使用冻结的伪文本类别token代替真实文本编码器，在193例RSNA/RATIC CT数据上训练评估。
AI.result: 最佳多尺度模型达到0.5830的整体top-1类-wise mAP (IoU 0.1-0.7)，优于固定和可训练骨干网的分类预训练变体(0.5570和0.4657)。在IoU 0.1时AP为0.9649，但在IoU 0.7时仅为0.1552。
AI.conclusion: CT-3GDINO作为伪文本条件3D器官定位的开源基线表现良好，但粗定位能力强，严格对齐定位仍有待提升。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about medical imaging (organ localization in abdominal CT), not computer graphics or text-to-motion generation. While it uses 3D vision methods (Swin3D, pseudo-text conditions), the domain is medical diagnostics - detecting liver, spleen, kidneys in CT scans. The research profile seeks methods for human motion generation from visual/video priors (e.g., Seedance, Wanxiang), not organ detection in medical images. The pain points are also unrelated: extracting 3D motion from video vs. localizing fixed organs in CT. No relevance to text-to-motion generation or visual-guided motion synthesis.

title: Simulation-based inference for rapid Bayesian parameter estimation in epidemiological models: a comparison with MCMC
summary: Mechanistic epidemiological models are widely used to support infectious disease forecasting and public-health decision making. Bayesian calibration of such models is commonly performed using Markov chain Monte Carlo (MCMC), which can become computationally expensive for high-dimensional nonlinear systems and repeated near-real-time analyses. Here, we investigate simulation-based inference (SBI) using neural posterior estimation as a scalable alternative for Bayesian calibration of a mechanistic SECIR epidemiological model using COVID-19 intensive care unit (ICU) occupancy data from Germany during 2020. We compared SBI and MCMC across multiple epidemic phases using both 31-day inference windows and a substantially more challenging 201-day reconstruction problem involving multiple transmission change points. Posterior agreement was evaluated quantitatively using Wasserstein distances and Kullback-Leibler divergences together with posterior predictive checks. Across the 31-day windows, SBI recovered posterior distributions in strong agreement with MCMC while accurately reproducing observed ICU trajectories. In the 201-day setting, SBI preserved the dominant posterior structure despite increased uncertainty. SBI, by combining CPU and GPU resources, substantially reduced computational runtime compared with MCMC, which was restricted to running on CPUs. Whereas MCMC required approximately 1000 seconds for the 31-day inference problems, SBI achieved comparable posterior and predictive performance in approximately 60-70 seconds on a single GPU. For the 201-day inference problem, SBI required an average of 157 seconds, while the MCMC runs took over 19,000 seconds. Our results demonstrate that SBI provides a rapid and computationally efficient framework for Bayesian calibration of mechanistic epidemiological models, supporting repeated near-real-time inference and rapid outbreak analysis.

AI.tldr: 研究将模拟-based inference (SBI) 神经后验估计作为MCMC的替代方法,用于贝叶斯校准COVID-19重症监护病房occupancy的SECIR流行病学模型。
AI.motivation: 传统的MCMC方法在处理高维非线性系统和实时分析时计算成本过高,需要更快速的贝叶斯校准方法。
AI.method: 使用SBI神经后验估计对德国2020年COVID-19 ICU occupancy数据进行贝叶斯校准,与MCMC在多个流行阶段进行比较,包括31天推理窗口和201天重建问题。
AI.result: SBI与MCMC在31天窗口中取得强一致的后验分布,准确重现观察到的ICU轨迹。201天设置中SBI保留了主要后验结构。计算时间方面:31天问题SBI约60-70秒 vs MCMC约1000秒;201天问题SBI约157秒 vs MCMC超过19000秒。
AI.conclusion: SBI提供了快速且计算高效的贝叶斯校准框架,可支持重复的近实时推理和快速爆发分析。

relevance_reason: This paper is about epidemiological modeling (COVID-19 ICU occupancy) using simulation-based inference, which is completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is entirely different - public health/epidemiology vs. motion generation. While both may use Bayesian methods, the context, goals, and domains have zero overlap. The research profile focuses on extracting 3D motion from 2D video, visual-guided motion generation, and motion quality assessment, none of which are addressed in this paper.

title: SubdivAR: Autoregressive Next-Scale Prediction for Neural Mesh Subdivision
summary: Mesh subdivision is a fundamental operation for converting coarse, editable meshes into high-resolution surfaces, with broad applications in digital asset creation. Classical rule-based schemes rely on fixed local refinement rules and often produce over-smoothed surfaces. Recent neural subdivision methods improve detail synthesis, but remain constrained by local modeling and exhibit limited generalizability. We present SubdivAR, a neural mesh subdivision framework based on our proposed Mesh Autoregressive Representation (MAR). MAR arranges meshes at different subdivision levels into an ordered scale sequence, reformulating subdivision as autoregressive next-scale prediction. To support this formulation, we introduce a Hybrid Topology-Aware Transformer that combines global semantic attention with topology-constrained local feature aggregation. SubdivAR adopts a next-scale coordinate prediction paradigm, regressing vertex offsets at each refinement stage to preserve subdivision topology while recovering fine-grained geometric details. To enable reliable learning, we construct FII-40K, a curated dataset of nearly 40,000 high-quality meshes with multi-level subdivision supervision. Experiments show that SubdivAR outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, reducing Hausdorff Distance and Chamfer Distance by 18.8% and 14.2%, respectively, and demonstrates strong robustness on complex open-surface geometries.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SubdivAR，一个基于Mesh Autoregressive Representation (MAR)的新型神经网格细分框架，通过将不同细分层次的网格组织成有序尺度序列，采用自回归下一尺度预测范式来改进网格细节合成。
AI.motivation: 传统规则基础网格细分方法依赖固定局部细化规则，常产生过度平滑表面；现有神经细分方法受限于局部建模，泛化能力有限。需要一种能保留细分拓扑同时恢复精细几何细节的新方法。
AI.method: 提出MAR将不同细分层次网格组织为有序尺度序列，引入Hybrid Topology-Aware Transformer结合全局语义注意力与拓扑约束的局部特征聚合，采用下一尺度坐标预测范式回归顶点偏移以保留拓扑并恢复细节。构建FII-40K数据集含近40000个多层次细分监督的高质量网格。
AI.result: SubdivAR优于现有最先进方法，Hausdorff距离降低18.8%，Chamfer距离降低14.2%，对复杂开放表面几何具有强鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自回归下一尺度预测范式和混合拓扑感知Transformer，SubdivAR成功解决了传统方法和现有神经方法在细节保留与泛化方面的局限，为数字资产生成中的网格细分提供了更优解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. Research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (generating human motion from video/text), while this paper is about Neural Mesh Subdivision (3D geometric surface refinement). Even though both are in Computer Graphics, motion generation vs mesh geometry are distinct domains. The paper addresses mesh detail synthesis, not motion synthesis, and uses different methods (mesh Transformers vs video/motion generation models). Pain points are unrelated - this paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion from 2D video or visual-to-motion domain gaps.

title: Prompt Injection in Automated Résumé Screening with Large Language Models: Single and Multi-Injection Settings
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to screen and rank job applicants, creating incentives for candidates to strategically manipulate algorithmic hiring systems. We study prompt injection in automated résumé screening, defined as subtle self-promotional text that introduces no new qualifications but is designed to influence LLM evaluations. Using controlled experiments, we show that prompt injection reliably improves applicant rankings when résumé quality is homogeneous and few candidates inject. However, its effectiveness rapidly diminishes as more candidates inject, collapsing when manipulation becomes widespread. When candidate quality is heterogeneous, prompt injection is less effective on average, but can occasionally allow lower-quality candidates to outrank higher-quality ones, raising fairness concerns. Overall, LLM-based screening is most vulnerable when manipulation is rare and candidate quality differences are small. Code and resources are publicly available at: https://github.com/preetb1199/Prompt_Injection_ACL26

AI.tldr: 研究大型语言模型在招聘筛选中易受提示注入攻击，分析其在不同候选人人质量和注入比例条件下的效果和公平性问题。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型日益被用于自动筛选和排名求职者，创建了候选人策略性操纵算法招聘系统的动机和incentives，需要研究这种新型操纵方式的危害。
AI.method: 通过受控实验的方法，向简历中嵌入微妙的自我推销文本（提示注入），在不增加新资质的情况下影响LLM评估。
AI.result: 提示注入在候选人质量同质且注入者较少时可靠地改善排名，但随着注入者增多效果迅速下降；在候选人质量异质时效果降低但仍可能让低质量候选人超越高质量候选人，引发公平性担扰。
AI.conclusion: LLM筛选在操纵罕见且候选人质量差异小时最脆弱；建议在部署LLM筛选系统时需要考虑防御提示注入攻击。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper addresses prompt injection attacks in LLM-based resume screening (HR/NLP security domain), not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. While both mention LLMs, the application domains are entirely different - one deals with hiring algorithms while the other deals with visual-to-motion generation, 3D motion synthesis, and video generation models. No overlap in pain points, methods, or research goals.

title: TMP: Tree-structured Mixed-policy Pruning for Large-scale Image Generation and Editing
summary: Modern image generation model rapidly grows their sizes to meet high-fidelity image synthesis. However, they gradually become unaffordable for their enormous parameter consumption and computation budget that lead to massive resources requirement and gpu memory footprint. In this paper, we propose TMP, the first Tree-structured Mixed-policy Pruning framework that generalizes prevalent image tasks (T2I and TI2I) and architectures (Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) and Diffusion transformer (DiT)). It could be applied to the step-distilled models and contribute as the last stage. We perform experiments upon current open-sourced SOTA HunyuanImage-3.0 instruct and a popular efficient model Z-Image turbo. The proposed pruning framework manages to compress HunyuanImage 3.0 from 80B to 20B parameters at 75% reduction ratio, sacrificing limited generation quality. We also optimize to enable the inference of the pruned 20B version of HunyuanImage 3.0 on a single 24GB 4090 GPU by engineering skills. The inference script and model weight have been integrated into the existing HunyuanImage3.0 open-source github and huggingface repository. Besides, we prove the efficacy of TMP by compressing Z-Image turbo from 6B to 4B (33% reduction) with negligible degradation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出TMP树结构混合策略剪枝框架，用于压缩大型图像生成模型。将HunyuanImage 3.0从80B压缩到20B（75%压缩率），Z-Image turbo从6B压缩到4B（33%压缩率），同时保持可接受的生成质量，并实现单卡推理。
AI.motivation: 现代图像生成模型参数规模快速增长，导致计算资源需求与GPU内存占用日益增大，使大型模型难以实际应用，需要有效的模型压缩方法。
AI.method: 提出TMP框架，这是首个树结构混合策略剪枝框架，可泛化到多种图像任务（T2I和TI2I）和架构（MoE和DiT）。通过工程技能优化使剪枝后模型能在单卡上运行。
AI.result: 将HunyuanImage 3.0从80B压缩到20B（75%压缩率），生成质量损失有限；Z-Image turbo从6B压缩到4B（33%压缩率），质量下降可忽略。剪枝后20B版本可在单张24GB 4090 GPU上运行推理。
AI.conclusion: TMP框架证明了树结构混合策略剪枝在大型图像生成模型压缩中的有效性，为降低模型部署门槛提供了实用方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about IMAGE generation model compression (HunyuanImage, Z-Image turbo), completely different from the research profile's Text-to-Motion Generation domain. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are entirely different: one generates 2D images, the other generates 3D human motion sequences. The paper addresses model compression for image generation, not motion extraction, quality consistency, or visual-to-3D motion bridging - which are the core pain points in the research profile.

title: When Does Combining Language Models Help? A Co-Failure Ceiling on Routing, Voting, and Mixture-of-Agents Across 67 Frontier Models
summary:
Multi-model LLM systems such as routing, voting, cascades, fusion, and mixture-of-agents are used to beat single-model accuracy. We show that their gain is capped by a quantity the field rarely reports. For any policy whose output is one member model answer, accuracy cannot exceed one minus beta, where beta is the rate at which every model is wrong on the same query. In contrast, the usual diagnostic, average pairwise error correlation rho, cannot identify beta: error laws with identical marginals and pairwise correlations can have different all-wrong rates. A Clopper-Pearson bound on beta gives a finite-sample certificate on the largest gain any router, vote, or cascade could deliver before training a router.
  Across 67 models from 21 providers, a tetrachoric-calibrated single-factor model still underprices the all-wrong tail: on open-ended mathematics, observed beta is 0.052 versus 0.023 under the full 67-model Gaussian copula, about 2.5 times underpricing, with 90 percent CI 1.7 to 3.4 and k equals 17. The effect recurs on execution-graded code, where beta is 0.079. Re-asking the same GPQA-Diamond questions in free-response rather than multiple-choice form reopens the tail, with beta 0.127 and a five-judge panel with kappa 0.73 to 0.92, locating co-failure in answer format rather than subject. At matched quality, low-rho heterogeneous ensembles beat high-rho Self-MoA, but on checkable tasks in our pool, combining models rarely beats the single best model without a strong query-level routing signal. Gains come from models failing on different questions, not from adding more models.

AI.tldr: 研究多模型LLM系统（如路由、投票、级联、融合、混合代理）的增益上限，发现传统诊断指标rho无法识别真正的限制因素beta（所有模型同时错误的比率），并通过67个模型实验证明当前方法严重低估了all-wrong tail。
AI.motivation: 多模型LLM系统被广泛用于提升单一模型准确率，但该领域很少报告限制增益的关键指标。作者旨在揭示并量化这一被忽视的核心限制。
AI.method: 提出beta作为所有模型同时错误的比率指标，建立Clopper-Pearson bound提供有限样本证书；使用四因素校准的单因子模型和67个模型的高斯copula进行对比实验；在GPQA-Diamond数学题和代码执行题上测试，并通过自由响应vs多项选择形式检验答案格式的影响。
AI.result: 在开放数学题上观察到beta=0.052，而高斯copula下为0.023（约2.5倍低估，90% CI 1.7-3.4，k=17）；代码执行题上beta=0.079；改为自由响应形式后beta升至0.127；低rho异构集成优于高rho Self-MoA，但在无强查询级路由信号时，组合模型很少超越最佳单一模型。
AI.conclusion: 增益来自模型在不同问题上的失败差异，而非增加模型数量；需报告beta而非rho作为关键诊断指标；当前系统对all-wrong tail严重低估；路由信号对比组合更重要。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about combining Large Language Models (LLMs) for math/code tasks - an AI/NLP research topic. The research profile is specifically about Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation, focusing on extracting 3D motion from 2D videos, visual-guided feature extraction, and video generation models. There is zero overlap in application domain, methods, or research area. The paper addresses LLM routing and voting strategies, which have no connection to motion generation, computer graphics, or visual-to-3D domain bridging.

title: FlameVQA: A Physically-Grounded UAV Wildfire VQA Benchmark with Radiometric Thermal Supervision
summary: Wildfire monitoring from UAVs requires reliable reasoning over complex aerial scenes, where smoke, scale variation, and occlusions often limit RGB-only interpretation. We introduce FlameVQA, a multiple-choice visual question answering benchmark for UAV-based wildfire intelligence built on FLAME 3, leveraging paired RGB imagery and radiometric thermal TIFFs for temperature-grounded, safety-critical reasoning. FlameVQA includes 34 multiple-choice questions per image spanning six operational capability groups, covering tasks such as detection, localization, distribution/coverage estimation, cross-modal reasoning, and flight planning. To ensure label reliability, we combine MLLM-assisted annotation with deterministic thermal rules and cross-question consistency checks, followed by human auditing. We also evaluate representative MLLMs on FlameVQA to provide baselines for future work. Results show strong performance when explicit cross-modal cues are available, but notable failures on presence detection under heavy smoke and on coverage estimation. These findings suggest that current MLLMs require domain-specific adaptation to better support disaster and wildfire monitoring. The dataset and benchmark code are open-source at github.com/mobiiin/WildFire_VQA

AI.tldr: FlameVQA是一个基于无人机的火灾监测多选视觉问答基准数据集，结合RGB和热红外图像，支持温度感知的火灾关键推理。
AI.motivation: 无人机 wildfire监测中，烟雾、尺度变化和遮挡常限制RGB-only的解释，需要跨模态推理能力来增强火灾情报获取的安全性和可靠性。
AI.method: 基于FLAME 3数据集构建FlameVQA，每幅图像包含34道多选问题，涵盖六个操作能力组（检测、定位、分布/覆盖估计、跨模态推理、飞行规划等）。采用MLLM辅助标注结合确定性热规则和交叉一致性检查，最后进行人工审计验证。
AI.result: 在提供明确跨模态线索时表现良好，但在浓烟下的存在检测和覆盖估计方面存在明显失败。当前MLLM需要领域特定适应才能更好支持灾难和火灾监测。
AI.conclusion: 数据集和基准代码已开源，为未来火灾监测MLLM研究提供基础baseline，表明当前模型在安全关键火灾推理任务中仍需改进。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The paper is about UAV wildfire monitoring and Visual Question Answering (VQA) for remote sensing/disaster management, not Computer Graphics or Text-to-Motion Generation. While both involve visual analysis, the target domain (wildfire monitoring) has no connection to 3D human motion generation. The methods (MLLM for VQA) and pain points (smoke detection in aerial images) are entirely unrelated to the research profile's focus on extracting 3D motion from video priors and bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gaps.

title: Language-Based Digital Twins for Elderly Cognitive Assistance
comment: Accepted and published in the Proceedings of the ACM International Conference on PErvasive Technologies Related to Assistive Environments (PETRA 2026). The final published version is available through the ACM Digital Library
summary: Digital twins have emerged as a promising paradigm for personalized healthcare, enabling modeling of individual behavior and health trajectories. In cognitive health, early detection of Mild Cognitive Impairment (MCI) remains challenging, where language and conversational patterns serve as non-invasive biomarkers. In this work, we propose a language-based digital twin framework that leverages large language models (LLMs) to mimic the conversational behavior of elderly individuals by incorporating stylometric cues and contextual metadata. To evaluate fidelity and cognitive consistency, we introduce a multi-head conditional variational autoencoder (cVAE) that jointly measures reconstruction quality and predicts cognitive scores. Experiments on the I-CONECT dataset show that the digital twin preserves identity-specific characteristics and achieves reconstruction and MoCA prediction errors comparable to real data, while outperforming baseline GPT-generated responses. These results highlight the potential of language-based digital twins as a scalable and non-invasive approach for personalized and continuous cognitive health monitoring.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于语言的心理健康数字孪生框架，利用大语言模型模拟老年人的对话行为，通过风格线索和上下文元数据进行个性化建模，并使用多条件变分自编码器评估保真度和认知评分预测能力。
AI.motivation: 轻度认知障碍(MCI)的早期检测具有挑战性，语言和对话模式可作为无创生物标志物，数字孪生技术为个性化医疗和连续认知健康监测提供了新范式。
AI.method: 1)构建基于LLM的语言数字孪生框架，整合风格线索和上下文元数据；2)提出多头条件变分自编码器(cVAE)联合测量重建质量和预测认知评分(MoCA)；3)在I-CONECT数据集上验证。
AI.result: 数字孪生保留了个体特异性特征，重建误差和MoCA预测误差与真实数据相当，且优于GPT基线生成的响应。
AI.conclusion: 基于语言的数字孪生是一种可扩展、无创的个性化连续认知健康监测方法，具有临床应用潜力。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about healthcare/cognitive assistance using LLMs for elderly conversation simulation and MCI detection - entirely different field from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain (healthcare) has no overlap with the research profile (computer graphics, video-to-motion generation). While both use LLMs, the paper uses language models for text generation in cognitive assessment, not for visual-guided motion generation or any computer graphics task.

title: Safe Autoregressive Image Generation with Iterative Self-Improving Codebooks
comment: 10 pages including references, 8 figures, accepted for publication at the 43rd International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML 2026)
summary: Unlike diffusion-based models that operate in continuous latent spaces, autoregressive unified multimodal models produce images by sequentially predicting discretized visual tokens. These tokens are derived from a codebook that maps embeddings to quantized visual patterns. The language-like architecture enables unified multimodal models to effectively capture text conditional information for generation, making them promising for text-to-image tasks. This also raises an interesting question: how safe are the images generated in such an autoregressive way? In this work, we propose iterative self-improving codebooks for safe autoregressive generation. We leverage the understanding and judgment capabilities of the unified multimodal model itself to identify unsafe generated images without human annotation. Subsequently, the inherent representations in the codebook are fixed to eliminate harmful mappings. Our method comprises two steps: first, we use the unified model to identify unsafe generations and construct corresponding harmful and safe image-text pairs. These pairs are used to construct the Harmful Space and guide updates to the codebook, thereby eliminating harmful outputs. Second, we perform adaptive fine-tuning on the codebook within the harmless space using safe image-text pairs to ensure the quality of generated images. These two steps are repeated until no further improvement is observed, producing a safety-enhanced model codebook. Without additional external feedback, the safety of models is improved iteratively.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于自回归统一多模态模型的安全增强方法——迭代自改进码本。该方法利用模型自身的理解和判断能力来识别不安全图像，无需人工标注，即可消除有害映射并生成安全图像。
AI.motivation: 自回归统一多模态模型通过预测离散视觉标记来生成图像，但可能产生不安全内容。如何在无需外部反馈的情况下提升模型安全性是一个重要问题。
AI.method: 方法包含两步：(1) 使用统一模型识别不安全生成，构建有害-安全图像-文本对，构建有害空间并更新码本以消除有害输出；(2) 在无害空间中使用安全图像-文本对进行自适应微调，确保生成质量。两步重复直到无改进。
AI.result: 无需额外外部反馈，模型安全性通过迭代自改进不断提升，最终得到安全增强的模型码本。
AI.conclusion: 该方法利用模型自身能力实现安全性的迭代提升，为自回归多模态模型的安全部署提供了有效途径。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper addresses safe 2D IMAGE generation with autoregressive models and codebooks, while the research profile requires TEXT-TO-MOTION GENERATION (3D motion from video/visual inputs). Even though both involve "generation", 2D image generation and 3D motion generation are fundamentally different domains - motion generation requires extracting temporal 3D pose information, not visual tokens. The pain points are also completely unrelated: image safety vs visual-to-motion bridging and motion quality. No relevance to computer graphics motion generation.

title: HarmVideoBench: Benchmarking Harmful Video Understanding in Large Multimodal Models
summary: Large vision-language models (LVLMs) have recently shown immense potential in automated content moderation, sparking growing interest in developing harmful-video benchmarks. However, we identify two primary limitations in existing works: 1) The multi-layered characteristics of harmful videos are overlooked. Existing benchmarks predominantly formulate evaluation as a binary classification task, failing to capture implicit or deep contextual harms. 2) Explanatory rationales are completely absent. Current frameworks measure exclusively whether a model flags a video correctly rather than explaining why, turning evaluation into a black box where models can succeed through superficial shortcuts. To address these problems, we present HarmVideoBench, a multi-layered diagnostic benchmark comprising 1,379 videos paired with 4,137 multiple-choice questions. HarmVideoBench benchmarks three hierarchical dimensions: Observable Evidence, Clip-Internal Meaning, and Beyond-Clip Reasoning, aiming to evaluate models' deep understanding beyond surface cues with carefully balanced and curated samples. We evaluate 19 leading models on HarmVideoBench to assess their multidimensional understanding of harmful videos. Moreover, we introduce BCR, a benchmark-aligned method that predicts reasoning boundaries and dynamically retrieves context only when needed. Experimental results show that BCR substantially improves the base model's performance in harmful video understanding, raising the macro average from 61.7 percent to a state-of-the-art 84.4 percent.

AI.tldr: HarmVideoBench是一个用于评估大视觉语言模型(LVLMs)理解有害视频能力的多层次诊断基准,包含1,379个视频和4,137个多项选择题,涵盖三个层级维度:可观察证据、片段内部含义和超出片段推理。同时提出BCR方法,可在有害视频理解任务中显著提升模型性能(从61.7%提升至84.4%)。
AI.motivation: 现有有害视频基准存在两个主要局限:1)忽视有害视频的多层特征,仅将评估形式化为二元分类任务,无法捕捉隐含或深层上下文危害;2)完全缺乏解释性理由,当前框架仅测量模型是否正确标记视频,而不解释原因,使评估成为黑箱。
AI.method: 构建HarmVideoBench诊断基准,包含1,379个视频和4,137个多项选择题,涵盖三个层级维度:可观察证据(Observable Evidence)、片段内部含义(Clip-Internal Meaning)和超出片段推理(Beyond-Clip Reasoning)。同时提出BCR方法,预测推理边界并在需要时动态检索上下文。
AI.result: 评估了19个领先模型在HarmVideoBench上的表现,并展示BCR方法可将基线模型在有害视频理解方面的宏平均从61.7%显著提升至84.4%的先进水平。
AI.conclusion: HarmVideoBench能够有效评估模型对有害视频的深度理解能力,超越表面线索;BCR方法可显著提升模型在多维度有害视频理解方面的表现,为自动内容 moderation 提供更优解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about harmful video understanding/classification in Large Multimodal Models for safety detection - a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. While both involve video, this paper deals with classifying harmful video content, not extracting 3D motion from video or generating human motion. The pain points (extracting 3D motion from 2D, quality assessment for motion generation, bridging visual-to-3D domain gap) are entirely unrelated to video harmfulness detection.

title: LISA: Likelihood Score Alignment for Visual-condition Controllable Generation
summary: The prevalent dual-branch paradigm, i.e., training a side network to encode visual conditions and fusing its intermediate-layer features to a frozen pretrained main network, has shown remarkable success in visual-condition controllable generation. Despite its widespread adoption, the role of the side branch and its training efficiency remain underexplored. In this paper, we first revisit this mainstream paradigm through the lens of score-based generative modeling: 1) The main network preserves visual perceptual quality by providing a prior unconditional score. 2) The side network steers conditional control by implicitly contributing a likelihood score. Guided by this perspective, we propose LIkelihood Score Alignment (LISA), an effective regularization method that explicitly aligns the intermediate feature of the side network with an approximated likelihood score. Specifically, we first hook features from a designated layer of the side network and project them into the score latent space by a lightweight decoder. Then, we construct an approximated likelihood score target and calculate the distance between the decoder's output and this target as an additional regularization loss. Finally, we jointly optimize the side network and decoder with both standard diffusion loss and our regularization loss. Experiments across various image/video tasks, architectures, and diffusion/flow models demonstrated that LISA can not only consistently accelerate the training convergence and improve final synthetic results, but also encourage the side network's features to be more disentangled for conditional modeling with negligible additional training cost and zero extra inference cost.

AI.tldr: 本文从score-based生成建模角度重新审视了双分支范式，提出LISA正则化方法，通过对齐侧网络中间特征与近似likelihood score来加速训练收敛、提高生成质量，并使特征更解耦。
AI.motivation: 双分支范式在可控视觉生成中广泛使用，但侧分支的作用机制和训练效率未被充分探索，缺乏理论解释。
AI.method: 1)从score-based视角分析双分支：主网络提供无条件score保持质量，侧网络隐式贡献likelihood score控制条件；2)提出LISA：hook侧网络指定层特征，用轻量解码器投影到score空间，构建近似likelihood score目标，计算正则化损失，联合优化侧网络和解码器。
AI.result: LISA在图像/视频多种任务、架构、扩散/流模型上验证：加速训练收敛、提高合成结果、使特征更解耦，额外训练成本低、推理零成本。
AI.conclusion: 从score-based角度理解双分支范式为优化提供了理论指导；LISA是有效的正则化方法，可提升条件可控生成的训练效率和生成质量，且具有实用价值。

relevance_reason: The paper addresses visual-conditioned generation with diffusion models (similar method family), but its application domain is general image/video generation (2D visual content), NOT 3D human motion generation. The research profile specifically requires extracting 3D motion from 2D video and bridging the visual-to-3D domain gap - this is fundamentally different from 2D image/video generation. The paper's tasks are "图像/视频多种任务" which targets 2D visual synthesis, not 3D motion geometry. While both use diffusion models, the application domains are distinct (Computer Graphics subfield: 2D visual synthesis vs 3D motion generation).

title: SatSplatDiff: Geometry-preserving generative refinement for high-fidelity satellite Gaussian Splatting
summary: Gaussian Splatting has been recently explored for satellite 3D reconstruction, demonstrating flexibility and efficiency in representing radiometrically diverse satellite scenes. However, the limited top viewpoint of satellite imagery results in insufficient supervision on building facades, leaving surface holes and degraded visual fidelity. Generative refinement, which leverages pretrained generative priors to iteratively refine and update the rendered images used as supervision targets, has recently been investigated to improve the visual fidelity of Gaussian-rendered images. However, since these models refine each view independently, the resulting images can generate hallucinations and break photo-consistency, leading to geometric degradation. To address these limitations, we propose SatSplatDiff, which aims to minimize geometric degradation prevalent in generative refinement. Building on photogrammetric DSM initialization and 2DGS-based shadow casting established in our prior work SatSplat, we first introduce monocular depth supervision and multi-scale geometric refinement to establish a geometrically accurate and well-regularized surface representation. We then apply shadow-guided generative refinement, where geometrically calculated shadow maps guide the Gaussians to maintain consistency with the underlying geometry, improving visual fidelity while reducing geometric degradation. Extensive evaluations on the IARPA2016 and DFC2019 datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, reducing geometric MAE by up to 18% and improving visual fidelity (FID-CLIP) by 28-45% over existing baselines. Our method delivers up to 5x resolution enhancement with minimal hallucination and sensor-consistent appearance, demonstrating seamless cross-tile consistency and strong scalability for large-scale reconstruction. Source code is available at https://github.com/GDAOSU/SatSplatDiff

AI.tldr: SatSplatDiff是一种用于卫星3D重建的高质量方法，结合了高斯溅射与几何正则化及阴影引导的生成式细化。该方法旨在解决卫星图像视角受限导致的建筑立面监督不足，以及生成式细化独立处理各视图导致的幻觉和几何降质问题。
AI.motivation: 解决两个核心问题：1) 卫星图像有限的顶视角度导致建筑立面监督不足，产生表面空洞和视觉质量下降；2) 现有生成式细化方法独立优化每个视图，导致幻觉现象和光一致性破坏，造成几何降质。
AI.method: 1) 基于摄影测量DSM初始化和2DGS阴影投射；2) 引入单目深度监督和多尺度几何细化，建立几何准确且规则化的表面表示；3) 应用阴影引导的生成式细化，使用几何计算的阴影图引导高斯体与底层几何保持一致。
AI.result: 在IARPA2016和DFC2019数据集上实现最先进性能：几何MAE减少高达18%，视觉保真度(FID-CLIP)提升28-45%，支持最高5倍分辨率增强，幻觉最小且传感器一致外观，跨瓦片一致性强，适用于大规模重建。
AI.conclusion: SatSplatDiff通过结合几何正则化与阴影引导的生成式细化，成功在保持几何准确性的同时提升视觉质量，为大规模卫星3D重建提供了一种有效且可扩展的解决方案。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. The research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating human motion from text/video), while this paper is about Satellite 3D Reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting. These are fundamentally different: one focuses on human motion generation, the other on satellite/scene geometry reconstruction. Although both may use diffusion models, the application domains (human motion vs. satellite scene reconstruction) are completely unrelated.

title: CORTEX: A Structured Reasoning Benchmark for Trustworthy 3D Chest CT MLLMs
summary: Reasoning in multimodal large language models (MLLMs) has shown strong promise in medical imaging. However, this reasoning is usually free-form text judged only by its final answer, making it hard to interpret and verify, especially in 3D radiology, where a diagnosis should be traceable to evidence in the scan. Existing chest CT question-answering datasets compound this by reducing expert radiology reports to answer-only pairs, dropping the reasoning that links findings to conclusions and omitting the patient history clinicians rely on. As a result, reasoning-capable 3D chest CT MLLMs remain out of reach, as neither the structured supervision needed to train them nor the protocol needed to verify their reasoning yet exists. We introduce CORTEX (Clinically Organized Reasoning and sTructured EXplanation), a structured reasoning benchmark for 3D chest CT. For each question, CORTEX restores the missing reasoning as a four-stage diagnostic trace mirroring a radiologist's workflow: task understanding, visual observation, diagnostic reasoning, and answer synthesis. We generate these traces using frontier large language models with broad medical and general-domain knowledge, then filter and verify them with a stage-level evaluation protocol combining automated rubric scoring with expert radiologist review. Crucially, both the reasoning structure and evaluation rubrics are designed in close collaboration with clinicians. Built on CT-RATE, a large, publicly available chest CT dataset without reasoning annotations, CORTEX comprises 76,177 validated reasoning traces across open-ended VQA, closed-ended VQA, and report generation, providing both the structured supervision and the stage-level evaluation protocol needed to build and evaluate trustworthy reasoning models for 3D chest CT. Our dataset and evaluation code will be made publicly available upon acceptance.

AI.tldr: CORTEX是一个用于3D胸部CT的结构化推理基准测试，旨在解决多模态大语言模型在医学影像推理中的可解释性和可验证性问题。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态大语言模型的推理仅为自由形式文本，难以解释和验证。现有胸部CT问答数据集删除了将发现与结论联系起来的推理过程，且缺乏患者病史信息，导致无法训练和评估具有推理能力的3D胸部CT模型。
AI.method: CORTEX使用前沿大语言模型生成四阶段诊断追踪（任务理解、视觉观察、诊断推理、答案综合），并通过自动化评分与放射科专家审查相结合的阶段级评估协议进行过滤和验证。
AI.result: CORTEX基于CT-RATE数据集构建，包含76,177条经过验证的推理追踪，涵盖开放式VQA、封闭式VQA和报告生成任务。
AI.conclusion: CORTEX提供了训练和评估可信赖的3D胸部CT推理模型所需的结构化监督和阶段级评估协议，数据集和评估代码将公开发布。

relevance_reason: Completely irrelevant. This paper is about medical imaging (3D chest CT analysis) and multi-modal large language models for diagnostic reasoning in healthcare. The application domain is entirely different from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. Even though both fields may use multi-modal models, this paper deals with medical VQA and CT scan interpretation, not motion generation from video or visual guidance. The pain points, methods, and application domain have no overlap with the research profile.

title: Exact and Deterministic Patch Descriptor Retrieval via Hierarchical Normalization
summary: We present a patch descriptor retrieval method that returns the exact nearest neighbour -- provably identical to exhaustive full-vector search -- while evaluating only a small fraction of the database, and does so deterministically: the same (database, query) pair always produces the same result, independent of run order, thread count, or hardware. This contrasts with approximate nearest-neighbour (ANN) approaches such as HNSW and IVF-PQ, which trade exactness for speed and may return different results across runs. The enabling mechanism is Hierarchical Normalization (HN): a normalisation scheme that splits the pre-normalisation feature vector into a K-dim major component (norm sqrt(1-alpha)) and a (128-K)-dim minor component (norm sqrt(alpha)). Since the minor inner product is bounded by alpha (Cauchy-Schwarz on the prescribed norms), the major similarity plus alpha is an admissible upper bound on the full similarity: the search scans the K-dim major component for all entries, then applies full 128-dim evaluation only to entries that cannot be pruned -- a provably exact branch-and-bound scan. We train HN-modified HardNet on the notredame split of the UBC patch dataset and evaluate on trevi and halfdome. With a cache-optimised Structure-of-Arrays layout and K=8, alpha=1/32, the search achieves 13.7x (trevi) / 12.7x (halfdome) speed-up over brute-force 128-dim search, with only 0.4% of entries requiring full evaluation. At K=16, alpha=1/8, FPR@95 rises from 0.0062 to 0.0064 on trevi at 7.2x speed-up, with 98.8% of entries bypassing full evaluation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于分层归一化(HN)的patch描述符精确检索方法，能够在只评估小部分数据库的情况下返回与穷举搜索完全相同的最近邻结果，且结果是确定性的。
AI.motivation: 解决近似最近邻(ANN)方法如HNSW和IVF-PQ的局限性：它们为了速度牺牲准确性，且每次运行可能返回不同结果。实际应用需要确定性的精确搜索。
AI.method: 将128维特征向量通过分层归一化分为K维主要分量((128-K)维次要分量，利用次要内积的alpha上界进行分支限界剪枝搜索。先扫描主要分量，对无法剪枝的条目才进行完整128维评估。
AI.result: K=8, alpha=1/32时，trevi和halfdome分别实现13.7x和12.7x加速，仅0.4%条目需完整评估。K=16时，7.2x加速，98.8%条目跳过完整评估，FPR@95仅从0.0062升至0.0064。
AI.conclusion: HN方法实现了确定性的精确最近邻检索，在大幅加速的同时保持与穷举搜索等价的结果，为ANN提供了一种可证明精确的替代方案。

relevance_reason: This paper addresses a completely different application domain. The research profile focuses on Text-to-Motion Generation (creating 3D human motion from video/text), while this paper is about patch descriptor retrieval for visual matching/localization - a computer vision task for image feature matching (likely for SLAM or structure-from-motion). The method (hierarchical normalization for nearest neighbor search) is unrelated to motion generation, video generation, or visual-guided feature extraction for motion synthesis. This would be relevant for visual odometry or place recognition, not for text-to-motion generation.

title: Sculpting NeRF Geometry: Human-Preference Fine-Tuning of a 3D-Aware Face GAN
summary: Reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) for 3D generation is now established across a number of works, but most existing pipelines optimise explicit surface representations, often by converting radiance fields into meshes and training heavily on surface-supervised data. We instead fine-tune a pretrained 3D-aware generative model directly from a learned reward over radiance-field density ($σ$) values, with no externally supplied mesh or shape prior. The reward model requires no pretraining, trains easily on a small set of preference samples, and yields robust improvement in 3D geometry. Working on an unconditional 3D-aware face GAN (EG3D), our reward reads the continuous 3D density field of the neural radiance field (NeRF) directly and supplies a geometry-only learning signal, requiring neither text conditioning, mesh extraction, nor multi-view rendering. A density-consistency constraint keeps the 2D appearance qualitatively similar while the geometry is reshaped, at a measurable but bounded distributional cost (FID-50k rises from 4.09 to 6.66): the fine-tuned generator, trained from the preferences of a single annotator as a proof of concept, produces face geometries preferred by users in 74.4% of pairwise comparisons.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需外部网格或形状先验的3D生成强化学习方法，通过直接学习神经辐射场(NeRF)密度场(σ)作为奖励信号来微调预训练的3D感知GAN模型。
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF 3D生成管道通常需要将辐射场转换为网格并依赖表面监督数据，作者希望绕过这一限制，直接从辐射场密度中学习3D几何。
AI.method: 在无条件3D人脸GAN (EG3D)上，从少量偏好样本训练奖励模型，通过密度一致性约束保持2D外观相似性，同时重塑3D几何。
AI.result: 微调后的生成器在用户偏好比较中获得74.4%的首选率，但FID-50k从4.09上升到6.66，表明几何改进以一定的分布代价为代价。
AI.conclusion: 该方法证明仅使用单 annotator 偏好的奖励信号即可实现3D几何的显著改善，为无网格或形状先验的RLHF 3D生成提供了可行路径。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 3D face generation using NeRF and GANs, which is a fundamentally different application domain from Text-to-Motion Generation. While both are in Computer Graphics, the paper focuses on facial geometry (human faces) rather than human motion. The methods (NeRF + GAN-based RLHF) are also different from the video generation models and motion generation pipelines mentioned in the research profile. There's minimal relevance even though both deal with 3D-aware generation in computer graphics - face generation and motion generation are distinct sub-fields.

title: See & Sniff: Learning Visuo-Olfactory Representations
summary: While modern multimodal models integrate vision with language, audio, or touch, olfaction remains largely unexplored due to the lack of paired visuo-olfactory data. We introduce SmellNet-V, a scalable visuo-olfactory dataset built on the insight that odor identity is largely invariant to visual transformations within a semantic category. This allows us to synthetically pair smell-only samples with semantically aligned in-the-wild web images, converting a unimodal olfactory dataset into a cross-modal benchmark without costly co-collection. Building on this dataset, we propose See & Sniff, a self-supervised framework that learns joint visuo-olfactory representations via dense local alignment and naturally produces smell saliency maps for spatial grounding of odor sources. We further introduce pixel-level smell localization task and a benchmark for evaluation. Our method surpasses smell-only baselines by 7% in smell classification from smell alone and generalizes to cross-modal retrieval and smell localization, establishing visuo-olfactory learning as a new direction in multimodal perception.

AI.tldr: SmellNet-V是一个可扩展的视嗅数据集,通过利用气味身份在同一语义类别内对视觉变换保持不变这一洞察,将仅嗅觉样本与语义对齐的野生网络图像配对。基于该数据集,提出See & Sniff自监督框架,通过密集局部对齐学习联合视嗅表示,并自然产生气味显著性图用于气味源的空间定位,在气味分类任务中超越仅气味基线7%。
AI.motivation: 虽然现代多模态模型集成视觉与语言、音频或触觉,但由于缺乏成对的视嗅数据,嗅觉在很大程度上未被探索。
AI.method: 构建SmellNet-V数据集:利用气味身份在同一语义类别内对视觉变换保持不变的洞察,将仅嗅觉样本与语义对齐的野生网络图像合成配对,将单模态嗅觉数据集转换为跨模态基准。提出See & Sniff自监督框架:通过密集局部对齐学习联合视嗅表示,自然产生气味显著性图用于气味源的空间定位,并引入像素级气味定位任务和评估基准。
AI.result: 在气味分类任务中超越仅气味基线7%,并泛化到跨模态检索和气味定位。
AI.conclusion: 确立视嗅学习作为多模态感知的新方向。

relevance_reason: This paper is about visuo-olfactory (visual + smell) representations for odor classification and localization - completely unrelated to Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The application domain is fundamentally different (olfactory perception vs motion generation). It doesn't address any of the pain points: extracting 3D motion from 2D video, ensuring motion quality, bridging visual-to-3D domain gap, or handling ambiguous visual guidance. The methods used (dense local alignment for smell representation learning) are also entirely different from video generation models, VLM for quality assessment, or 3D motion generation models. This is a multisensory perception paper, not a computer graphics or motion generation paper.

title: ViQ: Text-Aligned Visual Quantized Representations at Any Resolution
summary: A unified representation for text and vision is a natural pursuit, as it enables simpler multimodal modeling and more efficient training. However, representing images as discrete signals in the same way as text inevitably introduces severe information loss. Existing work struggles to balance low-level details and high-level semantics in discrete representations: reconstruction-oriented representations often lack semantic information, whereas semantically stronger features typically suffer from severe loss of detail. We present ViQ, a Visual Quantized Representations framework, which is designed to balance semantics and details in discrete representations while supporting inputs at native resolutions, thereby enabling it to serve as a unified and general discrete representation for arbitrary visual inputs. Our approach structures quantization learning into two stages: text-aligned pre-training and feature discretization. With text-aligned pre-training, we enhance the visual encoder semantic-rich supervision from the pretrained language model and enable it to process native-resolution visual inputs. During discretization, we propose a proximal representation learning strategy to progressively compact the feature space, along with a position-aware head-wise quantization mechanism that enables flexible processing of arbitrary resolutions. Extensive experiments on multimodal tasks demonstrate that ViQ achieves competitive performance compared to state-of-the-art multimodal vision encoders with continuous and high-dimensional visual features, while maintaining high precision in low-level reconstruction. We also show that multimodal training with visual quantized representations largely improves efficiency, yielding up to 20\%-70\% acceleration with different base LLMs and training recipes.

AI.tldr: ViQ是一个统一的视觉离散表示框架，通过两阶段量化学习（文本对齐预训练和特征离散化）来平衡语义和细节，支持任意分辨率的原生输入。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉离散表示方法难以同时保留低层细节和高层语义：重建导向表示缺乏语义信息，语义强的表示则丢失细节。需要一种既能处理原生分辨率、又能在语义和细节间取得平衡的统一离散表示。
AI.method: 提出两阶段量化学习：1)文本对齐预训练：从预训练语言模型增强视觉编码器的语义监督，处理原生分辨率输入；2)特征离散化：使用近端表示学习策略逐步压缩特征空间，配合位置感知头-wise量化机制处理任意分辨率。
AI.result: ViQ在多模态任务上达到与最先进的连续高维视觉特征编码器相当的性能，同时保持高精度的低层重建；训练效率提升20%-70%。
AI.conclusion: ViQ可作为任意视觉输入的通用离散表示，在语义保留、细节重建和训练效率之间实现良好平衡。

relevance_reason: The paper focuses on visual quantization for IMAGE generation/representation tasks, not MOTION generation. While it uses a two-stage pipeline similar to text-to-motion methods, the application domain is fundamentally different - it's about image discretization and image generation, not 3D human motion synthesis. The pain points in the research profile (extracting 3D motion from video, motion quality assessment) are completely unrelated to this paper's focus (image semantic vs detail balance). This is a case of using similar methods (quantization, two-stage learning) but in wrong application domain.

title: OctoSense: Self-Supervised Learning for Multimodal Robot Perception
summary: We present OctoSense, an open-source sensor platform with stereo RGB and event cameras, LiDAR, a thermal camera, an inertial measurement unit, RTK-corrected global positioning system, and proprioception (CAN bus data from a car, and joint angles for a quadruped robot). The eponymous OctoSense dataset contains 59 hours of time-synchronized driving data across different types of environments at different times of the day, including situations with highly degraded sensors. We demonstrate multi-modal self-supervised learning using such real-world robotics data, where sensors have different representations, frequencies, latencies and noise. Our approach, a "late-fusion" masked autoencoder, (i) uses modality-specific tokenizers to account for different spatiotemporal characteristics of these sensors, and (ii) caches modality-specific tokens at inference time to process new measurements as they come. This architecture (i) is fast (6.68 ms and 112 ms on NVIDIA 5090 and Orin NX respectively, to compute the representation), (ii) performs better than existing image-only foundation models on tasks such as estimation of optical flow, depth, semantic segmentation, and ego-motion (translation, rotation, and steering angle), and (iii) predicts robustly at nighttime or in situations where sensory data is degraded. See our project page for links to the dataset, code, and supplementary videos: https://abisulco.com/octosense/.

AI.tldr: OctoSense是一个开源的多模态传感器平台，整合了RGB相机、事件相机、激光雷达、热像仪、IMU、RTK-GPS和本体感知数据，并发布了59小时的高质量同步数据集。提出了一种"后期融合"掩码自编码器架构，通过模态特定的分词器处理不同传感器的时空特征，在推理时缓存模态特定令牌以快速处理新数据。该方法在估计光流、深度、语义分割和自运动等任务上优于现有图像基础模型，且在夜间或传感器退化情况下表现出更强的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 当前多模态感知领域面临传感器异构性挑战：不同传感器具有不同的表示方式、频率、延迟和噪声特性。现有的图像-only基础模型难以有效处理这种多样性，且在传感器退化或极端条件下性能下降明显。研究者希望构建一个能够统一处理多种异构传感器数据并进行自监督学习的开源平台。
AI.method: 提出一种"后期融合"掩码自编码器架构，包含两个核心设计：(1) 模态特定的分词器(tokenizers)，分别处理不同传感器的时空特征；(2) 推理时缓存机制，在获取新测量时直接调用缓存的模态令牌进行快速推理，避免重复计算。
AI.result: 该架构在NVIDIA 5090上推理时间为6.68ms，在Orin NX上为112ms。在光流、深度估计、语义分割和自运动(平移、旋转、转向角)估计等任务上，性能优于现有的图像-only基础模型。更重要的是，该方法在夜间或传感器数据退化情况下仍能保持鲁棒预测。
AI.conclusion: OctoSense提供了一个有价值的开源多模态传感器平台和数据集，证明后期融合掩码自编码器能有效处理异构传感器数据，为多模态自监督学习提供了新的思路，并在实际机器人任务中展现了良好的性能和鲁棒性。

relevance_reason: This paper is about ROBOT PERCEPTION using multisensor fusion (RGB, event camera, LiDAR, thermal, IMU, RTK-GPS), which is a completely different application domain from Computer Graphics / Text-to-Motion Generation. The research profile focuses on generating 3D human motion from video/text (like Wanxiang/Seedance), while this paper addresses robot navigation and perception tasks (optical flow, depth, ego-motion for robot control). Robot motion generation is NOT the same as human motion generation. The methods are also different - this uses masked autoencoders for sensor fusion, not video-to-motion generation models. The pain points don't align at all - this paper doesn't address extracting 3D motion from video priors or bridging visual-to-3D motion domain gaps.

title: Not All Actions Are Equal: Rethinking Conditioning for Dexterous World Model
summary: Recent advances in action-conditioned world models show promising progress in modeling complex interactions and forecasting future states under diverse action sequences. While these models are often driven by stronger visual representations and model capacity, action conditioning itself remains underexplored. Most existing approaches compress the entire action sequence into a single representation, which works well for low-DoF control but becomes less reliable in high-DoF scenarios. We observe that high-DoF dexterous actions are inherently heterogeneous, spanning multiple orders of magnitude, where large-scale motions coexist with subtle but important signals. When uniformly aggregated, optimization exhibits an imbalance across action components, which hinders the modeling of fine-grained effects and affects action fidelity. We therefore propose DexAC-WM, which treats action conditioning as a structured process rather than global compression. DexAC preserves dimension-level semantics via action tokenization and aligns action signals with visual dynamics through local refinement and global modulation. To address the limited high-level semantic grounding in existing world models, we further introduce a semantic branch that provides rich object-scene priors, which enables world model to capture dynamic visual details while supporting high-DoF action-conditioned video prediction. Experiments on EgoDex and EgoVerse show that combining the semantic branch with DexAC significantly improves FID, FVD, and PCK, demonstrating gains in visual-temporal realism and action-following consistency. We further verify that DexAC extends to other backbones, showing the scalability of our structured action-conditioning design. These results suggest that scaling world models to high-DoF control requires both structured action modeling and semantic grounding.

AI.tldr: 本文提出DexAC-WM，一种针对高自由度灵巧操作的动作条件世界模型，通过结构化动作建模和语义分支来解决现有方法中动作压缩和信息不平衡的问题。
AI.motivation: 高自由度 dexterous actions 具有内在异质性，跨越多个数量级，现有方法将整个动作序列压缩为单一表示，导致优化不平衡，阻碍细粒度效果建模并影响动作保真度。
AI.method: 提出DexAC：1) 通过动作标记化保持维度级语义；2) 通过局部细化和全局调制对齐动作信号与视觉动态；3) 引入语义分支提供丰富的对象-场景先验，支持高-DoF动作条件视频预测。
AI.result: 在EgoDex和EgoVerse数据集上显著提升FID、FVD和PCK指标，验证了结构化动作条件设计的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 扩展世界模型到高自由度控制需要结构化动作建模和语义接地。

relevance_reason: This paper focuses on action-conditioned video prediction/world modeling for dexterous hand manipulation (robotics domain), not text-to-motion generation (computer graphics). While it addresses action representation and visual-action alignment, the application domain is fundamentally different - it deals with hand/finger actions for robotic manipulation rather than human body motion generation from text. The methods (action tokenization, semantic branches) are specific to world modeling and don't align with the profile's text-to-motion or video-to-motion generation approaches. It's moderately relevant only in the broad sense of dealing with motion/action modeling, but misses the core research area entirely.

title: RoPEMover: Depth-Aware Object Relocation via Positional Embeddings
summary: Moving an object in a single image requires geometry-consistent spatial rearrangement, including handling occlusions, revealing previously unseen regions, and maintaining coherent shadows and reflections. Existing approaches are not well suited to this setting and often fail to preserve such scene-level consistency. We address this problem by introducing a geometry-aware object motion method that operates directly on the positional representations of diffusion transformers. Our key insight is that rotary positional embeddings (RoPE) define a structured spatial field that can be explicitly manipulated to induce controlled motion. We extend 2D RoPE into a depth-aware formulation that encodes 3D spatial structure, enabling consistent object displacement and scene-aware updates. Our model is trained using synthetic data combined with a small set of real images via parameter-efficient fine-tuning. Despite minimal real supervision, it preserves object identity under large spatial displacements, generates plausible content in newly revealed regions, and consistently updates scene-dependent effects such as shadows and illumination. Experimental results on standard object motion benchmarks demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across all evaluation metrics.

AI.tldr: 一种基于旋转位置嵌入（RoPE）的几何感知物体移动方法，可在单张图像中实现一致的空间重组，处理遮挡、生成新可视区域并保持阴影和反射的一致性。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在单图像场景中保持几何一致性，无法妥善处理遮挡、新区域的生成以及阴影反射等场景级依赖效应的保持。
AI.method: 将2D RoPE扩展为深度感知形式以编码3D空间结构，通过操作扩散变换器的位置表示来诱导受控运动；使用合成数据结合少量真实图像进行参数高效微调训练。
AI.result: 在保持物体身份的大位移情况下生成合理的新内容，一致更新阴影和光照等场景依赖效应，在标准物体移动基准测试中达到所有评估指标的先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过深度感知的旋转位置嵌入实现了几何一致的物体移动，最小真实监督下即可完成高质量的场景更新，为单图像物体操作提供了有效解决方案。

relevance_reason: This paper is about 2D object relocation in images (spatial reorganization within a single image), while the research profile is specifically about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human motion from video/text priors). Although both use diffusion transformers, the application domains are completely different: RoPEMover deals with 2D image editing and visual consistency, whereas the research profile deals with bridging the visual-to-3D motion domain gap and extracting 3D motion information. Using diffusion for image manipulation vs. motion generation are distinct application domains. The paper does not address any of the pain points related to motion generation, quality assessment of motions, or handling ambiguous visual guidance for motion synthesis.

title: SAM2Matting: Generalized Image and Video Matting
comment: ECCV 2026. Extended version. Project Page: https://henghuiding.com/SAM2Matting/
summary: Despite impressive advances in image matting, video matting remains challenging due to the inherent gap between high-level tracking, which requires frame-wise understanding, and low-level matting, which focuses on extremely fine-grained details. Existing methods attempt this with expensive and narrowly-scoped video matting datasets, which may limit out-of-domain generalization and compromise tracking robustness. We rethink the paradigm with SAM2Matting, a tracker-to-matting framework that advances VOS trackers to high-fidelity video matting. Specifically, it decouples the task by enhancing a foundational tracker (e.g., SAM2, SAM3) with a region-proposal bridge and dedicated matting heads, enabling the uncompromised tracker to handle temporal consistency while the matting components resolve fine-grained details. Notably, despite being trained only on images, SAM2Matting establishes new state-of-the-art performance on video matting, supports diverse prompt types, maintains strong temporal consistency, and demonstrates robust generalization across both human-centric and in-the-wild scenarios.

AI.tldr: 本文提出SAM2Matting，一种从跟踪器到抠图的框架，旨在将视频目标跟踪器（VOS trackers）提升为高质量视频抠图模型，解决视频抠图中高级跟踪与低级精细抠图之间的差距问题。
AI.motivation: 视频抠图面临挑战：高级跟踪需要帧级理解，而低级抠图关注极其精细的细节，两者存在固有差距。现有方法依赖昂贵且范围狭窄的视频抠图数据集，限制了域外泛化能力并影响跟踪鲁棒性。
AI.method: SAM2Matting采用解耦范式：增强基础跟踪器（如SAM2、SAM3），引入区域提议桥（region-proposal bridge）和专用抠图头（dedicated matting heads），使跟踪器专注于时间一致性处理，而抠图组件负责解决精细细节。
AI.result: 尽管仅在图像上训练，SAM2Matting在视频抠图上建立了新的state-of-the-art性能，支持多样化提示类型，保持强时间一致性，并在人类中心场景和野外场景中展示强大的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成功证明了通过解耦设计，可以利用图像训练的模型实现高质量视频抠图，为视频抠图研究提供了新思路，具有重要的应用价值。

relevance_reason: Completely different application domain. This paper is about Video Matting (foreground extraction for video compositing/editing), while the research profile is about Text-to-Motion Generation (generating 3D human skeletal motion). Although both deal with video, video matting extracts 2D visual elements and has no connection to 3D motion generation. The paper addresses tracking vs matting granularity issues in video editing, completely unrelated to extracting 3D motion from video or bridging visual-to-3D motion domains.

title: RayPE: Ray-Space Positional Encoding for 3D-Aware Video Generation
summary: Modern video diffusion transformers position their tokens through RoPE on the (u,v,t) axes -- a description of the camera's sampling grid that says nothing about the 3D structure of the scene. We observe that the geometric relation between two camera rays is captured by the Plucker reciprocal product, which is bilinear in the two rays -- the same algebraic form as the dot product in Transformer attention. Building on this analogy, we propose RayPE, a positional-encoding extension that injects per-token 6D Plucker coordinates additively into the queries and keys of self-attention, with a query/key flip arrangement under which the symmetric identity configuration coincides exactly with the reciprocal product. The injection is additive, the resulting attention score decomposes into a content term, a geometry term, and two content and geometry cross-terms -- all of which our experiments find individually necessary. To make the encoding stable across video data with heterogeneous camera-translation scales (SfM, deep SLAM, metric), we further decouple ray direction from moment magnitude, gate the encoding by a learned function of the log-magnitude, and apply RMSNorm to align it with the QKNorm-normalized content branch. The full module adds less than 0.1% parameters to a pretrained video DiT, is zero-initialized to start from the pretrained weights, and improves camera controllability, cross-frame 3D consistency, and overall video quality on a four-dataset training mixture.

AI.tldr: 本文提出RayPE，一种用于视频扩散Transformer的新型位置编码方法，将6D Plucker坐标注入到自注意力机制中，以增强模型对3D几何结构的建模能力。
AI.motivation: 现有视频扩散Transformer使用RoPE对(u,v,t)轴进行位置编码，仅描述相机采样网格，未捕捉场景的3D结构。而两条相机射线之间的几何关系可通过Plucker互易积表达，该形式与Transformer注意力的点积代数形式相同。
AI.method: 提出RayPE：将每token的6D Plucker坐标加性注入到自注意力的查询和键中，通过查询/键翻转排列使对称恒等配置恰好对应互易积；将射线方向与矩大小解耦，用对数大小的学习函数门控编码，并应用RMSNorm与QKNorm规范化的内容分支对齐；模块仅增加不到0.1%参数，零初始化以保持预训练权重。
AI.result: 注意力分数分解为内容项、几何项和两项交叉项，实验验证各部分均必要。在四数据集混合训练上提升了相机可控性、跨帧3D一致性和整体视频质量。
AI.conclusion: RayPE通过将Plucker几何引入注意力机制，有效增强了视频扩散模型的3D几何建模能力，且仅需极小额外参数即可实现。

relevance_reason: Wrong application domain. The paper is about 3D-aware VIDEO generation (creating video content), while the research profile is about TEXT-TO-MOTION generation (creating 3D human/character motion). Although both use diffusion models, video generation and motion generation are fundamentally different applications - one creates 2D/3D video frames, the other generates skeletal motion data for characters. The paper addresses camera control and 3D consistency in video, not extracting or generating 3D motion for characters.

title: PhysiFormer: Learning to Simulate Mechanics in World Space
summary: We present PhysiFormer, a diffusion transformer for physically-plausible 3D object motion. Unlike video world models that operate in view-dependent pixel space, PhysiFormer represents objects as 3D meshes expressed in world coordinates. Given the initial vertex positions and velocities, as well as object material type, rigid or elastic, the model samples future vertex trajectories. While related neural physics approaches build on ad-hoc latent spaces or explicitly enforce rigidity and causality, PhysiFormer shows that excellent results can be obtained without any such inductive biases, by casting vertex trajectory prediction as a single denoising diffusion process directly in world coordinates. The probabilistic formulation captures uncertainty in the learned dynamics, enabling diverse plausible futures from initial conditions, making this framework potentially useful for applications with unobserved uncertainty. The model features attention factorised over time, space, and objects for efficiency, enabling permutation-invariant multi-object reasoning without needing explicit object encoding. Trained on over 100k simulated trajectories, PhysiFormer generates rigid and elastic mechanics, and generalises to mixed-material settings, unseen real-world geometries, and larger object counts. It substantially outperforms autoregressive baselines in trajectory accuracy, rigidity preservation, and momentum-based physical consistency. Our results position coordinate-space diffusion as a promising step toward view-invariant, geometry-aware world modelling for robotics, graphics, and physical design. Visualisations, code, and models are available at https://yimingc9.github.io/physiformer.
